clean_body: If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, “Those were the days.” But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you. | | | As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that’s why I’m running for Senate. We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love \-- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

**Harvard Warning** \- _“You’ve been lied to about Calcium!”_
Ask anyone how to prevent bone loss and fractures, and they're likely to answer, "Get more calcium."
Bad news...

According to a 2015 Harvard publication... An intake of 1,000 mg of calcium supplements has been linked with an **increased risk of heart attack, stroke, kidney stones,** and**gastrointestinal symptoms** ...

Now, the Medical Journal BMJ concludes that consuming calcium doesn't even reduce fractures in people over 50! But there's good news... Because a unique protein seems to act like glue inside your bones — helping to reverse osteopenia. [**Try this protein swap instead**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=3cadvy3357oucqshh5ss7t8rsw3rq9pw6kozq5ok57l6t2bg7z78n9ftwjbhsvlk8vcahil1xw656mwro5tf1nsoq4cdea2zi8st80y761e40hxklh94jn71e2c7cdp3ryg5vwqlx7vdro77sszdfea79gybcnbhzryfg18pjcus31vc0rjgt0zhpz05qbzfqtvihspazlkmz9aah9rgw6xfp87u1wpm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sa3ad6). The Senate passed a consolidated bill on Friday to fund a part of the federal government for the 2024 fiscal year, which partially completes the appropriations process that has been delayed since Sept. 30, 2023.

Democratic Gov. Kathy Hochul of New York defended her decision to deploy National Guard troops to the New York City subway Friday, citing commuters’ “anxiety,” the New York Post reported.

name: Eric Hovde
subject: Schumer. Baldwin. Biden.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin
body:
Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and Tammy Baldwin are terrified we can win this race in November.

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30447%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2oHfaEwhJDGyUfAyv5hqpw&sysid=1)
---

Fellow Conservative,

Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and Tammy Baldwin are terrified we can win this race in November.

name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: Welcome to the American Principles Project
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/64307660:JbTtxAwNx:m:1:3433086767:A04D7C82990848824DA034669898717B:r)
,

Thank you for joining the American Principles Project team. I'm thrilled to have you on board as we stand dedicated to defending the most important institution in our society: **_the family_**.
American Principles Project (APP) has been on the frontlines fighting to protect parents' rights and empower them to protect their children from nefarious forces that seek to indoctrinate them into hating their country, God, and families.
We have invested millions into campaigns and elections to show Americans how to win by fighting for the family. This political gap for the family was left unfilled for decades. We are in the mess we are in because for decades there were no consequences for politicians when they voted to harm our families and children. APP is changing that.
**_Now, more than ever, we need leaders who will stand up to the egregious lies and act to protect our children and families._**
Our goal is to make the American family the most powerful, well-represented special interest group in Washington, D.C., and it's time we have a political calvary to impose a political cost on the Left's anti-family extremism.
In 2020, the Presidential election was decided by less than 45,000 votes in 3 key swing states.
That's why this year, we plan to engage parents and families to shift over 250,000 votes in key battleground states and races.
In today's society, elected officials cast aside the American family on behalf of hard-line progressive activists. From vetoing bills that would ban dangerous medical procedures that sterilize and mutilate children to allowing schools to teach woke curricula aimed at indoctrinating our youth, we've had enough.
At APP, our mission is to engage directly in campaigns and elections to support candidates who promote the common-sense ideas that are being attacked: men don't belong in women's sports, parental rights must be protected, and every child is born in God's image -- **_not in the wrong body_**.
With your support, the American Principles Project will continue to take the fight directly to Washington D.C., and the politicians who are no longer putting the American family first.
The American Principles Project Promise:
1. Elect pro-family politicians
2. Hold politicians accountable
3. Promote pro-family policies

If they want to attack parental rights, confuse young children about changing their gender, undermine the ability of parents to protect their children's innocence or drive a wedge between parents and children in education, **then they are going to be punished at the polls.**
Thank you for joining us on our mission at the American Principles Project. Together, we will defend the values and principles foundational to our society, ensuring that common sense is no longer an uncommon virtue.
Sincerely,
Terry Schilling
President
American Principles Project
[DEFEND THE AMERICAN FAMILY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/64307660:JbTtxAwNx:m:1:3433086767:A04D7C82990848824DA034669898717B:r)
---
[DEFEND THE AMERICAN FAMILY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/64307660:JbTtxAwNx:m:1:3433086767:A04D7C82990848824DA034669898717B:r)
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eVKkDMJeOjrfaoZFrIQ9ug~~/AARclAA~/RgRnztR8P0TKaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5X2R2ZCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1DQi0yMDI0MDMwOVcDc3BjQgpl6n4-7GUM1TIIUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eVKkDMJeOjrfaoZFrIQ9ug~~/AARclAA~/RgRnztR8P0TKaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5X2R2ZCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1DQi0yMDI0MDMwOVcDc3BjQgpl6n4-7GUM1TIIUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eVKkDMJeOjrfaoZFrIQ9ug~~/AARclAA~/RgRnztR8P0TKaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5X2R2ZCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1DQi0yMDI0MDMwOVcDc3BjQgpl6n4-7GUM1TIIUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
Extreme weather in the Southwest and Western parts of the U.S. could intensify the Smokehouse Creek Fire in Texas and produce at least 10 feet of snow in California's Sierra Nevada region.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# Saturday, March 9, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1862, the Union _Monitor_ and Confederate _Merrimack _fought the first-ever naval duel between ironclad warships. ([Photos and More Info](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAQQL_GbEbGdkhu8NAObHTtiA58hGuNHTknUP--SufuT-_pfY7TiJw43z9wpyBrmXARPmhyGrT1k29iWIksuYZCdzUA4MG5ZguxA4fOzLfLTEhm7g2CjeRovV17N0PDwRrrjTPQmUvvoY2Exvt4A5w7Bw6UNxRZSm2_CmfZaE0_5aDaLmVvUthEHk_l3pQdlB3O82znyoI584IvRNmBDsqi7PCOIol0WbVspMeSX1aNOeqRauUdl--mhvg4OSV-9lflzX1HTn8l-W_7NwAA____jVoz)) Unless you live in the great states of Arizona or Hawaii, you'll need to set your clocks ahead tonight and get ready to lose an hour of sleep. Daylight savings time is upon us. The Editor can definitely remember showing up an hour late for church as a child; don't let it happen to you! Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQANCvsbdWF9_FiQcPSFUmwsoYGfuSHDhxlZoi_h4hRrq_5b2O0xgky768hI19ncsUYpU7T3hyJ0MT6eRnZsOo2TcdOOfIIerVt7bh2EXoIfW2i8bMduYIDYc-thRbLd6AIUBwDbSW3DlxAKLUu_DWoEOnCDhJLcf5vcheV57zd7nzcY5l09mvtV5vCp-UGZQZ_hNlhjEsEp9l__g1OLDCS7p-Sc5ys50iWLYg-c_az7opvBDowz82uj76_wQAAP__jGta7A). If you're struggling with memory loss, check out today's sponsor, [NativePath.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOszAQhJ9m6UDr3Y2JCxe_hOjyV5GuRAYvwScCCHw53dufSH3NjEYzxaf5uHW3kOa0PP6Hp_o8rl0Ycnppx6UrSTopoh9VSblQb2p0zoljLiZPIpGt2KGnYOtItVU7yjVclS-1HWKRPCEJMjqDFyuuihpQJF5d6A07diCoMeV1rz7XtORJx_lnfeleDeuzmP2U83YA_wNqgdqxr5Zwkm0hT-cCqN3jKdU2bcDtkSJwY8gKkN2-euCGBC81A9nBnOlNY7C8t2Paj1waQjxLAm5OZ-Dm3ha7j9t3mud02BoEH8-Q5jdS_uuf3wAAAP__G3Re7g)

## RNC Selects New Leadership
Yesterday, the Republican National Committee [unanimously confirmed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D9vwyAUBPBPgzcs_sUxA0PVyluydrSe4RG_CkNk06B8-yrt2vV-0ul0n5f5ApQo366woauxzOArPXDW3HJlZtMFFxEV6g6dPAtrrbFad6vTUSodRyFt9KcRB3k6h6gkjGEZAILpyCmhjNDCSnEajO0DgjAmjBYWqa22zAgMVMvefxXKdcWYnuWBe-_L1iW31no_mH5jamJqaq31fjkytuPlTE1LOWrJTE2vjKlpz56HkiEFXvfv7c438itg4m2FmvDJE-zwR69KPVGungLTH-_XCxeCSwFLkGu3u3BvlBIdw5kZcduA0u-m-t9BPwEAAP__qVRnUg) North Carolina GOP chair Michael Whatley and Lara Trump as RNC chair and co-chair. Both Whatley and Trump were strongly recommended by [former President Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO8yAYBJ8Gd1gYSGwKiqRwl1_6qyutL3iJiTCOMAnKPf0pV1-1xWqk0XxdpguFGNLtH62wxW8TuRJemBQ3XOpJN7P1gIRqYLteGGO0UapZ7DD0zsMdXNcNRwxeQLhrD2-uEGbwaIKVQmqhhOnE4ahNO4OE1vNg6NopowzTAnMoW27vW0hlgY_v7YXcum1tol1KeexMnZgcmRxrre26p8_H5IjEnzuTY0L9zFYWZCbHnBxHhCs7X4NbCJHXhUrEm0fKxEt-rg9OO0-oPIJm5A9OmZ_P3f37dvrfZDs_aogx7MeeaXFbKcRfofJXnZ8AAAD__xEDZ7k) as he sought a change in leadership going into November's election. Whatley will focus on voter turnout, and Lara Trump, the former President's daughter-in-law, will handle fundraising and media appearances. "Over the next eight months, the [RNC will work](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPozAQRn8NdIOM7cC5oLgmXa69Eg14HGbX2MiehM2_X2Xr7T7p05Oe3v_bfEOOnO7_cKdJQp5xFX7SbMCBtrNt_RSINJmWpn5UzjnrjGm3SS3kx2Xwo--D8VbZMFwGa_uwBr2akVqetNJWGeV6dRms6zyhstb_cbj0xhnXWEWeJZfuI3OSjUJ85SeVbs17G6dN5KiN-dvoa6Ov53l2IX8lOuv7b_T1yJGF1_qeWOQFgp_05kHKYz-AUxWMsYLkAzDGF2Dy4PFx34QKcIKIJ0iGKkQFCh2PJfKKCRIK54QR1rzvLELUlskfJ8fIdRgbq-47cvzxlN-ifQcAAP__1F9y-Q) hand in glove with President Trump," Whatley said.
## Cinnamon Recall
The FDA has issued [a recall of ground cinnamon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO8yAQhJ8Gd7Zg4TfeguJv3OXaKy0Ma4cThgiTWHn7E6mv2ZVG82lG831bbjbEkPYve5CpW16sq-FFi-yxB7WozpuNCEh2ZITmiKhQyu5uOK6ONE7o3er8qJWaxAZiBeHVhKPrggEOikuOgv8bFQ6eLFfKT2hXIVEiU5x8qLkMPzmkeqctvvOLyuDy0UVzr_VxMvmfwcxgvq5reJ62Zm_fzcBgPmsubwbzkRO1v-XsGcwtlcHMZTu66d72e8nP5HsXUrJHTn0hZ2Psn2WnxmiY9CSE5B-gK8Y_rhBjOEfNFN8PG-KnVf1rot8AAAD__xvWZH8) sold by discount retailers Dollar Tree, Family Dollar, Patel Brothers, and Save A Lot after the products were found to have elevated levels of lead. Brands impacted by the recall are Colonna Brothers, El Chilar Rodriguez, Marcum, MK, La Fiesta, Swad, and Supreme Tradition. [You can see the list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1utDAQAJ8GOqPFXn62cPE1193XpkQbvL5ztGAEPlDePrrUaaYaaaT5uE93TprWx39exJeYJ55LOmVyhozFCevgo4gVV4tvByAiJOfqpx-6WZzEOOIsI1K0Q4vMYHuMHYyB6uQtWAQH1ELXIzVBGBDDSPzZOnJUIUhIJe_NV05reUrU73zK3sx5qdU_S9mOyv2r7K2yt-u6ml1Yj7RsKm-lsrfHnl9rMHNaV17yanaZWVWCCS8xJRtROblIMCr8xil6mLGHbgSsdx-2K6mmox8qhMfCSX_T5a8PPwEAAP__Iq1fsw). The FDA has asked consumers to [avoid purchasing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGymzAQQNGvEd16hCRsVFCkoXPalMwiLWYTITHS4oz_PpNXv_o2d86v5_JETpxfP_GgSbayYBB-02LBg3GL6-K0ERmyHU39Q3vvnbe226dI1Ot1Hby247A6DGENOtIYVjMavbqOJ6ON01b7Xg9352-RUDsXR49rb731ymmKLKXefhfOstOWPuVN9RbK0aVpFzmbsj-UmZWZZaedU_rflJnPkjh8lJl3wiR7wErKzG7o3dhb2CLCxjk2SIQRQsmCB2cULhk4Q6AqyBletVw5QuCc8SgZzlriFaQBtj8NDszXhkGuSrWBFHiXdGXByukDlQKmBCx0NGXmrk7x_Mspcbs_lNOvA_nrtZPvUP8FAAD__yEVfUc) and throw away any ground cinnamon made by those brands. Manufacturers were also asked to voluntarily recall products. So far, no illnesses or health events have been reported.
## Weekend Viewing Options
Comedy, action, and nostalgia seem to be the themes among the batch of new streaming options this weekend. Apple TV's "[The Reluctant Traveler: With Eugene Levy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuhDAQRb_GdLOyx96HCxdp6DZtSjTYA0wCeIWdRfx9lEeZ6hb3FEfn7d7dSWZZx1daONQhdxSrPLmz4AFd55oUBmZk23AwV-29d97aZgrOXNHYYegjOUIde8R0G8jcXERrz7GRgBqdttobfb44f0pM2rl089Qb661XTnOSmrfTe5a1TjzMR37ydop5aeYw1fooyr4obBW28eh5Gz-P71NhW-rGtMg6KmxrfoAxsPIOS34KF6A1QZnyXqBm-EWhTlJgZ_6AhbY4wflvDSpsmy2kxy7zLOVyVU6PC8n841H_i_IVAAD__92NY6Y)" returns with its second second season. Beloved funny man Levy does not like to travel, but he does it anyway for our entertainment. British filmmaker Guy Ritchie's new series "[The Gentlemen](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngQ0LHzj2DQxdvKVrR4uEc3wtNpE5BfXtq3bu_ku_vo_rco2c-Xi8x52CrGWJd-EXLc6gAb94ncJKBOQ0hX60iOjROb2FaXVTH6dxtAMkPyAkRGftfaRLnAawmgNY8NZZ7O1w8dglitb7NGG89Q4dKm8psZSz-yx8yEZr_i4vOrt72XUOm8izKvemYFYwt9a6xA-WmOWkI9XfSsG8lxdTVTDfqIo5qJm6lVaNFFPlpLgb2biaRvSlYNZnSM_GOXO9jMrbxx45__3kP_xPAAAA__9H5ltX)" debuts on Netflix. It's a loose remake of his film under the same name, and features proper villains doing proper villain things. Once again, we have Flyover staff recommendations: "[Wonka](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwzAMBb9G3mJIIqOYg4YChbd0zUgoFp2ole3UJmL074t07vSGd8ABdznzOZVa5ttHmiTquHAatDyF4UAHj4xNjqOIF2gkupMlIiSA5h47CMFa8mMQyZDGMFBG8QEDDq7rXFOitx4tWHL2GJDaLMki5o7S1QEBGbSSiy5r-7mUWe8y1p_lKWs7LFNT4131sRl4M743vt_3vS1Tvr5O43stWuW1GlwIQP5FQb_KyAbe5ydvK2_rdmPHqnzkeWLP33xZ5q_UrDE_9lJr2cLJoL1NqdQ_qf5X4DcAAP__pzVbcw)" on Max, "[Royal Pains"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GO6yAQRb8GuljAYOwpKJ705C7bbolwGJJZYTtyRrH271feeqtb3CMdnc9rumZuvN4_8kJR6pbyTfhNCS54cT55XWIlcgSaoh0MInoE0I9oRtMHmz2AnccSAg4Bx9vsAW1f54yaozPOGzBoTR88doWy8b6MmGcLCKi8ocKy7d3Xxqs8qLbv7U17d9sW3eJD5PlS8E-5SbnpOI6OlzKfp3KTsDQ6VyxYHKA_KZh2qknB_7qm3JJIsnqP5Xlwa_wKg_LmvmRuvwL5q_YnAAD__z9kUzk) and "[Tacoma FD](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAQRn-N2YLOZ-PgwUOlii1dO54MPieuDKRwCuq_r-jc6Ru-Jz3pfd7oFksty_0jzhwkrxQnKS8mc_EXtGSbFDIzsmk46Ct47603pnkE12v23Gvs3OhM0m4Efe0wulGPeUq5KQEBLRjwGjpnfZs4grWp93HUxhuvLHAqsm7t11oWeXCuP-uLt3Za56aGh8hzV-ZN4aBwOI6jLXMaz1PhIEUqnys9oLO2PykzbJxJmfflRftG-7bfCUiEelpmAvomidM6R4Uddgi52UJ6HqXWsrursnCfY6l_dvkvxW8AAAD___0dXfA)" on Netflix, and "[Northern Exposure](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAQRn-N2YIO2wTf4KFSxZauHU8mPoIrg1NzCuq_r-jc6Ru-Jz3pfd7oFlJO2-MjrOxlLhTukl5M5oIXbck20c_Mmk3DvhsAES0a0yw-9PY64aSHoesBLTIaHZ1xcLezi13fJK9BWzCAHfRXi23kANZGh2HqDBpUFjgmKbX9KmmThef8U15c23tZm-wXkeeuzJvSo9LjcRxtWuN0nkqPkiTzuQKAzg3upMxYeSZl3rcX7ZX2uj8ISIQcbSsBfdNWqixcm-rj80g5p_06KAuPNaT8p5X_GvwGAAD__yElXB4)" on Amazon Prime.

On this date in 1862, the Union Monitor and Confederate Merrimack fought the first-ever naval duel between ironclad warships. () Unless you live in the great states of Arizona or Hawaii, you'll need to set your clocks ahead tonight and get ready to lose an hour of sleep. Daylight savings time is upon us. The Editor can definitely remember showing up an hour late for church as a child; don't let it happen to you! Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . If you're struggling with memory loss, check out today's sponsor, | RNC Selects New Leadership Yesterday, the Republican National Committee North Carolina GOP chair Michael Whatley and Lara Trump as RNC chair and co-chair. Both Whatley and Trump were strongly recommended by as he sought a change in leadership going into November's election. Whatley will focus on voter turnout, and Lara Trump, the former President's daughter-in-law, will handle fundraising and media appearances. "Over the next eight months, the hand in glove with President Trump," Whatley said. Cinnamon Recall The FDA has issued sold by discount retailers Dollar Tree, Family Dollar, Patel Brothers, and Save A Lot after the products were found to have elevated levels of lead. Brands impacted by the recall are Colonna Brothers, El Chilar Rodriguez, Marcum, MK, La Fiesta, Swad, and Supreme Tradition. . The FDA has asked consumers to and throw away any ground cinnamon made by those brands. Manufacturers were also asked to voluntarily recall products. So far, no illnesses or health events have been reported. Weekend Viewing Options Comedy, action, and nostalgia seem to be the themes among the batch of new streaming options this weekend. Apple TV's "" returns with its second second season. Beloved funny man Levy does not like to travel, but he does it anyway for our entertainment. British filmmaker Guy Ritchie's new series "" debuts on Netflix. It's a loose remake of his film under the same name, and features proper villains doing proper villain things. Once again, we have Flyover staff recommendations: "" on Max, " and "" on Netflix, and "" on Amazon Prime. Contrary to what you might believe... memory loss is NOT a normal part of aging. Memory loss can be incredibly frustrating and a little embarrassing to talk about. But there is one thing you can do to regrow brain neurons and stay sharp well into your golden years. It's not crossword puzzles or brain games... But something that's taken the health world by storm over the last few years: Nootropics, aka Smart Drugs. There are a ton of these products on the market that claim to make young professionals think and work like CEOs... But not all of us are trying to climb the corporate ladder- and instead want to preserve cognitive function and reverse age-related memory loss ... Look no further than this ! name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=75bc6c97f0c0427b931dd41c14548e79&_e=3mOT99poJgGy9I_r_3azoTBzW9EWIGOHqWS8BtY9fQWhE6pPxJRv1ob53mFBFFdNyiTVEc5cn4p2Y-sIgclovNE6PEujCIe6e1eBBCln2LirVvK5lq7byE6CLQbQEg15fkDTchq0Mxc31JXYxXtNKdtHQV1b04qJzwSRl4qDvmv-w82PQ23wUE-xdoFYMTAkIULERzOLVBD3B84subktq3TEU43FaaR4R8tvRZ3i9uvxdmnJR0Vr2r6glEPinUWHC06wCENNZJVdKHLtULk_sOyGvGDtCEvbER9LKpsS3b9sHyAC0x6diTYFlFHWaA2-SzFj4LqddrSG1zYHT7j2j6WvaaskDiCoeWlQSYVmT5nLqHhey4XOZMNRM02YxJHK-O_UVkbirEdFuExA-hvGGCUg_PXjK3bGQHqwrCkd1PCfVgkHJnAHFmMvLxfjwi92)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=75bc6c97f0c0427b931dd41c14548e79&_e=3mOT99poJgGy9I_r_3azoTBzW9EWIGOHqWS8BtY9fQWhE6pPxJRv1ob53mFBFFdNyiTVEc5cn4p2Y-sIgclovNE6PEujCIe6e1eBBCln2LirVvK5lq7byE6CLQbQEg15fkDTchq0Mxc31JXYxXtNKdtHQV1b04qJzwSRl4qDvmv-w82PQ23wUE-xdoFYMTAkIULERzOLVBD3B84subktq3TEU43FaaR4R8tvRZ3i9uvxdmnJR0Vr2r6glEPinUWHC06wCENNZJVdKHLtULk_sOyGvGDtCEvbER9LKpsS3b_A5VdriCKkcHflTB_fV21cQWjSIiRLhfPKyx1S8QOfAQim2gZIY2oNJru3x4Mle7Yu7uoIlTB8XFN_9IMHfye3O7l7XeXTmsFq9v2OcXH4J_bcI8_Z_pG1f7z9kOVbWBTlRsSol5MHYwoyhWRLFZ9S)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=75bc6c97f0c0427b931dd41c14548e79&_e=3mOT99poJgGy9I_r_3azoTBzW9EWIGOHqWS8BtY9fQWhE6pPxJRv1ob53mFBFFdNyiTVEc5cn4p2Y-sIgclovNE6PEujCIe6e1eBBCln2LirVvK5lq7byE6CLQbQEg15fkDTchq0Mxc31JXYxXtNKdtHQV1b04qJzwSRl4qDvmv-w82PQ23wUE-xdoFYMTAkIULERzOLVBD3B84subktq3TEU43FaaR4R8tvRZ3i9uvxdmnJR0Vr2r6glEPinUWHC06wCENNZJVdKHLtULk_sOyGvGDtCEvbER9LKpsS3b9B6SW4tZDDhMvViigcZrwc_cqHHTZRpKNApmYJgLphiWaANGZuHxRtgoqLKBykU-y9S61A5JcREwhBmK0nBm5VOoe5gv7PmF39GlreH0KLcBGVxiu7dR48-fLy5EuPWuM_M4VE_l_AapGa_QI4RMU_)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=75bc6c97f0c0427b931dd41c14548e79&_e=3mOT99poJgGy9I_r_3azoTBzW9EWIGOHqWS8BtY9fQWhE6pPxJRv1ob53mFBFFdNyiTVEc5cn4p2Y-sIgclovNE6PEujCIe6e1eBBCln2LirVvK5lq7byE6CLQbQEg15fkDTchq0Mxc31JXYxXtNKdtHQV1b04qJzwSRl4qDvmv-w82PQ23wUE-xdoFYMTAkIULERzOLVBD3B84subktq3TEU43FaaR4R8tvRZ3i9uvxdmnJR0Vr2r6glEPinUWHC06wCENNZJVdKHLtULk_sOyGvGDtCEvbER9LKpsS3b_nw9wJnKHnI7fbLrD7lB7rdU7EsWYFIDbZS9WUcTX3L4jQK-GQkAh-7Hs_ld_LkwgkCUJZYyAvZGmjFAM7c-0znke68I2mqsmISzyqOo-1yKpgPQp5dYDD55hHKiKIqAfknFHIZCiMEIKvjlYO0i4v).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

---

Reclaiming American Freedom

Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37744b1f664142f98d4658a4e95b85d0&_e=O4ke9IAw8BchptXE5P3gwf9zi1gbbXXu2Hhf7-aiJL-8p1M2XhRPL0C68tGfX9z2nDvEOBAgYml4bzxAA5j18EpsZUc5LCQ4hx8siLJ4ajiNtML8ZXb5UyBeB1iGJIHt2Pvm4FFoZ1SQ-cE0ERj8QaU4W7Vx8mnMzRUiEHZ2jroKuFFCaZHBcIp9QQK5FkiC1i5-lP5hzaSrALmWjndznyCIrvTz6z1BD76zsB01xMtuYiUthskDwcjQapkycwGAfhsOaVMhuxN2zJXOK472Afc5RO0UMWHlsXNFwpbQ7r8ELE6pawMuOi7bJTCWRyI_QwB3WMgP-qc6GvRHM2U0QyWwddz-BsB3YCf27dj45qsquu-BFOcGNfSvWfbi9n7TW9Ke-mgDyrRXDG5X0GyeemGh5-bswyEPiC6BqjmdGI-DXreom_H2U4qm7ErXvuxt)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37744b1f664142f98d4658a4e95b85d0&_e=O4ke9IAw8BchptXE5P3gwf9zi1gbbXXu2Hhf7-aiJL-8p1M2XhRPL0C68tGfX9z2nDvEOBAgYml4bzxAA5j18EpsZUc5LCQ4hx8siLJ4ajiNtML8ZXb5UyBeB1iGJIHt2Pvm4FFoZ1SQ-cE0ERj8QaU4W7Vx8mnMzRUiEHZ2jroKuFFCaZHBcIp9QQK5FkiC1i5-lP5hzaSrALmWjndznyCIrvTz6z1BD76zsB01xMtuYiUthskDwcjQapkycwGAfhsOaVMhuxN2zJXOK472Afc5RO0UMWHlsXNFwpbQ7r_nmvgr0r-HsnvVN2nsWc3BUyfmly5ZVBU4cV4AjSHTHJ3mj79VjthjcVpdEBPA85p96628kkRNbTq8zIodllrxf2AUoXxFIyazQ1rBpecUB-IbbrFzIFRcYRzYvCUYIDEFfp_ODzHrrOdx0mP_uewr).

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1ab7ff299cf4c9d9c57be7df7bdb147&_e=kz_0ZI6OZIC5JSjBWOjfaZEXmhUCR91SvxUdPFI26W50K2sDdyXNBU37RRKqrE7UsFFy9RXZ8FhoB3z3j84NxEWF60t1TsW5ijNTJfPtxCGDbHfshxUM4MwKMADwMh7B5pEN6bUVClwHALpilu8SEwnHAxrkpAWGuMp2potENNyxKQgNiVlVhOaccZwr9yWqal3vX6LSRfjcrD08LNlZWNJRdnRtxYvKrERA3C_4su4AGxUDMVc_CWJJmuPuDK3fNdz85dR2x3p0Xw82e3FAXAE9-5F-5OK20220GMRwZaPWsfpSaqi3LaKkEIgGQOKN). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1ab7ff299cf4c9d9c57be7df7bdb147&_e=kz_0ZI6OZIC5JSjBWOjfaZEXmhUCR91SvxUdPFI26W50K2sDdyXNBU37RRKqrE7UsFFy9RXZ8FhoB3z3j84NxEWF60t1TsW5ijNTJfPtxCGDbHfshxUM4MwKMADwMh7B5pEN6bUVClwHALpilu8SE8Z3yD3IF3DNwq4gDbdZmBYSLCNktpbxZnFAKgqKfDY4iOnEoZc-Zz1J83tICBkZCZRyhOY2bG_e03xMMiy-3dUWRsCAdKdUp6nqlVbOpYUzxRNTQdaizKUfjZ5bPsJbZ8402YGB3N5rTpaHkn37BlBNr5-vO2EPX1SjwvstJwe2) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b1ab7ff299cf4c9d9c57be7df7bdb147&_e=kz_0ZI6OZIC5JSjBWOjfaZEXmhUCR91SvxUdPFI26W50K2sDdyXNBU37RRKqrE7UsFFy9RXZ8FhoB3z3j84NxEWF60t1TsW5ijNTJfPtxCGDbHfshxUM4MwKMADwMh7B5pEN6bUVClwHALpilu8SExYRzMY0YdcYvf2CdXTgvEMy2Ux6I4bus0kD4EWTWKdU0Ow6T8F82FVHKb3giHRtA6_UM8RGkBLqpQhlaBqnjREHevgWV6hslb5rhfmPtAQsUoeMndUv9z1S4IQJLnVToUIf4oSdzq5VkTn6a6t3OIW2nXpJBwAuNkKMRDwLOxMq) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de1f5559fb534fb7a941610e2259c278&_e=_5xov3pZc9qfynBjNgRCcNDxLLZjZBrSNFk7xOC7Sq3VYhm8hbJqQluud7pHqxSEzT3NdDoqXizS4iUi1AB52L7I5-kI8Nk3BDBTPHv5-_dqQ-hlJLtMJj_V70dxsolmGV7xJuh7EYpfk0Rodwxgy6i1AaSRaegV5P2FKu48dvbWP9c_SexZyF4d6N6ASCjdppc3090azGjI0OQBgJTrPKKrLeBG7FwJmX4hoxE00II9d7ZMYvtpjsy41YcIKOqy0xD8ewoasmGz0IvmAmQbVTaTy0Ero2FrMvSevzyDUGmqo3GbchtBhbNOGUFyEPeT). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de1f5559fb534fb7a941610e2259c278&_e=_5xov3pZc9qfynBjNgRCcNDxLLZjZBrSNFk7xOC7Sq3VYhm8hbJqQluud7pHqxSEzT3NdDoqXizS4iUi1AB52L7I5-kI8Nk3BDBTPHv5-_dqQ-hlJLtMJj_V70dxsolmGV7xJuh7EYpfk0Rodwxgy9-pMqGXzg7ryP-McC3ZO487AURjQx_0R5KvAzWBLV4aiVExyJuh-q8-1nFCD2CJQGIFs1qTOFPHTBKSndecQ439iY8JWH_E4lphCqZhWMpesIlNU40S5WwCmNHr5ep0ZhEdDegf0Ftx_5OuX0uJ2PbuqFQVs11Gj2Gvb8QghaJd) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de1f5559fb534fb7a941610e2259c278&_e=_5xov3pZc9qfynBjNgRCcNDxLLZjZBrSNFk7xOC7Sq3VYhm8hbJqQluud7pHqxSEzT3NdDoqXizS4iUi1AB52L7I5-kI8Nk3BDBTPHv5-_dqQ-hlJLtMJj_V70dxsolmGV7xJuh7EYpfk0Rodwxgy7v7MOePFcoU_qbRq1S8-LPRU8CWwz2-yjM8Kr0t9LYLjOphm8fHzpuEtIn471QUNf6F99E3hKUnntBnEAgI9XBcT3atvGWVdByo_z8wiJKZ1EPwk5eA7bBHI-REABi1bZfVZ0u9d-3b3SDwWfln4rg-6k7HvReRbxrRAUviamUK) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee5a10494b644640804bdea236ee34fe&_e=m6yKBz9JYQ2NeZf-PK_pMDjsI-RMTcOfSy_6PUKonuHc9i5KYr7mJpJ7KyPeutGYi2o8tDCqLzMu5B-87WpDgzx2L32QjzudkiFHUsH61jBYm2d-40zPW_FDH49SSjEHXPJ7afOoHQYWSKF-0xs8W7evqJQzlQy81o3U4EVBLNnhgRs08RcGBavLF8s1f4RM3yybZXXibjGJYNxuO6nN9VrxhLu7bO5oLC2GX_qyg7TrVTbNRxP9UaWdG8w9lYk2a9jsZK-KKt_RlY7IX89vx6pZLYVZbe0eTx70Ll_SZ_mCJad4iPvfrdmPbZ3nVmtDaBXpP0M9i334B4MzCOCJCgooRrtiCDswgCbIWndzAivqJyqrFPQCw8Sk--5DVkEd57lMqMNdKcFor7Gk71uwEBhyBNHa6Bs430C2ECVW6ISOmfTnOrzF9-8yJkr49fVg)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee5a10494b644640804bdea236ee34fe&_e=m6yKBz9JYQ2NeZf-PK_pMDjsI-RMTcOfSy_6PUKonuHc9i5KYr7mJpJ7KyPeutGYi2o8tDCqLzMu5B-87WpDgzx2L32QjzudkiFHUsH61jBYm2d-40zPW_FDH49SSjEHXPJ7afOoHQYWSKF-0xs8W7evqJQzlQy81o3U4EVBLNnhgRs08RcGBavLF8s1f4RM3yybZXXibjGJYNxuO6nN9VrxhLu7bO5oLC2GX_qyg7TrVTbNRxP9UaWdG8w9lYk2a9jsZK-KKt_RlY7IX89vx6pZLYVZbe0eTx70Ll_SZ_kj5nqFB-gcvPbC9bGbjKCS_32kgGzLzo6KA_4Z5xA5zWEqxGBbybM3US0-cw6QKpaYIoDKoYj1XylPe8afTQUcmOE447lFKPPb4FiIiuqyd1fKoAXGtub0IcDuq9FNRQx3_9z13WlQ9lG8JDsVLyfY)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee5a10494b644640804bdea236ee34fe&_e=m6yKBz9JYQ2NeZf-PK_pMDjsI-RMTcOfSy_6PUKonuHc9i5KYr7mJpJ7KyPeutGYi2o8tDCqLzMu5B-87WpDgzx2L32QjzudkiFHUsH61jBYm2d-40zPW_FDH49SSjEHXPJ7afOoHQYWSKF-0xs8W7evqJQzlQy81o3U4EVBLNnhgRs08RcGBavLF8s1f4RM3yybZXXibjGJYNxuO6nN9VrxhLu7bO5oLC2GX_qyg7TrVTbNRxP9UaWdG8w9lYk2a9jsZK-KKt_RlY7IX89vx6pZLYVZbe0eTx70Ll_SZ_knbQmDCRQVuBIg5L9PLO_X0l0ysSvnDeTLXjzpaaJ0WnA4VLJuhE2HjjqoSTyVDTElzPv4K-amQejaVNa2iUVl2s0ism_BZwv4u8YfuB9TpmvnwtYcdXGH_YEyiNYxNAu_QWVftlct06lqVIRn2IPl)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee5a10494b644640804bdea236ee34fe&_e=m6yKBz9JYQ2NeZf-PK_pMDjsI-RMTcOfSy_6PUKonuHc9i5KYr7mJpJ7KyPeutGYi2o8tDCqLzMu5B-87WpDgzx2L32QjzudkiFHUsH61jBYm2d-40zPW_FDH49SSjEHXPJ7afOoHQYWSKF-0xs8W7evqJQzlQy81o3U4EVBLNnhgRs08RcGBavLF8s1f4RM3yybZXXibjGJYNxuO6nN9VrxhLu7bO5oLC2GX_qyg7TrVTbNRxP9UaWdG8w9lYk2a9jsZK-KKt_RlY7IX89vx6pZLYVZbe0eTx70Ll_SZ_lB6TzVO47b8I0WwXu-sFqMf8c1DzyhNaPI4QbHIe5yIhtT7xn2hKHyhJWGMphTCsqhrzB4sfxuj5oreZcIY0JYdUikbd4BrjFXSs2jDWwPQ2-duSrHUh9l4acYHV8HFUmH0DVbWq1nsAIV0nxDVaQJ).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: disgraceful. . .
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

_“Folks, I believe that Roe v. Wade got it right.”_

After President Joe Biden kicked off his pro-abortion _State of the Union_ rant last night with that statement, I knew exactly what we were in for.

The President went on to introduce a woman from Texas named Kate Cox, who he attempted to use as a crutch to hold up his radical plans to impose late-term, abortion-on-demand on every state in the nation – _which is actually far worse than Roe ever was._

The President even took a shot at the Supreme Court Justices sitting right in front of him – _though I’m not exactly sure what he said as he butchered the line so poorly._

He then wrapped up his tirade with, _“I promise you; I will restore Roe v. Wade as the law of the land again.”_

The good news is, we were ready with not ONE, but **_TWO_** guests at the _State of the Union_ who helped expose the TRUTH about abortion.

The first was Ryan Bomberger, a powerful pro-life speaker and activist who was conceived in rape but is alive today because his mother courageously chose Life and placed him with a loving, adoptive family.
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sktukuk-duchtdja-y/)
We worked with U.S. Rep. Bob Good (R-VA), one of our strongest allies on Capitol Hill, to bring Ryan along and make the heads of media elites and pro-abortion politicians **EXPLODE!**

After spending **_WEEKS_** on the phone trying to get House Republicans to bring in more pro-life representation, I'm so excited to report to you that Speaker Mike Johnson invited Janet Durig, the director of the Capitol Hill Pregnancy Resource Center, to the _State of the Union._

As you know, Pregnancy Resource Centers are facing attack after attack from pro-abortion thugs like Jane’s Revenge and their puppet politicians like U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren.

Pro-Life Friend, you and I shouldn’t have to pull teeth to get Republicans to stand for Life.

But sadly, that’s the reality of what we have to do these days, as many Republicans would rather avoid the TRUTH about abortion than upset the Abortion Lobby.

No one ever won a fight by surrendering.

And with everything at stake in 2024, you and I need fighters!

The good news, our election year efforts are already working, which I believe will pay even bigger dividends in the fall.

In fact, just three days ago, _Students for Life Action’s_ volunteer canvassers flooded North Carolina before their primary to turn out the pro-life vote!

Leading up to the election, we sent **52,554** text messages, made **25,761** phone calls, and knocked **1,052** doors in key districts!

And because of these efforts, **_FIVE_** new pro-life leaders won their primaries in the Tarheel State, including one who defeated an incumbent Republican who refused to stand for Life by only **171** votes!

The fact is, every door knocked, every phone call made, every text sent, and every vote cast matters, Pro-Life Friend.

“Small” victories like I just told you about in North Carolina are the building blocks that are going to grow into even bigger ones as 2024 progresses.

Our next stops are Indiana and South Carolina on **April 6th,** where we’ll be flooding those states with canvassers just like we did in North Carolina!

But while all of this is necessary work, it isn’t easy.

I know it would mean the world to our canvassers if – _after doing everything they can to make an impact for Life_ – you and I do as much as we can for them.

**[So, can I count on you to make your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ to help me equip our dedicated canvassers with the tools they’ll need to succeed](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sktukuk-duchtdja-j/)?**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

Wade got it right.” After President Joe Biden kicked off his pro-abortion State of the Union rant last night with that statement, I knew exactly what we were in for. The President went on to introduce a woman from Texas named Kate Cox, who he attempted to use as a crutch to hold up his radical plans to impose late-term, abortion-on-demand on every state in the nation – which is actually far worse than Roe ever was. The President even took a shot at the Supreme Court Justices sitting right in front of him – though I’m not exactly sure what he said as he butchered the line so poorly. He then wrapped up his tirade with, “I promise you; I will restore Roe v. Wade as the law of the land again.” The good news is, we were ready with not ONE, but TWO guests at the State of the Union who helped expose the TRUTH about abortion. The first was Ryan Bomberger, a powerful pro-life speaker and activist who was conceived in rape but is alive today because his mother courageously chose Life and placed him with a loving, adoptive family. We worked with U.S. Rep. Bob Good (R-VA), one of our strongest allies on Capitol Hill, to bring Ryan along and make the heads of media elites and pro-abortion politicians EXPLODE! After spending WEEKS on the phone trying to get House Republicans to bring in more pro-life representation, I'm so excited to report to you that Speaker Mike Johnson invited Janet Durig, the director of the Capitol Hill Pregnancy Resource Center, to the State of the Union. As you know, Pregnancy Resource Centers are facing attack after attack from pro-abortion thugs like Jane’s Revenge and their puppet politicians like U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren. name: Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
subject: The nightmare of gerrymandering is over. Fair maps are here. WOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Republicans rigged the state. But democracy is back.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14825f8d-8d36-44be-ab82-4883c3df595f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. The long, dark night of ultra-partisan gerrymandering is over, and a new day for democracy now dawns in the Badger State. Recently, a new set of state legislative maps were signed into law for Wisconsin. These maps are graded “A” for fairness by the head of the nonpartisan Princeton Gerrymandering Project. The current maps scored an F. With the stroke of a pen, Wisconsin went from a “democracy desert” to, well, a democracy. This was all possible because of you. [I’m going to ask you to split a $10 donation between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29978890-f8e1-4573-b09b-bcf67e34b3e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but I want to tell you how we got here: Wisconsin’s gerrymandering crisis began in 2011, when Republican lawmakers drew legislative lines that guaranteed even landslide election losses wouldn’t cost them their majorities. The result was one of the most egregious, extreme partisan gerrymanders in American political history. In 2012 and 2018, Wisconsin voters overwhelmingly voted for Democratic majorities in the legislature but Republicans won huge majorities of the seats. In 2020 and 2022, Democrats won major statewide victories, but Republicans won near-supermajorities. All the while, Republican politicians in Wisconsin have used their power to restrict access to the ballot, remove authorities that voters had entrusted to statewide elected officials like the Governor and Attorney General, and smash the freedoms of workers to organize and advocate for themselves. For thirteen years, the democracy-proof legislature has been laying siege to democracy itself. But those statewide victories added up. In 2018, 2020, and 2023, voters built a new progressive majority on the State Supreme Court. By electing Governor Evers and preventing GOP supermajorities, they stopped hard-right maps from being signed into law. And last year, a civic uprising prevented Republicans from impeaching Janet Protasiewicz. In December, the Supreme Court ruled that Wisconsin’s legislative maps were unconstitutional. This wasn’t easy. This team had to knock on doors, call phones, chip in, share our views with friends and online—year after year, election after election, never giving up even when it felt like all was lost. But we did it. Today, the work doesn’t end. The candidate recruitment process now goes into overdrive. And at the same time, we remain vigilant in case Republican politicians in Madison and their allies once again, through the courts or any other strategy, attempt to thwart majority rule. Today, we commit to doing the work, ending the malign speakership of Robin Vos, breaking the GOP supermajority in the State Senate, and paving the way towards a Democratic state Senate majority in 2026. I’d be remiss if I didn’t ask. The number of competitive legislative seats will triple so we’ll need triple the support, Peter. [Can you chip in a $10 split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action to help us organize voters in every corner of Wisconsin where Democrats have the chance to win?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26e09b5a-e52e-4b94-b756-d7c613b91481/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97de6748-c21b-4afd-bba1-c35da31382dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | This is a story with millions of heroes. Supporters like you and Blue Amp Action are some of them. From all of us at the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, please know you have our boundless gratitude. In solidarity, Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T564925bd-815a-4571-bfef-3dcf407cd77e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

| | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.

| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ac46c34582340e28d66a6ef8740b391&_e=3yZd3MJhcKcdQ9qfsd1DZjzFSe6f-r3m_brdcWVbJDhbioFJHLTXxYRIh56mE2SUqo7QjLzINmUBHjZHGxHFwHBhIJXfSuzXXiVztEfHopHfmMakxRnIrvhQ55aG9bSH6RcSTDT6cBq3qkQR9IndW6grm2d4h0D3ryZ_G-1QTABvzCDO0G_s4oG76a1omkvKM4-ULr57UzY5J6jMrRvir6-5tm8WcP6uKSn_pWyXy0W_n5caSa15YZGfr_zWihR7lDNawLesx9LxlmFNQWclNeXARH_kSD2FH7mtQX43W5FiEcbbBQ2P-_R5sSIR2UNWOLYM0mncW0Ci_LB398o2kvzSs7QDfU0kO5V4klra5dVtfR2rbQ_g1EEsh58SUEo0dboQsvsQ-LyDR-8qWYfFGQ%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ac46c34582340e28d66a6ef8740b391&_e=3yZd3MJhcKcdQ9qfsd1DZjzFSe6f-r3m_brdcWVbJDhbioFJHLTXxYRIh56mE2SUqo7QjLzINmUBHjZHGxHFwHBhIJXfSuzXXiVztEfHopHfmMakxRnIrvhQ55aG9bSH6RcSTDT6cBq3qkQR9IndW6grm2d4h0D3ryZ_G-1QTABvzCDO0G_s4oG76a1omkvKM4-ULr57UzY5J6jMrRvir6-5tm8WcP6uKSn_pWyXy0UrAGicExu4dfSabFhy18LDBwLScOHCE-8UGGsTG73eGp-WpzGmutsroaTST7DG8ucaNjJuz3BAYWhTsYr_OiaYn7uITQh3sCy1pZdUIOU3ULiDCer_6WXKxgpFAwtY0f-lKIaR8R1NP8Yo_3ChVvW08_7gsvFMno5RCuZNT9_oGQ%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. clean_body: If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eb789b2575948549959866624603e6d&_e=grE4RvgNrESajc_IxsEK-7jF9K0eL9BXOmebKSjoYxGDJPWDEEJLb-v49Mr9kGn3fOmHlxV-tbqZ_V-26qBxyan1lc6whVVAu7LnV5N5G5gw6yrsy61ig1QKPhTz8quY54V4qmjnG6rkIDCu0vaGrsQi7UYiwnhmuIa_EWsSKgTmoR-2WhykdSKNK7D-e-jA1ShLhyRxUiKaurKK15IB8MJB9H7e9NUlDyXv_GkzPTxfP6bK-cOjTe7wCjsJ6K63gGgCmfr7S_smaTimtMCVCLNKXMkqPCwTz09jX9QDwwkJw2ZOwN0-FPyRfYQxF8fmpbs2Z4PdHxFNL7UgUJUdLTdYgiWq1ebnr3zMdsloSFIh7oPHTvF3zAr6XdWXkda18DFOp3Z4vwCHgCXlxuDkOMeZhrII9ZRxVPNTez2AQEFYK1BQrS9-Fb8UtnFpbt5-)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eb789b2575948549959866624603e6d&_e=grE4RvgNrESajc_IxsEK-7jF9K0eL9BXOmebKSjoYxGDJPWDEEJLb-v49Mr9kGn3fOmHlxV-tbqZ_V-26qBxyan1lc6whVVAu7LnV5N5G5gw6yrsy61ig1QKPhTz8quY54V4qmjnG6rkIDCu0vaGrsQi7UYiwnhmuIa_EWsSKgTmoR-2WhykdSKNK7D-e-jA1ShLhyRxUiKaurKK15IB8MJB9H7e9NUlDyXv_GkzPTxfP6bK-cOjTe7wCjsJ6K63gGgCmfr7S_smaTimtMCVCLNKXMkqPCwTz09jX9QDwwkimp1SjZtQzWOVayFHLVGkFo1kSN0CPuWo05-ixrV_PsvT3hbj31Ze9-Z_udQZ9BHLmiIOgcSoF9plFZNwGWz_NN2cHqznMxjICKpBtzkhaEpimU8xV7UvmYTlG_PEdE_PktNNxw2hUZlnx-l1dt1L)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eb789b2575948549959866624603e6d&_e=grE4RvgNrESajc_IxsEK-7jF9K0eL9BXOmebKSjoYxGDJPWDEEJLb-v49Mr9kGn3fOmHlxV-tbqZ_V-26qBxyan1lc6whVVAu7LnV5N5G5gw6yrsy61ig1QKPhTz8quY54V4qmjnG6rkIDCu0vaGrsQi7UYiwnhmuIa_EWsSKgTmoR-2WhykdSKNK7D-e-jA1ShLhyRxUiKaurKK15IB8MJB9H7e9NUlDyXv_GkzPTxfP6bK-cOjTe7wCjsJ6K63gGgCmfr7S_smaTimtMCVCLNKXMkqPCwTz09jX9QDwwnUa3KrFzNJtUfsd14blEvzxLxX5WyM3jbTKMtSSucxqvFBK1-EXXFkKMGMGSOdqPbC79_CP03PlnG9YnGSxyluTCq4ktt-qxt2mVRGNA1y8g6pYbc_SOQjXYMdEWdA0TiDw1De5vH6hHCQnzuYgCMJ)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eb789b2575948549959866624603e6d&_e=grE4RvgNrESajc_IxsEK-7jF9K0eL9BXOmebKSjoYxGDJPWDEEJLb-v49Mr9kGn3fOmHlxV-tbqZ_V-26qBxyan1lc6whVVAu7LnV5N5G5gw6yrsy61ig1QKPhTz8quY54V4qmjnG6rkIDCu0vaGrsQi7UYiwnhmuIa_EWsSKgTmoR-2WhykdSKNK7D-e-jA1ShLhyRxUiKaurKK15IB8MJB9H7e9NUlDyXv_GkzPTxfP6bK-cOjTe7wCjsJ6K63gGgCmfr7S_smaTimtMCVCLNKXMkqPCwTz09jX9QDwwlGM7x6zak-wZrJGFc0hykFAG9-DpXcrTnIzHOT5LC2DTUzmbbzxm02AjLfmvqctUpeIZugB2PtaMh8c_05-ySQQ9-gRZANiR_hkj9C6cO8o70ar0AQZb-DEe0ZsUkbNgHHVlLrIbIyPNGsnvIXLfiU).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| |

| | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f2fa692ebad4aceb025db730129ec50&_e=B1B3hV1hd0bIt805mLXOPhsqkuw6XBRugQeSQ78wya1AYoNg-1MAFy4wES_tzTWcyZA8GbTKNf0LNmnvYaTwchaYObnQeVOYZDhPRR_kabgOutGMMSFFYXNX--lJLWOFMNQHfdomCh0WCz92218MvqRTNghOgMMC_4UYQE2uBPJJlawtPhzOv9sTLPWniwj8i61IwY8w_ac91rP-keDRDox8bQfRDrKvU-hIOeh9j0Bh7V06hUICJc2dXB-9Ks-Ee5KGmtbkhCfAnDDbfCwrnhcDVIkDehpMQxlcHyn6Los71dm--1VAYYXf30K5c9_EwSDtXeYCrpfsWzxBhx8SfMe6AynTcubVrqIGIZF49zWj_LEjHnfQGYCLHocV-P7RCjziGCxEKMSoHtZavJoDRA%3D%3D)
---
| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f2fa692ebad4aceb025db730129ec50&_e=B1B3hV1hd0bIt805mLXOPhsqkuw6XBRugQeSQ78wya1AYoNg-1MAFy4wES_tzTWcyZA8GbTKNf0LNmnvYaTwchaYObnQeVOYZDhPRR_kabgOutGMMSFFYXNX--lJLWOFMNQHfdomCh0WCz92218MvqRTNghOgMMC_4UYQE2uBPJJlawtPhzOv9sTLPWniwj8i61IwY8w_ac91rP-keDRDox8bQfRDrKvU-hIOeh9j0BRbGhEz5WpuRkg7NqSuLcqaQCf8OmNJExfqhDKkWhXoTKoO_x4QC1EEbyHUkj3zpIQLo-VRhPxC7Ij8hWH9j5x_FeAa833o9om9rob7C-ij0NekV9ltkqoZf69Qv0K7_5kzjXAEH9v1-OyAZ2Sj8KeFSGZsIQQ41SJ7KansxVDIw%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f2fa692ebad4aceb025db730129ec50&_e=B1B3hV1hd0bIt805mLXOPhsqkuw6XBRugQeSQ78wya1AYoNg-1MAFy4wES_tzTWcyZA8GbTKNf0LNmnvYaTwchaYObnQeVOYZDhPRR_kabgOutGMMSFFYXNX--lJLWOFMNQHfdomCh0WCz92218MvqRTNghOgMMC_4UYQE2uBPJJlawtPhzOv9sTLPWniwj8i61IwY8w_ac91rP-keDRDox8bQfRDrKvU-hIOeh9j0CQoSAnjtt6E6PDpIOcJQDdAN986kdsgu9tA2qtMSPxYKVPOQulYZpc7rTGwS24cNnV5_eUQJRqau1fURkwvz3B86tYre39bvE1e8FjBsL1srlmLFpfrhNkz2CVyMfuA5cCjPtbP4K_z2H307MtB0F5s7xheNy3IP6rX2NlLEABQA%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f2fa692ebad4aceb025db730129ec50&_e=B1B3hV1hd0bIt805mLXOPhsqkuw6XBRugQeSQ78wya1AYoNg-1MAFy4wES_tzTWcyZA8GbTKNf0LNmnvYaTwchaYObnQeVOYZDhPRR_kabgOutGMMSFFYXNX--lJLWOFMNQHfdomCh0WCz92218MvqRTNghOgMMC_4UYQE2uBPJJlawtPhzOv9sTLPWniwj8i61IwY8w_ac91rP-keDRDox8bQfRDrKvU-hIOeh9j0CfQkEm6AwBPoa5V7mVkWP3-XL41OQuBsSAnOC73fpmZj01is7i05IYXdYqHXfoaW0XgFGFzHIu6CdzL9GrAS_QaOTP_xfTD8XM_o2_CeCquFxV6lvGumlpAR_cfBsDvi7BcJrJTnPGC_qgjVn1Tfez8K67NEGPY4irOk_4WA1LkA%3D%3D)

**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjsFuqzAQRb9m2IHsGWNg4UVeENFTpSq7KqvI2CZxgwsxTqP8fUXUdtHl3Hs09-gwj354KKj-AeLZ2wUQgTaAeD3cQ7y9h5dd_rabDvlVvoZybXELiOkxu1_0-0vhgvbjmlZtZhUNlonMKV6xpqmrUjbZWUnLnKFei77nZDmvuaBa1MSpJCLjMq-QoWDEGo6Eggp0pWG1GAZTNs6JGgR77hQ6uOiN5ku66xinKRRmCtmozinNy1OsA-zEnOKFaO0AOzN6cwHqUvz0FqjlVMoKUG66_-16sqYElHoYjsutX4OaWP4jlG8A5S2Fo9Fh1v70AdTu99v8D5RFZee7H0e_yAoEOz1tzRS-AgAA__-H-GiG) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjsFuqzAQRb9m2IHsGWNg4UVeENFTpSq7KqvI2CZxgwsxTqP8fUXUdtHl3Hs09-gwj354KKj-AeLZ2wUQgTaAeD3cQ7y9h5dd_rabDvlVvoZybXELiOkxu1_0-0vhgvbjmlZtZhUNlonMKV6xpqmrUjbZWUnLnKFei77nZDmvuaBa1MSpJCLjMq-QoWDEGo6Eggp0pWG1GAZTNs6JGgR77hQ6uOiN5ku66xinKRRmCtmozinNy1OsA-zEnOKFaO0AOzN6cwHqUvz0FqjlVMoKUG66_-16sqYElHoYjsutX4OaWP4jlG8A5S2Fo9Fh1v70AdTu99v8D5RFZee7H0e_yAoEOz1tzRS-AgAA__-H-GiG) [**People are buying these in 4 packs – Learn More**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjsFuqzAQRb9m2IHsGWNg4UVeENFTpSq7KqvI2CZxgwsxTqP8fUXUdtHl3Hs09-gwj354KKj-AeLZ2wUQgTaAeD3cQ7y9h5dd_rabDvlVvoZybXELiOkxu1_0-0vhgvbjmlZtZhUNlonMKV6xpqmrUjbZWUnLnKFei77nZDmvuaBa1MSpJCLjMq-QoWDEGo6Eggp0pWG1GAZTNs6JGgR77hQ6uOiN5ku66xinKRRmCtmozinNy1OsA-zEnOKFaO0AOzN6cwHqUvz0FqjlVMoKUG66_-16sqYElHoYjsutX4OaWP4jlG8A5S2Fo9Fh1v70AdTu99v8D5RFZee7H0e_yAoEOz1tzRS-AgAA__-H-GiG) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjsFuqzAQRb9m2IHsGWNg4UVeENFTpSq7KqvI2CZxgwsxTqP8fUXUdtHl3Hs09-gwj354KKj-AeLZ2wUQgTaAeD3cQ7y9h5dd_rabDvlVvoZybXELiOkxu1_0-0vhgvbjmlZtZhUNlonMKV6xpqmrUjbZWUnLnKFei77nZDmvuaBa1MSpJCLjMq-QoWDEGo6Eggp0pWG1GAZTNs6JGgR77hQ6uOiN5ku66xinKRRmCtmozinNy1OsA-zEnOKFaO0AOzN6cwHqUvz0FqjlVMoKUG66_-16sqYElHoYjsutX4OaWP4jlG8A5S2Fo9Fh1v70AdTu99v8D5RFZee7H0e_yAoEOz1tzRS-AgAA__-H-GiG) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjsFuqzAQRb9m2IHsGWNg4UVeENFTpSq7KqvI2CZxgwsxTqP8fUXUdtHl3Hs09-gwj354KKj-AeLZ2wUQgTaAeD3cQ7y9h5dd_rabDvlVvoZybXELiOkxu1_0-0vhgvbjmlZtZhUNlonMKV6xpqmrUjbZWUnLnKFei77nZDmvuaBa1MSpJCLjMq-QoWDEGo6Eggp0pWG1GAZTNs6JGgR77hQ6uOiN5ku66xinKRRmCtmozinNy1OsA-zEnOKFaO0AOzN6cwHqUvz0FqjlVMoKUG66_-16sqYElHoYjsutX4OaWP4jlG8A5S2Fo9Fh1v70AdTu99v8D5RFZee7H0e_yAoEOz1tzRS-AgAA__-H-GiG) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---

### **We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot**
**Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.****With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.****The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.****As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.****The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.****Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.****Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality.**
---
### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**

#### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon

**The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!****Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.****This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.****Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.****Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska.**
