#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: How lawmakers could improve the health of our state – update from Mississippi’s conservative voice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571836?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Did you know that Mississippi spends a higher share of our overall wealth on healthcare than almost any other state in America?**

Yet despite this, we still have some of the worst health outcomes in the country.
---
|
---
| **Some believe that the way to improve healthcare is to spend an even larger amount by expanding Medicaid.** Mississippi’s House of Representatives has just voted to do precisely that.

The debate over Medicaid expansion now appears to hinge on whether under the expansion scheme there will be any realistic work requirement. **Critics fear that without a robust requirement for recipients of free health care to be in work, Medicaid expansion could become little more than a something-for-nothing system of soft socialism.**

It remains to be seen if the Senate will support the House’s bill – and if it will do so by a large enough margin to overturn any future gubernatorial veto.
---
|
---
_Tate Reeves latest tweets attacking Medicaid expansion - will he veto any bill?_
| **There is, however, another proposal that has attracted far less attention that really would improve healthcare in our state.**

**Healthcare in Mississippi is deliberately restricted by a set of laws known as Certificate of Need, or CON, laws.** These laws require anyone wanting to expand existing services or offer new services to apply for a Certificate of Need permit. By not issuing permits to new operators, competitors are kept out of the market - which suits the existing providers.

Our recent report on Certificate of Need reform shows how harmful this red tape can be. **If we removed this protectionist red tape, we would get far more bang for our buck, however much the legislature decided to spend on Medicaid.**
---
| Florida, Tennessee and both North & South Carolina have all recently removed their CON laws – and they each have significantly better healthcare as a consequence.

Now there is a chance that Mississippi might do something similar. **Rep Zuber’s excellent bill (HB 419) opens the possibility that some CON rules could be repealed.**

**Of course, now that the bill is before the House, every sort of parasitic vested interest is frantically lobbying to kill the bill.**

Why? CON confers on existing providers a means to legally exclude the competition.

Imagine if the search engine Yahoo! had been able to use CON laws to shut down Google? Or if Friends Reunited could have used CON laws to prevent Facebook? Or if the folk that made DVDs could have used CON to prevent Netflix from taking off? CON laws have been doing precisely this to healthcare in our state.

**CON laws in Mississippi are one of the last vestiges of the good ole boy system that has held Mississippi back.**

Mississippi has a chance to achieve real change. **It would be an extraordinary betrayal of conservative voters in this state if our Republican-controlled legislature managed to expand Obamacare but failed to remove the anticompetitive laws the deny Mississippians access to affordable healthcare.**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f2f90cd136&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=431ec894dc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=431ec894dc).

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I am everywhere
body:
We're watching, listening, and recording in their government offices. We are their dinner dates, smiling and nodding as they give up their secrets. | | | If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Funsubscribe%2FwJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FUaeZ6gHtt2892ChBN892OBku4w/1/0100018e2342ee41-8f8672e8-d587-4031-900a-fcbd81972272-000000/BTPa68CTEnr68at3T9__BlnyM7A=364)** to be removed.

Please read the message below from our sponsor, O'Keefe Media Group (OMG)..
We encourage you to [**visit their site today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FyX8922Hp9j0gsCaCG32763IyHg%2FUaeZ6gHtt2892ChBN892OBku4w/2/0100018e2342ee41-8f8672e8-d587-4031-900a-fcbd81972272-000000/Q24PTZGg402YUnfOXfetiZwaLuw=364).

| | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FyX8922Hp9j0gsCaCG32763IyHg%2FUaeZ6gHtt2892ChBN892OBku4w/3/0100018e2342ee41-8f8672e8-d587-4031-900a-fcbd81972272-000000/d3WnLbF2B_i7zKfHKysMWA8klJc=364)

Dear Friend,
[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FyX8922Hp9j0gsCaCG32763IyHg%2FUaeZ6gHtt2892ChBN892OBku4w/4/0100018e2342ee41-8f8672e8-d587-4031-900a-fcbd81972272-000000/9lGKNsk7qMtVd5ofITS_0oyCTDY=364)
In Orwell's book _1984_ , "Big Brother" had "telescreens" watching and listening on every street and living room of the fictional nation, Oceania.

Published in 1949, Orwell's nightmare totalitarian state only took a few decades to become true here in America.

We are watched and spied on while cameras follow us constantly. But it's not just our governments doing the monitoring. Big Tech corporations have us trapped in a digital loop where privacy doesn't exist.

But now, the tables have turned, not through technology or massive surveillance sweeps, but through OMG's network of undercover citizen journalists.

**OMG is EVERYWHERE and EVERYONE.**

We are in their board rooms, on their school boards, and lurking in their Zoom meetings. We are the employees who have had enough. We are their students and in their classrooms.

We're watching, listening, and recording in their government offices.

We are their dinner dates, smiling and nodding as they give up their secrets.

We're their friendly spotter at the gym with a gift for gab.

While they are powered by algorithms and broad data captures, we are the humans getting to the truth with good old intellect and cunning.

We are the million-eyed monster that feeds on truth.

And you? What is your role in reversing the power dynamic in America?

You make it all possible through your support, and **[I ask that you back OMG today](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FyX8922Hp9j0gsCaCG32763IyHg%2FUaeZ6gHtt2892ChBN892OBku4w/5/0100018e2342ee41-8f8672e8-d587-4031-900a-fcbd81972272-000000/Wk10G91MvyJk-GxxV3G9XhIDats=364).**

Right now, YOU pay governments and corporations to monitor you and your family's every move.

Let that sink in. YOU pay THEM to spy on all of us.

Shouldn't you have a right to know what goes on behind their closed doors?

OMG is making that possible, and I'm asking you to invest in us **to keep watching the watchers.**

I'm expanding our network of citizen journalists at a pace that trumps the growth of any newsroom in history. My small staff must keep up with the content coming our way and sort through hundreds of whistleblower tips daily.

**[Please help us grow to bring more truth to light.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FyX8922Hp9j0gsCaCG32763IyHg%2FUaeZ6gHtt2892ChBN892OBku4w/6/0100018e2342ee41-8f8672e8-d587-4031-900a-fcbd81972272-000000/3sSlWsR2aiLpC1NFJARVIa-RgeQ=364)**

I have another $12,840 to raise by Sunday to meet our growing costs and expenses. Travel, payroll, equipment, and endless hours of editing come at a significant cost.

**I 'm relying on you to help keep us going and to help us grow.**

**[Please chip in today to help meet this goal.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FyX8922Hp9j0gsCaCG32763IyHg%2FUaeZ6gHtt2892ChBN892OBku4w/7/0100018e2342ee41-8f8672e8-d587-4031-900a-fcbd81972272-000000/CHmzdqpF9Nq9Xxi19z6tZSTBuXA=364)**

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=325498c459654d2eb60a0066c973957a&_e=sBuqioMpB67YQD_XCPbA-V5rUAvgrI_SPWycoLYzgStABTA_mc1wuOsPc7fAN2FgNwXCRWknGBtnUTBVNjnrP_g59ihxuLINThc_E-gZ7JKGIn28SFAoUSzmCgigKTf3wOmauWMUOguQztvp73KtPLR9nhzeQrLKVmlVB90ph_ga92Lcpj8ntj0Md9tiInvaMO3ox_tUdUT1Lnqs01bqmumntagM3-kF7g1O8fzlVOXb071-ayt5Hb4Eli7UPKPAiriTn9fz7yVQRM2JzHs0ub0kbEZq9E62ZgYLwIdAIe9L4Wi0OEX7n_7fHLy5RjXB4BxDP4S9H6N2OxGEgop4q1YjlDhGlaL_dZYxxMIkLl2SXs6UlR0-77t93bWeMPhaXKWXcyZu0rQbREuBmrcEPw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Officer of the Year
body:
I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

Dear friend,

I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

This is a picture of Terence and me at a dinner celebrating his graduation from the Police Academy.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2392122859114c4f9d079ba2b8e62726&_e=rU_3dklazWm6R00PZwuCy_H1DaYWBgCIIpcnL4Fbl2mu5CzVjRNDVlSaq_Ehd_lkpsH2hjzWhjqqXbonuGx7G4LSQPgGt_5saqNYwaflKSUyw7d-zgaNXFhL_zn53OZOfj4aGDP2p_8RYgrFkqfN6nQqQQBe6FDWBcS0Eh26-hcE0qfs-n9wD8kpJ6I-wftT0ZRS6QeGGtRN0PC615wUltH2JRLVuHURp20Z1SjolNhQqdaRgdW4JGNMOrDwJgctPQQTV2XJIdWkfz5YLBW25YnSc-qYAMdK0cncmfQTEGlA7aT_Dnw8lHh-3BOvsE12_5JW1H1Fgy4590yEWrH0xcVfNjLu85jiI-Yz9_qFFDc%3D)
I was so proud that night. But I was also terrified.

Terence was going to be patrolling the streets of Washington, DC, where crime is sky-high and politicians side with criminals over cops. But never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **- murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch.**

The story is so shocking that if it didn't happen to my son, _I wouldn 't even believe it._ **[And I'm praying you will help me save my son](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2392122859114c4f9d079ba2b8e62726&_e=rU_3dklazWm6R00PZwuCy_H1DaYWBgCIIpcnL4Fbl2mu5CzVjRNDVlSaq_Ehd_lkpsH2hjzWhjqqXbonuGx7G4LSQPgGt_5saqNYwaflKSUyw7d-zgaNXFhL_zn53OZOfj4aGDP2p_8RYgrFkqfN6nQqQQBe6FDWBcS0Eh26-hcE0qfs-n9wD8kpJ6I-wftT0ZRS6QeGGtRN0PC615wUlgKjfDMmrHkvF3P2ihBwUWV_dz0Hna_9U5CFMvNeIkLlSuDJnfJoFqeSA7FSOOxMn5tsKMTZN6H9pmOAYjLSVnuA0xkVbrWToGj2lk6UP-wTP9dZD8OdNQyIasQst6s96jWbvTv7_uL01sWzXo3gQ94%3D)** - **but first, let me explain what happened.**

Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long - including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he had been seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

So when Terence saw him illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull Karon over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

And then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death.

The pressure campaign worked, and prosecutors charged my son with _**Second-Degree Murder.**_

When Terence called to tell me about the charges, I was in disbelief. Any sane person could see that Karon's death, while tragic, was no one's fault but his own.

_He_ chose to run from the cops.

_He_ chose to not wear a helmet.

_He_ chose to speed through that alley without looking where he was going.

So, when I learned that Terence could be sentenced to **_sixty_ _years_** in prison for Karon's death, my head started spinning. And it only got worse when the trial began.

You see, the judge refused to allow Terence's legal team to present all of the facts in his defense.

The jury never got to hear that Karon was a known member of a violent gang...

They never got to hear that he was wearing an ankle monitor because of a violent assault he had committed just weeks before...

They never got to hear that he had drugs and thousands of dollars in cash strapped to his leg...

And they never got to hear about the drugs in Karon's system at the time of the crash.

Sitting in the courtroom, I couldn't believe my ears when the jury filed out and declared Terence _**" guilty."**_

He's currently awaiting sentencing.

Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them.

He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

And at the same time the bleeding-heart DC politicians are letting shoplifters, carjackers, and drug dealers walk away scot-free...

...they're trying to put my son - a decorated officer who has received 60 awards and commendations - away for 60 years for something he _didn 't_ _do._

I had almost lost hope, but then we learned about the **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** -or LELDF for short.

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments. And when I got the call from their president, Jason Johnson, I was at my lowest moment.

Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Terence.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone:

**[Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2392122859114c4f9d079ba2b8e62726&_e=rU_3dklazWm6R00PZwuCy_H1DaYWBgCIIpcnL4Fbl2mu5CzVjRNDVlSaq_Ehd_lkpsH2hjzWhjqqXbonuGx7G4LSQPgGt_5saqNYwaflKSUyw7d-zgaNXFhL_zn53OZOfj4aGDP2p_8RYgrFkqfN6nQqQQBe6FDWBcS0Eh26-hcE0qfs-n9wD8kpJ6I-wftT0ZRS6QeGGtRN0PC615wUlsBOfStRrid0kSyWkg0tMtya_Wp749_t4LiypzeH6nA9gC8OIhTBcCZ2I6Ic-t5Za3r-2GXWabFv8Y-AudePv1LELFSMUSEB1UQLrStwSnC4iH_v9UBbL43InE4XmxaDk_wnSwRjM7NHlm_fBvMZUkY%3D)**

To fund his defense, Terence had to sell his home, his car, his beloved motorcycle, and most of his personal belongings. Everything he owns now fits in just nine small boxes. He has almost nothing left.

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. And it makes me cry when I think of how he would feel about what Terence is being put through right now.

I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

**[So if you are at all able, would you consider following this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2392122859114c4f9d079ba2b8e62726&_e=rU_3dklazWm6R00PZwuCy_H1DaYWBgCIIpcnL4Fbl2mu5CzVjRNDVlSaq_Ehd_lkpsH2hjzWhjqqXbonuGx7G4LSQPgGt_5saqNYwaflKSUyw7d-zgaNXFhL_zn53OZOfj4aGDP2p_8RYgrFkqfN6nQqQQBe6FDWBcS0Eh26-hcE0qfs-n9wD8kpJ6I-wftT0ZRS6QeGGtRN0PC615wUlk6unOK-lTUAWZOouh4F5LSZRWzt0ZdA_RDZy9yC4J-OkxA0hUWOTl0MLEOwn2g-2nggmTzr8My5kB5-PBZSHW4GYEMlv7DKFzq-hvaU5kja5lGqeslztHAZNfqqAPuArGo7o77i3fRvbmFvKoLfjRU%3D)**

**Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Terence's team is currently looking at every available option to keep his case alive.

**[And you and your $35 contribution could make the difference in Terence being acquitted or spending the next 60 years behind bars.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2392122859114c4f9d079ba2b8e62726&_e=rU_3dklazWm6R00PZwuCy_H1DaYWBgCIIpcnL4Fbl2mu5CzVjRNDVlSaq_Ehd_lkpsH2hjzWhjqqXbonuGx7G4LSQPgGt_5saqNYwaflKSUyw7d-zgaNXFhL_zn53OZOfj4aGDP2p_8RYgrFkqfN6nQqQQBe6FDWBcS0Eh26-hcE0qfs-n9wD8kpJ6I-wftT0ZRS6QeGGtRN0PC615wUlmRAKnWb3UjLU4USxaR2Apkpn65gMWK8IR30ptJrAK8jg1wsg9ryFlaReoFc4zSp4c1kA8ftUV4TcQwk0irO0tnkyJhyV1b_kCR_vPLr9Cf7QaTb_mYcx2gwMWOl0RwRZrk8EWn1x5k9rZdpu0yUIoM%3D)**

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help all the wrongly-accused officers LELDF is working with. Like Terence.

Sincerely,

Patti Reilly

P.S. I know a few kind words from someone like you will help lift Terence's spirits. This guilty verdict has been so devastating for him. **[So if you choose to make a $35 gift to LELDF, would you also please include a little note-maybe a prayer?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2392122859114c4f9d079ba2b8e62726&_e=rU_3dklazWm6R00PZwuCy_H1DaYWBgCIIpcnL4Fbl2mu5CzVjRNDVlSaq_Ehd_lkpsH2hjzWhjqqXbonuGx7G4LSQPgGt_5saqNYwaflKSUyw7d-zgaNXFhL_zn53OZOfj4aGDP2p_8RYgrFkqfN6nQqQQBe6FDWBcS0Eh26-hcE0qfs-n9wD8kpJ6I-wftT0ZRS6QeGGtRN0PC615wUlkZKkTddJpu-Lr_vnaCsZsl-AWRdkn11GtDqHjn7chefj67Se3mf-7ABS-FBJ-mY9y4QmmDCpt_fdyViYRVoHriipcm1xEJkKChLJzBEpyC_iFmbsinLLjFlBiNsnY5-IKXtrl1FOHww7bHpHA8t3RE%3D)** There's a field on the page for you to do this. Thank you -from the bottom of my heart.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2392122859114c4f9d079ba2b8e62726&_e=rU_3dklazWm6R00PZwuCywC1_Fz0z6A7TQLoFeSwx15A8d4DaDoWHq4EOxMTv0XSNvzSYoq6SM1K-b2PK72tzcZ4uH7F8Xl-7FERQkB0PaT6GFWnEN86V9_L1peqaxAMwTAR0ER6cLhh2dAWE8T7YUvaZfmfw1ft9EepXBCYJ-GRdoOlvMhpIHr7XdixvwWXjRvIHY4ABX4Mqe8QOXOY9w%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

clean_body: I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton. Dear friend, I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton. This is a picture of Terence and me at a dinner celebrating his graduation from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. But I was also terrified. Terence was going to be patrolling the streets of Washington, DC, where crime is sky-high and politicians side with criminals over cops. But never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder - murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch. The story is so shocking that if it didn't happen to my son, I wouldn 't even believe it. - but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long - including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he had been seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. So when Terence saw him illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull Karon over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. And then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death. The pressure campaign worked, and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. When Terence called to tell me about the charges, I was in disbelief. Any sane person could see that Karon's death, while tragic, was no one's fault but his own. He chose to run from the cops. He chose to not wear a helmet. He chose to speed through that alley without looking where he was going. So, when I learned that Terence could be sentenced to sixty years in prison for Karon's death, my head started spinning. And it only got worse when the trial began. You see, the judge refused to allow Terence's legal team to present all of the facts in his defense. The jury never got to hear that Karon was a known member of a violent gang... They never got to hear that he was wearing an ankle monitor because of a violent assault he had committed just weeks before... They never got to hear that he had drugs and thousands of dollars in cash strapped to his leg... And they never got to hear about the drugs in Karon's system at the time of the crash. Sitting in the courtroom, I couldn't believe my ears when the jury filed out and declared Terence " guilty." He's currently awaiting sentencing. Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! And at the same time the bleeding-heart DC politicians are letting shoplifters, carjackers, and drug dealers walk away scot-free... ...they're trying to put my son - a decorated officer who has received 60 awards and commendations - away for 60 years for something he didn 't do. I had almost lost hope, but then we learned about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund -or LELDF for short. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments. And when I got the call from their president, Jason Johnson, I was at my lowest moment. Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Terence. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone: To fund his defense, Terence had to sell his home, his car, his beloved motorcycle, and most of his personal belongings. Everything he owns now fits in just nine small boxes. He has almost nothing left. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. And it makes me cry when I think of how he would feel about what Terence is being put through right now. I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Terence's team is currently looking at every available option to keep his case alive. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help all the wrongly-accused officers LELDF is working with. Like Terence. Sincerely, Patti Reilly P.S. I know a few kind words from someone like you will help lift Terence's spirits. This guilty verdict has been so devastating for him. There's a field on the page for you to do this. Thank you -from the bottom of my heart. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Elissa Slotkin & Ruben Gallego
subject: Back and Forth...
body:
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hi, Elissa Slotkin hereElissa Slotkin
And I’m Ruben Gallego.Ruben Gallego |
| I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Michigan.Elissa Slotkin
And me in Arizona.Ruben Gallego |
| Both races we need to win in order for Democrats to keep the Senate.Elissa Slotkin
Both states Democrats need to win in order to defeat Donald Trump.Ruben Gallego |
| Swing states.Elissa Slotkin
With polls showing incredibly close races.Ruben Gallego |
| And our races have one more thing in common.Elissa Slotkin
Republicans also know how important they are -- and that is why they are going to spend ridiculous sums of money to defeat us.Ruben Gallego |
| That's why we're coming to you today. To ask for help.Elissa Slotkin
Because neither of us will be able to win our races by ourselves.Ruben Gallego |
| [Can you please use this link to split an $5 contribution to our campaigns for U.S. Senate? Do it before our FEC deadlines end and we're legally required to report our fundraising numbers for all to see. ](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-slotkin.iB5u51&refcode=em240309-1-160&t=1&akid=2048%2E734936%2EhO8YSR)Elissa Slotkin
If everyone reading this chipped in even just a few bucks we'd each have the resources we need to win our races.Ruben Gallego |
| But not everyone does.Elissa Slotkin
So we're counting on those who understand how important these two seats are to help out today. Ruben Gallego | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-slotkin.iB5u51&refcode=em240309-1-160&t=2&akid=2048%2E734936%2EhO8YSR)
* * *
Thanks for helping us keep the Senate BLUE in 2024! – Elissa Slotkin & Ruben Gallego –

With more than 18 years of chumming it up with Washington Elite under his belt, it’s no wonder that the most powerful Democrats in the country are rushing to spend as much money as possible to secure a fourth Senate term for Jon Tester. Whether it’s the 25 million dollars Tester raised in 2023 or the 44.9 million dollars his friends in DC have earmarked to spend on TV ADS in Montana this fall, one thing is sure: Democrats know that I am the one who has what it takes to beat Jon Tester. Navy SEALS fight to win. We don’t quit, and we don’t lose. And Jon Tester is ripe for defeat. If Democrats didn’t invest another penny into Montana, which I assure you won’t be the case, the amount of money they’ve already invested would be akin to spending roughly more than $166,000 against me PER DAY. We can’t compete with them right now on the money front, but polls show that I CAN win in November. So today, Can I count on you to I need to step up and help me fill my March donor fund? When you read newspaper headlines in Montana and the national press, it’s clear that this race - and this state - will be the center of the political universe for the next eight months. The amount of money Democrats have reserved to spend in Montana should tell you all you need to know about what’s at stake in this race. Let’s get this done. clean_body: We just launched our first ad going after Tammy Baldwin and Joe Biden, and we didn’t hold back! | | Fellow Conservative, We just launched our first ad going after Tammy Baldwin and Joe Biden, and we didn’t hold back! Voters struggling under the weight of Biden’s agenda need to know my opponent said Biden will be remembered "as one of the most 'accomplished' and 'transformational' presidents in U.S. history." Tammy Baldwin is just another career politician who will bob her head up and down to everything Biden does, | Schumer, Biden, and Baldwin have already spent $2 MILLION in attacking me and driving up the costs for running ads in Wisconsin in a desperate attempt to lock us out. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others. When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin

Peter,
While pundits discussed ho-hum outcome of Democrat and Republican Primaries on Super Tuesday, the Kennedy for President campaign had an incredible Tuesday that flew under the radar:
_WE'RE ON THE BALLOT IN OUR FIRST SWING STATE:_ NEVADA!
We collected enough signatures for ballot access in Nevada, over 15,000 signatures.
This is our fourth state, and we're beating our benchmarks in all of the other states.
We are confident that at this rate, __we will be on the ballot nationwide to win the election and take our country back_!_
In addition to the four states, the press is reporting that a pro-RFK, Jr. SuperPAC has gathered enough signatures in Arizona, Georgia and South Carolina for RFK, Jr. to appear on the ballot.
__While we cannot and do not work directly or indirectly with any political action committee by law or otherwise__ , if the press accounts are accurate, then our campaign for ballot access is gaining even more momentum than we realize.
The good news is your contributions are making a huge difference and we're seeing it even when the media and our opponents miss it.

Friends –

If you have been waiting for the perfect time to make a donation to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate, we are here to tell you TODAY is the day.
Earlier this week, Kyrsten Sinema declared she was NOT going to run for reelection. That means it's officially Ruben vs. Kari Lake.

And that's why we're asking you to donate $5 to our campaign today.

$5 to keep Kari Lake out of the Senate.

$5 to elect Ruben Gallego, who will vote to bypass the filibuster to protect abortion access, expand voting rights, and more.

$5 because Ruben Gallego can't win this race without you.
We know $5 may not feel like it can win this race alone. But by the time you read this, lots and lots of people who want to keep Kari Lake out of the Senate will have already donated $5 to Ruben today.

Now, they're hoping you'll do the same.

Our strategy for success is working — and now, it’s our responsibility to keep building our movement. We won’t stop our work for fair maps until we have a fully representative democracy. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Bills should get an up-or-down vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1207%2E135344%2EI9Ede7)

Gun violence prevention. Voting rights. Federal abortion protections.
Most of the issues that Americans care about, can’t even get an up or down vote in the United States Senate.
And there’s one big reason why: the filibuster. This is a rule that requires 60 Senators to agree before any bill can even come to the floor for an up-or-down vote.
Here’s what I told voters in Macomb County about this topic:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2430?t=2&akid=1207%2E135344%2EI9Ede7)
When popular legislation can’t even get an up-or-down vote on the floor of the Senate and when Senators don’t have to go on record on these important issues, we’ve got a real problem. That’s why I’m loud and proud about reforming the filibuster.
But none of that will matter if Republicans control the Senate.
The path to filibuster reform and a Democratic Senate (not to mention the White House) all run through Michigan. [**Your contribution today helps us get one step closer to maintaining control of the Senate, reforming the filibuster, and delivering for Michiganders.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240309-1-700&t=3&akid=1207%2E135344%2EI9Ede7)**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: UPDATE Leftwing Protesters Outside My House (again)!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
This sick and dangerous...

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._j5p7S9Iew)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, UPDATE *** I’m furious. For the third week in a row now, far-left agitators have come to my house early in the morning chanting hateful slogans, ringing bells, screaming and hollering. They claim to be protesting the military operations in Gaza, _but their real goal is to wake up my neighbors, harass my family, and attempt to intimidate me_ _because I am a conservative Republican and a threat to the far-left network working to transform our country. _ **Again - I won’t be intimidated by these leftist malcontents and their liberal paymasters. But I need your help to stand strong and fight back. Will you chip in right now to let me and my family know you’re with us?** You can use this secure link to contribute:**[https://secure.winred.com/ted-cruz/protesters-at-home-again-donate-now](http://trk.tedcruz.-7CA5nAiYQs4M6LazQ)** Sadly, this is now common in American politics thanks to the far-left non-profits that fund political agitators seemingly everywhere on every issue. We see protesters blocking traffic, interrupting campus speeches, screaming hatred on the streets, and even attempting to vandalize artwork in museums. _Now they’ve come to my home...again and again... _
---
[**DONATE NOW TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.-pGaA)
---
_**Why is this happening**_**?** Because radical leftists refuse to tolerate any dissent. They have always used physical violence and intimidation to put pressure on their political opponents. Now that the far left has infiltrated the Democrat Party, these hateful tactics are going mainstream. But I won’t back down for one second, Fellow Conservative. **I’ll stand strong for Israel, Texas, and the United States of America – always. ** When I look outside my window at the screaming mob, I only grow more resolved and committed to fighting for what’s right. **[**Please stand with me today and make a generous donation >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)** Thanks in advance for your help. Patriots like you are the reason we’re going to defeat the far-left radicals and save America in November!
For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Katherine Clark
subject: Electing Democratic women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80616103/459903184/886541867?refcode=EM_F_240309split_N_KC_90DO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQzY2Y3ZC0yMWRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qxsj01Cpt1fdDEAIGIuRpsnJOEcEvJneUbBmdi3dKq0=) Happy Women’s History Month, Peter!

My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

It wasn’t too long ago when there were hardly any women serving in Congress at all. When I first came to Congress in 2013, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse (multiple times), making it difficult to even get into the Chamber to cast a vote.

Fast forward to today, and thankfully, things have improved. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!**

But our work is far from over. This election, there’s so much at stake for women. While House Democrats continue to fight for reproductive freedom, Donald Trump brags about overturning _Roe_ and has promised to lead the charge to ban abortion nationwide.

We cannot afford to let their extreme MAGA agenda win — for our freedoms, our families, or our futures.

[**That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. We need to keep strong women in Congress, and I’m asking you to support that effort by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Shontel Brown’s reelection so we can keep fighting for women.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80616105/459903186/886541867?refcode=EM_F_240309split_N_KC_90DO_8_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQzY2Y3ZC0yMWRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qxsj01Cpt1fdDEAIGIuRpsnJOEcEvJneUbBmdi3dKq0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed and will be automatically split between Shontel Brown and Katherine Clark immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80616107/459903188/886541867?refcode=EM_F_240309split_N_KC_90DO_8_G_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQzY2Y3ZC0yMWRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qxsj01Cpt1fdDEAIGIuRpsnJOEcEvJneUbBmdi3dKq0=)**

clean_body: = Happy Women’s History Month, Peter! My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip. It wasn’t too long ago when there were hardly any women serving in Congress at all. When I first came to Congress in 2013, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse (multiple times), making it difficult to even get into the Chamber to cast a vote. Fast forward to today, and thankfully, things have improved. There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone! But our work is far from over. This election, there’s so much at stake for women. While House Democrats continue to fight for reproductive freedom, Donald Trump brags about overturning Roe and has promised to lead the charge to ban abortion nationwide. We cannot afford to let their extreme MAGA agenda win — for our freedoms, our families, or our futures. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed and will be automatically split between Shontel Brown and Katherine Clark immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you for your support, Peter! I hope you take some time this month to reflect on our achievements, celebrate the women in your life, and recommit to building a stronger, more inclusive America. All my best, — Katherine Representative Katherine Clark Massachusetts 5th Congressional District Democratic Whip Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| **Republicans Ramp Up Attacks on USPS, Vote-by-Mail Ahead of 2024 Election** Vote-by-mail has expanded voting rights access to millions of people — and played a HUGE part in President Biden’s 2020 victory.

**But Republicans are already seeking their revenge... They would love nothing more than to DESTROY the Postal Service entirely!**

**And with Donald Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy still calling the shots,_they could get away with it!_** [**_So we need to know where you stand immediately:_

subject: We need you now more than ever!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
what you missed:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20945%2E4449941%2Er40FfF)
---
| _**WE TOLD YOU**_ our account for our Abolish the Electoral College Ad Campaign was _bone-dry..._

_**WE TOLD YOU**_ experts are predicting that the Electoral College will hand Trump the presidency again – without winning the popular vote!

_**AND WE TOLD YOU**_ that Democrats like Jamie Raskin, Pete Buttigieg, and Adam Schiff are warning us that the Electoral College hurts our democracy! But you must have missed our messages, because you didn’t step up and **we MISSED our goal to relaunch our Abolish the Electoral College Ads.** | [BUT OUR FINANCE TEAM IS EXTENDING OUR DEADLINE ONE LAST TIME – UNTIL MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. WITH JUST $1,047 LEFT TO RAISE, WE’RE COUNTING ON YOUR $7 (_3X-MATCHED_) DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/39058?t=7&akid=20945%2E4449941%2Er40FfF)
---
Trump is THRILLED to see efforts to abolish the Electoral College get thwarted – he knows the Electoral College is his one-way ticket back to the White House!

**We need you now more than ever** – our very democracy is at stake with Trump so close to another win against the will of the American people.

**We’re practically begging:** [**Chip in $7 before our extended deadline passes to fund our Abolish the Electoral College Ad Campaign and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/39058?t=8&akid=20945%2E4449941%2Er40FfF)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Andy Kim
subject: How we’re shaking up the Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80618481/459911075/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQ1ZDM0OC0yNGRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVVqgAIRGQMY1AqOlTnXc2dhksIbUmnzPY_NnRB__A8=&emci=3771f059-18db-ee11-85f9-002248223197&emdi=e4d5d348-24de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=26261389)
---

| | We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. Let me remind you what we're up against: It didn't just start with gold bars. We're living in the greatest period of distrust in government in generations. Senator Menendez's actions were a stark reminder that when we don't have integrity in our politics, it only makes things worse. Since then, we've seen the First Lady use a rigged system to bypass voters and try to use the power of the machine to win this seat. Let me tell you, voters see this, and they don't like it. **I'm running to restore trust in our democracy and our elected officials because if we don't, we could lose this Senate seat.** When control of the Senate Majority is on the line, and Donald Trump is barreling towards the GOP nomination for president, we need a senator who has a strong track record of delivering results for New Jersey in the face of MAGA Republican opposition and one who isn't hand-picked by the "powers-that-be" In New Jersey. Our wins in five county convention votes fueled our momentum in this race, and it's allowing us to mount a more formidable challenge than anyone ever expected. **We're shaking up the race because New Jersey has never seen a grassroots operation like ours fight against the political machine.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80618482/459911076/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-09-change&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e4d5d348-24de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQ1ZDM0OC0yNGRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qVVqgAIRGQMY1AqOlTnXc2dhksIbUmnzPY_NnRB__A8=) The fact is this: We're still up against a lot. That's why my team set an ambitious goal of raising $150,000 before March's end-of-quarter deadline to keep building up our voter turnout operations and make sure our message isn't drowned out by my opponents' big money and the political machine backing her. [**So I'm asking for your support today. clean_body: We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. | | | | We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. Let me remind you what we're up against: It didn't just start with gold bars. We're living in the greatest period of distrust in government in generations. Senator Menendez's actions were a stark reminder that when we don't have integrity in our politics, it only makes things worse. Since then, we've seen the First Lady use a rigged system to bypass voters and try to use the power of the machine to win this seat. Let me tell you, voters see this, and they don't like it. I'm running to restore trust in our democracy and our elected officials because if we don't, we could lose this Senate seat. When control of the Senate Majority is on the line, and Donald Trump is barreling towards the GOP nomination for president, we need a senator who has a strong track record of delivering results for New Jersey in the face of MAGA Republican opposition and one who isn't hand-picked by the "powers-that-be" In New Jersey. Our wins in five county convention votes fueled our momentum in this race, and it's allowing us to mount a more formidable challenge than anyone ever expected. We're shaking up the race because New Jersey has never seen a grassroots operation like ours fight against the political machine. = The fact is this: We're still up against a lot. That's why my team set an ambitious goal of raising $150,000 before March's end-of-quarter deadline to keep building up our voter turnout operations and make sure our message isn't drowned out by my opponents' big money and the political machine backing her. = = Let's go, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2257%2E552475%2EmvXTP3)
Peter, you might have noticed big corporations reducing the size of their products while charging the same or more. It affects working families far and wide — including here in Pennsylvania.
**Bob Casey is leading the fight to hold greedy corporations accountable for deceptive practices like shrinkflation and greedflation in the Senate.** If re-elected, he will continue to fight to lower costs and improve the lives of folks across the Commonwealth and throughout America. However, he can’t win without your help.
[**Will you consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can to Bob Casey so he can keep up the fight to lower costs by holding large corporations accountable?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240309-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240309-1&refcode2=2257_552475_mvXTP3&akid=2257%2E552475%2EmvXTP3)

And since we’re asking you to click, we thought we could do something a little more fun than a boring link to click (but you’re completely welcome to click on those, too!).

Hey team, it’s Team Jesse James,
Here’s a teaser of Jesse’s column, which ran statewide in Montana’s newspapers last weekend. Click the link to read the entire thing and help us spread this message!

[**Montana can be a stark place no matter the time of day, or year. On hot August days, the haze creates layers of our mountains, playing a trick with the depth of field that makes them look almost painted on flat stage dressing. In March, the sun rises and sets from the southeast to the southwest, creating a cold, hard light that refuses to hide flaws. In some valleys, that light hardly lasts 10 hours.**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=46ebb90dd9&e=805e709ff8)[**No matter what time of year or the landscape’s colors, one thing is supposed to remain true: our state government must do our work in that light.**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=2ef1a49c24&e=805e709ff8)

name: Team Burchett
subject: Support Tim’s Legislation 📄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
Taking on the woke agenda and demanding Congress do its job.

| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a237cc0165694e18a770e9a4e690e531&_e=1Kd7vdYyfLbafWFP_WkWeVZohtUe9IBwH7QL_KPug0vgkJFrpEuRshH1xdyW9B8OHgW2EcgCkx5BHLhW4TR6JsvLu1Xyq2iS3EMibEBeL4WtLuKi_RZMoHzy4Mi3M-98ahBD38dKaOPrQiSwuUyZT0nfk5NTCfkFRRMs2M_R6_YKNEoRVTcCAGRvKUkr5NyplCtxhB4vdOCma0WOX9Rny2lelra8htiUXwszGFE7Wr-CGEFgGREG6xm_bEFJ86ngccSO6RHWhxRytRO1hfLN_cxDcbl8iPIDPNLVE2kOMjirqVCrrW6JB36weNiJYtiDs_cjdwAUwd1OrDLVPFMWgThSMSehdw9Zs3a_htwFqms%3D)
---
| | Friend, Tim is always up to something when it comes to his duties in Congress—and this year is no different. He’s been busy drafting legislation that will make a serious impact, so we want to keep you in the loop. First up, he’s reintroducing the **Do Your Job Act** , which would slash members of Congress’ paychecks by [10% every year](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a237cc0165694e18a770e9a4e690e531&_e=1Kd7vdYyfLbafWFP_WkWeSrhjCWcTgJonfasB0HgPbJ0kdkxLImreVNFkgGQSUlUwF9tYxLOJ87j7wYqCru5eobE5V5RqnwqwoU9Ss5Pal3D5seSHjRMVhB2BptD7wc-YoWtUCCD2PFNKeHjXF5i4dmjz_uXZ0PEZ6mzIamgK1BzrK2o-GB3kdIIXwoT-jfilm6RLtrbzCTg0XuPoKT2uu-l3j_cpg1M1PEWKIUlnfXYcyRtJkqdGXSf-Jy11TlWh6CD6Twx89zWNQdJ_L9MREtMZjmZUIHQm1iFLFDMp2Ijg7pqr6pbktGWNwVxysL1z3e3G3pgtibhJugCJmlyCViUGSdXwHNY6zfk7CjJjSb9M_H9J81BQrKu89lIfPiixyLiB9FcNjaWd-FdakCCDQ%3D%3D) they fail to pass an annual budget. As he put it, this is the most basic of congressional duties, and when they fail in this regard, they’re failing the American people. [**Would you still get paid if you failed to do**** _your_****job? Of course not, and the same rules should apply in Congress. clean_body: Taking on the woke agenda and demanding Congress do its job. | | | | | | | | Friend, Tim is always up to something when it comes to his duties in Congress—and this year is no different. He’s been busy drafting legislation that will make a serious impact, so we want to keep you in the loop. First up, he’s reintroducing the Do Your Job Act , which would slash members of Congress’ paychecks by they fail to pass an annual budget. As he put it, this is the most basic of congressional duties, and when they fail in this regard, they’re failing the American people. Next, Tim introduced the Building Lasting Opportunities for Community K-12 (BLOCK) Act. This one tackles the “diversity” crud they keep shoving down our throats. It would prevent the Department of Education from cherry-picking which schools get cash based on whether they fall in line with the woke political agenda. Thanks for always having our back! You're a vital part of Team Burchett, and we're lucky to have you on board. Enjoy the weekend! name: Daniel Pardee
subject: Better late than never? Wishing Josh a happy belated
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Hi team,

As Josh’s Finance Director, there are a few important dates that I try to remember as big fundraising days: campaign events, certain holidays, and of course, his birthday. Yesterday I was up late, crunching numbers when I realized I had completely forgotten it was Josh’s birthday.

Well, it’s better late than never, right? I’m getting a happy birthday card ready to go over to Josh ASAP, and I need you to sign your name to show Josh how much this district supports him!
go.josh4congress.com/a/birthday-card-2 [go.josh4congress.com/a/birthday-card-2]Josh always has our back in Washington, pushing for commonsense, bipartisan solutions to the urgent issues facing New Jersey and the nation. He’s the epitome of a committed public servant, and he truly deserves a celebration!

SIGN YOUR NAME > > [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/birthday-card-2]

Thanks for taking a minute to add your name to Josh’s card — he’s there for Jersey, and I want to show him that Jersey is there for him!

Best,

Daniel Pardee
Finance Director
Josh Gottheimer for Congress
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: American Update
subject: Feds Used ‘Secret Portal’ To Tell Financial Institutions To Flag Customers’ Purchases Involving ‘MAGA,’ ‘Trump’
body:
And EXCLUSIVE: Red State School District Tells Staff They Don’t Have To Notify Parents Their Child Is ‘Transgender’

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696617%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UKn0qDGl%2fmS6g9FCFwxZ8w&sysid=1 Feds Used ‘Secret Portal’ To Tell Financial Institutions To Flag Customers’ Purchases Involving ‘MAGA,’ ‘Trump’

Federal law enforcement operated a “portal” where it shared guidance instructing financial institutions to identify “domestic violent extremists,” which included searching for customer transactions including keywords like “MAGA” and “Trump,” as well as purchases for items like “religious texts,” according to a new House committee report.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696617%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UKn0qDGl%2fmS6g9FCFwxZ8w&sysid=1

Federal law enforcement operated a “portal” where it shared guidance instructing financial institutions to identify “domestic violent extremists,” which included searching for customer transactions including keywords like “MAGA” and “Trump,” as well as purchases for items like “religious texts,” according to a new House committee report.

See It Here https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696617%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UKn0qDGl%2fmS6g9FCFwxZ8w&sysid=1

A Utah school district informed its employees that they are not legally obligated to tell parents whether their child identifies as “transgender,” according to documents obtained by Parents Defending Education (PDE) and shared with the Daily Caller News Foundation.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696618%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3xKkx%2fC2aNPWKAmWCy8Cgw&sysid=1

Residents of Uvalde, Texas, erupted in anger during a Thursday meeting when an independent investigation’s report acknowledged missteps but cleared local police officers of policy violations over a delayed response to a mass shooting, multiple outlets reported.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696619%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9vyleYfw0l3q2WUSovcMow&sysid=1

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The U.S. government will do literally everything but hold the Israeli government accountable.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

During President Biden’s State of the Union address on Thursday evening,
he announced that his administration is planning to build a temporary port
in Gaza to deliver more aid to hundreds of thousands of starving
Palestinians.

The problem with that is, it does nothing to address:

1. Israel’s continued blockade of aid trucks from reaching starving
Palestinians
2. The bombs being dropped on Gaza that the U.S. keeps funding.

The U.S. government will do literally everything but hold the Israeli
government accountable for obstructing humanitarian aid.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/permanent_ceasefire_stop_funding_genocide_2/?source=em20240309-33710&t=1001&akid=33710%2E1203867%2E-hvWOg ]Let’s start by not sending its military more bombs and weapons: add
your name to our petition urging the Biden Administration to support a
PERMANENT ceasefire and stop weapons transfers to Israel now →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/permanent_ceasefire_stop_funding_genocide_2/?source=em20240309-33710&t=1002&akid=33710%2E1203867%2E-hvWOg ]Sign On

We should not have to create an entirely new port to prevent a
humanitarian catastrophe created by Israel.

The World Food Programme has warned that “airdrops are only a last resort
to reach Northern Gaza. Road routes are the only way to bring in the large
quantities of food desperately needed to avert famine.”

As long as humanitarian aid is blocked by Netanyahu’s forces and we keep
giving the Israeli military bombs to drop on innocent civilians, our
government cannot claim to be doing everything it can to save lives in
Gaza.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/permanent_ceasefire_stop_funding_genocide_2/?source=em20240309-33710&t=1003&akid=33710%2E1203867%2E-hvWOg ]Join us in demanding the Biden Administration stop funding Israel’s
bombs and weapons, and use its leverage to push for a permanent—not
temporary— ceasefire NOW.

No more funding for genocide.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240309-33710-footer&t=1004&refcode2=33710_1203867_-hvWOg&akid=33710%2E1203867%2E-hvWOg

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=33710%2E1203867%2E-hvWOg

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
| | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bdcf7e7976514590b4a600848fd0a96b&_e=vWnLIFXy3t1jFQ6Ru4SQFTlQUyhLLJDO4PxCLG_M9HARV8V7ra4k6Y90sT9Iedom0tO43jegoguugET0BGOEZ5Qz4A91vOMJC3PL4r1gvGLvmcnFQuNt5C7RklTVf2fcrCwmYLfj-EgMI17zdrqlx5LlA6A11uGeJaGYoWTLvsvPV7EMskZrfCZewgFXoL0E5g9_Qu6HlFHQENJHvcePALHLLnKl0B-x2fkVub-3_Ycspr22ehrNuq6LyAbBYU32-NRJYQMdpokCWcIVW5syvdIi6_hehRPWQ20xKXhYKAMAC3Q5BhN5fQX63NNwsd9hcH8nAAl3NaxuEseCct0faiKBi5X66Kmd1Vy3fa_7l8fh3J9jaUs0dd-lag4AIh1GHT1CcAIU5BwffZrrWtzXdBhiP9LtGaYyPvo21r1acmPD2eSJZabK4UWJ3pR6PiWh)
---
Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona's election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what's going on. _That 's why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_ [_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bdcf7e7976514590b4a600848fd0a96b&_e=vWnLIFXy3t1jFQ6Ru4SQFTlQUyhLLJDO4PxCLG_M9HARV8V7ra4k6Y90sT9Iedom0tO43jegoguugET0BGOEZ5Qz4A91vOMJC3PL4r1gvGLvmcnFQuNt5C7RklTVf2fcrCwmYLfj-EgMI17zdrqlx5LlA6A11uGeJaGYoWTLvsvPV7EMskZrfCZewgFXoL0E5g9_Qu6HlFHQENJHvcePALHLLnKl0B-x2fkVub-3_Ycspr22ehrNuq6LyAbBYU32-NRJYQMdpokCWcIVW5syvdIi6_hehRPWQ20xKXhYKAO4rttleGQhVn0K9-fFv3KpIRNjwcNxQpSWhnqfbkNGCChkqTyTjdo_XXiEfnA1-_vs_gqZaNnB7wMft_3Ki13zPuTEXZnlaKQ25Dc1cTVTOa3fSb8FWVV3z6IQ9P99H7QRtoFV_c-D93kTM1bUe9N2) **We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:** **#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes - larger than the margin of victory in the state governor's race**_ **#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_ **#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations. **Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring. _Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_ [_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bdcf7e7976514590b4a600848fd0a96b&_e=vWnLIFXy3t1jFQ6Ru4SQFTlQUyhLLJDO4PxCLG_M9HARV8V7ra4k6Y90sT9Iedom0tO43jegoguugET0BGOEZ5Qz4A91vOMJC3PL4r1gvGLvmcnFQuNt5C7RklTVf2fcrCwmYLfj-EgMI17zdrqlx5LlA6A11uGeJaGYoWTLvsvPV7EMskZrfCZewgFXoL0E5g9_Qu6HlFHQENJHvcePALHLLnKl0B-x2fkVub-3_Ycspr22ehrNuq6LyAbBYU32-NRJYQMdpokCWcIVW5syvdIi6_hehRPWQ20xKXhYKAMxPRKOQlGEVgmmXKfjHKttD_frBCSOg-bQ3JNwxJOuJT6S9bxIzzvx5Plp_-yDo59BTpMlPEOMZtNcYDz-0HSbm31fUKdckJpmCiicYL2CAWPtD7_t9cyPoqIBMSua7bqiWO7L8pdm43k-SBRH2iSY)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _
|
---
| [**DONATE >>**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bdcf7e7976514590b4a600848fd0a96b&_e=vWnLIFXy3t1jFQ6Ru4SQFTlQUyhLLJDO4PxCLG_M9HARV8V7ra4k6Y90sT9Iedom0tO43jegoguugET0BGOEZ5Qz4A91vOMJC3PL4r1gvGLvmcnFQuNt5C7RklTVf2fcrCwmYLfj-EgMI17zdrqlx5LlA6A11uGeJaGYoWTLvsvPV7EMskZrfCZewgFXoL0E5g9_Qu6HlFHQENJHvcePALHLLnKl0B-x2fkVub-3_Ycspr22ehrNuq6LyAbBYU32-NRJYQMdpokCWcIVW5syvdIi6_hehRPWQ20xKXhYKAPOIDVbQGeqHb6kHCDy1EBkJzABaoN6nURUYNf5lgF9QbckOdtakt8Xbo02bvSL7xB3XPIXaSiQVI9n3-BVVO48nh3ylrCmaVF7XP7HvPZuIXoKLIGURjudcu_eY3Cy1YHYrUEXwzAmietF8J7W3wSz)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I’m a Marine veteran who was exposed to toxic burn pits in Iraq.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Josh Hawley turned his back on veterans like me.
#
Peter — I’m a Marine veteran who was exposed to toxic burn pits in Iraq.
**Nearly two years ago, Josh Hawley turned his back on veterans like me by voting to stall the PACT Act** , legislation that expanded healthcare coverage for those of us who were exposed to these toxic pits. Now I’m running to replace him in the U.S. Senate.
So before I ask you to **[add a donation of any amount to my grassroots campaign,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44385?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH) please let me share more about why this issue is personal to me and how it has impacted so many of my fellow veterans.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44385?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH)
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and poring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger by blocking efforts to expand healthcare for veterans exposed to these toxic burn pits.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44385?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH)
What they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country. That’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can get this message in front of Missouri voters and defeat Josh Hawley this November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44385?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44386?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44386?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44386?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44386?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44386?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44386?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/44385?refcode=em20240309-5004&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH)
---
I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240309-5004-footer&t=12&refcode2=5004_614464_C4OrrH&akid=5004%2E614464%2EC4OrrH)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Do you support my re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:

subject: Did you see Bonnie's message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80631105/459938815/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20240308_PT_WHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_WHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJiNzg3Ny0yZmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhoPJDQKxa1HMQhs9f7soKsYZTHP_AG_BZBjqLid8Js=&emci=ce232f99-d9db-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=a12b7877-2fde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=30096098) | We just wanted to make sure you saw Bonnie’s earlier message about the importance of Women’s History Month.

A longtime advocate for the rights of _**all**_ women, Bonnie knows just how important it is to keep pushing for progress and equality.

**_[Will will you add your name today and stand with Bonnie in the fight for gender equality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80631106/459938816/379971845?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20240308_PT_WHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_WHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJiNzg3Ny0yZmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhoPJDQKxa1HMQhs9f7soKsYZTHP_AG_BZBjqLid8Js=&emci=ce232f99-d9db-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=a12b7877-2fde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=30096098)_**
* * *

Every March, we celebrate Women's History Month.

It's a time set aside to mark the accomplishments of women throughout history. It's also an opportunity to take stock of how far we've come, and how far we still have to go.

I have spent my entire career fighting for women’s rights and equality. From co-founding the Congressional Caucus on Black Women and Girls to sponsoring legislation like The Crown Act of 2022, I have consistently fought to amplify the voices of marginalized women and dismantle barriers to their success.

But Team, we still have so far to go. From pay equity to restoring reproductive rights, the fight for women's rights is just beginning. **_[This Women's History Month, will you join me in recommitting to the fight by adding your name now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80631107/459938817/379971845?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20240308_PT_WHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_WHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJiNzg3Ny0yZmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhoPJDQKxa1HMQhs9f7soKsYZTHP_AG_BZBjqLid8Js=&emci=ce232f99-d9db-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=a12b7877-2fde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=30096098)_** | | [**SIGN ON NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80631108/459938818/379971845?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20240308_PT_WHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_WHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJiNzg3Ny0yZmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhoPJDQKxa1HMQhs9f7soKsYZTHP_AG_BZBjqLid8Js=&emci=ce232f99-d9db-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=a12b7877-2fde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=30096098)
---
Women’s history is American history, and women’s rights are human rights.

**_[Sign your name today to commit to fighting for a better future for the generations of women to come →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80631109/459938819/379971845?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20240308_PT_WHM_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_WHM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTJiNzg3Ny0yZmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhoPJDQKxa1HMQhs9f7soKsYZTHP_AG_BZBjqLid8Js=&emci=ce232f99-d9db-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=a12b7877-2fde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=30096098)_**

Bonnie Watson Coleman

body:
respond to our State of the Union Flash Poll before midnight tonight
| | |
---
Friend, President Biden set out a bold, hopeful vision for our country in his State of the Union address.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80631348/459939500/834290204?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4870-su-nd&refcode=jtk4870-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDJiNzg3Ny0yZmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGMoJ5yrKBUoYLclN94hGUCyq10zoH0dAJrxLHfipSs=&emci=b32c40b9-c9dc-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=a42b7877-2fde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=7659029)
**After watching President Biden's speech, we're prouder than ever before to be Democrats.** Just look at everything that he's accomplished for American families:
* Securing a bipartisan investment in our **infrastructure**
* Driving down **inflation** rates and creating millions of new jobs
* Passing the **Marriage Equality Act**
* Fighting **climate change** and investing in the green economy
* Winning transformative **gun safety reforms**
* **_And so much more!_**

Now, he's headed into the final year of his first term as he fights to restore reproductive rights, defend Social Security and Medicare, stop GOP extremism and more.

A majority of Americans oppose weapons shipments to Israel. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWDp3K8x1sJYpjcUyNnwBib8RD4qpn6v7ocUSLiwwJfHnQSXrE2gJQIBO-5stfxwYamKGQLiPi7h2sow7RoZ5Jn_QDuDFik5qFWyoYrcwhXivLpAtY0rJLfWXZLWaTrgHRFD_Y_UlzwyTXClzQMXqhapwFchptnPHWsmjzlJa2Sb84Nz1Y889NrcXhiJn6rT1ku6iXgP1LZ_LEToPWPF2xZvE7t6yW6T-yuWzt1ixLbog/44i/221NmyRgRXu1LG154vItqw/h0/h001.jHAyX7lnT6OweNnRHqK9zP7lwwHGq7fIS2S2_3BMlXc)
