Friend, This week, the _Washington Post_ reported that the Biden administration has approved and delivered more than 100 military sales to Israel in the past 5 months, sending thousands of bombs and other weapons without notifying the public. A former senior Biden administration official told the newspaper: _“That’s an_** _extraordinary number of sales_** _over the course of a pretty short amount of time, which really strongly suggests that_** _the Israeli campaign would not be sustainable without this level of U.S. support_** _.”_ 1 Israel’s government has used financial, military, and diplomatic support from the U.S. to kill more than 30,000 Palestinians, orphan 17,000 children, and starve and displace millions. In his State of the Union address this week, President Biden referred to Gaza and said that protecting and saving innocent lives must be a priority. If he wants to save lives, he should stop arming Israel’s military as it commits genocide. [**Sign now to tell Biden: Listen to UN experts and the majority of the American people. Stop arming Israel.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-5XwiL-GjtcNV-VqoRLx0BMa-j6E-0w4G7iYSFaW50D1eLBNSKhEJPN7jX0bcjrA2iHwvz1xj3E1XIl85-QVAuBNj8LgziYKxF-1qlkLMSCzNhjSgNv4vUR4k6fARXj0JWFOvhcc_YD9sUjDxT3h_kL0F7tyCYWeang1uY9swfeNzLbujXco-1yAKiKwQrPj0MMYgpfXpkAF8jum_CJb6Dx4VjXREN1UfgMfpgoHDTQciHaD9r9LXviOzspecPpELcQRa9GdUgmp_3GwDcOviQlQqwSdnHVr_tRNAHD3EC8OZAuaEnoaTBe7l7Dujhe6KPxSGq93XxvE5-K-DvCGDF/44i/221NmyRgRXu1LG154vItqw/h1/h001.hYkA0rQ8LqA15EJ_7YPVBceIOBlHHWa2F9XLpWFp8UM) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-5XwiL-GjtcNV-VqoRLx0BMa-j6E-0w4G7iYSFaW50D1eLBNSKhEJPN7jX0bcjrA2iHwvz1xj3E1XIl85-QVAuBNj8LgziYKxF-1qlkLMSCzNhjSgNv4vUR4k6fARXj0KcGy3hAeyL5cSzd_Gz_azb9nm0mwF_wrWATmv3Q5El66mWkxS2ulO-Y-VuTPFXhBJlmjMP5_OMOIpwgKNkRzJ9c3oezV7CeVZ8oplWCX532tSh_dVxxSi3fGBRIKx1MNTJJ857S2_VGN79b_e8IiunxYHk5UKWbCo9JR_OdxJDM8tgnm9nJVbgSm9FBACqgYM-BR5-Tjk-WLbo9huNvwXM/44i/221NmyRgRXu1LG154vItqw/h2/h001.qA9S7mSQX2mkSzySc0cIpvwGBUY-fqgBSCYn4xM98Gc)

**The American people overwhelmingly support a permanent ceasefire, and a recent poll found that a majority of Americans also oppose weapons shipments to Israel.**
At President Biden’s State of the Union address this week, several colleagues joined me in wearing keffiyehs and holding signs expressing the will of the people, saying “lasting ceasefire now” and “stop sending bombs.”
Outside the State of the Union, thousands of activists with Jewish Voice for Peace and other groups protested to demand Biden stop arming and funding Israel’s military.
Our movement is having an impact, with President Biden and his administration starting to use the word “ceasefire.” But they’re referring to a temporary pause in genocide.
Israel's government didn't even send a delegation to the latest round of ceasefire talks. Instead of using leverage to pressure Israel’s leaders for even a temporary pause, Biden’s administration continues to block UN ceasefire resolutions and other UN measures to criticize the Israeli military’s war crimes, such as massacres of Palestinians waiting for aid.
As human rights groups have pointed out, Israel is violating the United Nations International Court of Justice’s orders to prevent genocide, including the court’s demands to provide aid and stop the killing.
By blocking aid trucks, Israel is starving Palestinians while meals and maternity kits are only a few miles away. Meanwhile, Biden ended funding for UNRWA, the UN agency for Palestinian refugees that’s the main provider of aid in Gaza.
Because of public pressure, Biden has air dropped some meals into Gaza, which amounted to a few truckloads’ worth of aid. But experts say that the millions of people in Gaza need at least 500 trucks a day to survive, which is about how many trucks came each day before last October.
While the UN International Court of Justice’s orders are legally binding, the court doesn’t have enforcement power. **UN experts called on other countries that are members of the UN to follow their duty to prevent genocide by halting weapons exports to Israel.**
Some countries have complied, but not the U.S., which is by far Israel’s biggest military supplier and funder.
[**Please sign if you agree with UN experts and the majority of Americans: The United States government should stop sending weapons to Israel’s military as it commits genocide.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-5XwiL-GjtcNV-VqoRLx0BMa-j6E-0w4G7iYSFaW50D1eLBNSKhEJPN7jX0bcjrA2iHwvz1xj3E1XIl85-QVAuBNj8LgziYKxF-1qlkLMSCzNhjSgNv4vUR4k6fARXj0JONAR7Jb7CjMTiJNyA0GudSGDlIyjtzUgqkczND4Bj03vBAWsL6wyvScQQy5SgVWkE7JUxj8Pr1oiJGYYZWjraR645gIPMoussVjoeVYY3cgQbE9f5FtP2ShHHYy4UnSDQ9fkI_scYMP_eJ0YCruETkZD7SQ67cdfXgcx0WTZQFs9FV08u0KzxODN74VLI5y6KEbgjifkwRakcfiOEZ4GB/44i/221NmyRgRXu1LG154vItqw/h3/h001.ZeinEnHda7yHMcdk4Eqlrkjkm-yCuCD_6HhBv8cxc_w)

Thank you. Together we will save lives, and we’ll keep pushing our government to invest in life-sustaining programs for our communities rather than spending billions of our tax dollars on death and destruction.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: A majority of Americans oppose weapons shipments to Israel. | | | Friend, This week, the Washington Post reported that the Biden administration has approved and delivered more than 100 military sales to Israel in the past 5 months, sending thousands of bombs and other weapons without notifying the public. A former senior Biden administration official told the newspaper: “That’s an extraordinary number of sales over the course of a pretty short amount of time, which really strongly suggests that the Israeli campaign would not be sustainable without this level of U.S. support .” 1 Israel’s government has used financial, military, and diplomatic support from the U.S. to kill more than 30,000 Palestinians, orphan 17,000 children, and starve and displace millions. In his State of the Union address this week, President Biden referred to Gaza and said that protecting and saving innocent lives must be a priority. If he wants to save lives, he should stop arming Israel’s military as it commits genocide. | The American people overwhelmingly support a permanent ceasefire, and a recent poll found that a majority of Americans also oppose weapons shipments to Israel. At President Biden’s State of the Union address this week, several colleagues joined me in wearing keffiyehs and holding signs expressing the will of the people, saying “lasting ceasefire now” and “stop sending bombs.” Outside the State of the Union, thousands of activists with Jewish Voice for Peace and other groups protested to demand Biden stop arming and funding Israel’s military. Our movement is having an impact, with President Biden and his administration starting to use the word “ceasefire.” But they’re referring to a temporary pause in genocide. Israel's government didn't even send a delegation to the latest round of ceasefire talks. Instead of using leverage to pressure Israel’s leaders for even a temporary pause, Biden’s administration continues to block UN ceasefire resolutions and other UN measures to criticize the Israeli military’s war crimes, such as massacres of Palestinians waiting for aid. As human rights groups have pointed out, Israel is violating the United Nations International Court of Justice’s orders to prevent genocide, including the court’s demands to provide aid and stop the killing. By blocking aid trucks, Israel is starving Palestinians while meals and maternity kits are only a few miles away. Meanwhile, Biden ended funding for UNRWA, the UN agency for Palestinian refugees that’s the main provider of aid in Gaza. Because of public pressure, Biden has air dropped some meals into Gaza, which amounted to a few truckloads’ worth of aid. But experts say that the millions of people in Gaza need at least 500 trucks a day to survive, which is about how many trucks came each day before last October. While the UN International Court of Justice’s orders are legally binding, the court doesn’t have enforcement power. UN experts called on other countries that are members of the UN to follow their duty to prevent genocide by halting weapons exports to Israel. Some countries have complied, but not the U.S., which is by far Israel’s biggest military supplier and funder. Thank you. Together we will save lives, and we’ll keep pushing our government to invest in life-sustaining programs for our communities rather than spending billions of our tax dollars on death and destruction. In solidarity, Rashida 1 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Michelle, United We Dream Action
subject: Young people hold the key to the White House in 2024.🔑
body:
And we’re demanding that Biden invest in our generation. | | | Peter, Young people are tired of hearing crickets from President Biden and his administration on the long**** list of issues of our time: immigrant rights, climate change, gun violence, racial and economic inequality, attacks on reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ protections, and a permanent ceasefire in Gaza. On Thursday night, President Biden laid out his vision for the future of America in his State of the Union Address — and it was a reminder that the President is still far from delivering a progressive agenda that not only aligns with the priorities of young voters but also unequivocally condemns the racist fear-mongering, scapegoating, and divisive rhetoric promoted by MAGA Republicans for political gain. Today, immigrant youth at UWDA join young organizers across the country in showing the Biden-Harris Administration that we, too, are building the vision of our collective future — one where immigrants can live in safety and dignity. Young people are ready to mobilize, and we're sending the President and his administration our “Finish the Job Youth Agenda.” We have a clear playbook for success that he must follow if he wants our support in November. **We demand President Biden runs on a bold progressive agenda that invests in the issues of our time!** _[This agenda](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3ait3AhZtuNa50nkF645Q5CEbfwyz49xk-Zbp8fyO2e7dN4uvKWmSEFrygLQhXWEpFqf2pH3uJy5MSZJOx9cEcXf2csGBKXAX7qjaCC26BCYiGO6D-HiayRCbPpUslK9z7g1LPtpopYc8IwMXkxC3u8ZHsqvaIu2wejAwxCMf5GWZ0QiluCYAYgkInxQ5NZZTWO1F8C52_NL7HMJzL6fjYcDEFVYjfgtUSS9fAaYLl0ApQui4Bh8SgcerdWZvk8d3g/44i/vlIOVwGDRI-rdMCdz0orUQ/h3/h001.sltV47xqa3jELZ8Vd2cVitcWQ1yuFc-XliUP0LKL3Tc) is a unified vision of our future and a call for the Biden-Harris Administration to step up and deliver for the young people who worked tirelessly to elect them to office. __Check out our demands here!
_ As young constituents, we’ve been clear about what we want: humane immigration solutions and permanent protections for immigrants. We won’t allow far-right politicians across the country to continue spreading anti-immigrant policies and narratives that threaten **our freedom to move, stay, and thrive in our chosen homes.** If President Biden wants us to show up for him in November, he must fight for the future of our communities at every step of the way. We’re organizing around the clock on the issues that impact our generation the most, and we’re the key to winning the White House in 2024. **Join us in building the vision of our collective future today.** In unity, Michelle and the UWDA team

They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.

clean_body: #1 Survival Item of 2024 This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... "Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?" Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Another day, another bad take from the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need to keep guns out of the wrong hands
#

Another day, another bad take from the NRA:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240309-1-30&t=1&akid=7735%2E3935704%2E19pp21)
Here at GIFFORDS, a pill we find hard to swallow is that after the federal assault weapons and large-capacity ammunition ban lapsed in 2004, there was a 183% increase in high-fatality mass shootings and a 239% increase in deaths from these shootings.
AR-15s are designed to kill as many people as possible, as quickly as possible. Far too often, they end up in the wrong hands, which has led us to the terrifying status quo we’re in today. Assault rifles have been used in the most horrific mass shootings in modern history.
The NRA wants more people to buy AR-15s because that means more gunmaker profits. But these uniquely dangerous firearms pose a danger to public safety and must be regulated accordingly.
We must continue our fight to keep these guns out of the wrong hands by passing measures like universal background checks and extreme risk protection orders (a.k.a. “red flag laws”). We must keep up our efforts. It’s the right thing to do.
[**Will you please make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us in our work to protect our communities?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240309-1-30&t=2&akid=7735%2E3935704%2E19pp21)

## Who Killed JFK?
---
Back in February of this year, **Roger Stone** visited [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7189411.2638.1.80beb7c468dff4f18f0451eea34eece6) in Tulsa, OK and held a special 2 hour event in which he addressed the **JFK assassination**. **Roger Stone** laid out the evidence of what actually took place. Due to high volume of people asking for that event to be uploaded online to watch, we now have a link to view it. Watch the **Roger Stone** special here: [https://youtu.be/ZphwDct5Mio](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=7189411.2639.1.cc24d00f2826fec176e3c160b436c8f4)

Did you know there is a crown in heaven for believers that are eagerly awaiting the **Second Coming**?

name: Gina Hinojosa, Powered by People
subject: Meet Melanie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Hi — it’s
Gina from the Powered by People team.

This past week, I joined our volunteers in knocking on doors to register
Texans to vote. And there’s one interaction I want to share with you:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240309.cqWXA3&refcode=ema20240309-239512&t=1001&akid=239512%2E444211%2Elkc4Pk ][IMG]

One woman I met was named Melanie. When she opened the door, she was
shocked to hear that she wasn’t registered to vote in Texas. “I moved here
from Chicago last year,” she told me. “I thought it was automatic when I
got my Texas driver’s license!”

I explained that Texas doesn’t have automatic voter registration. You have
to opt-in at the DMV — and even if you do, all kinds of procedural errors
can stop your registration from going through. It happens often, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/62882?source=ema20240309-239512&t=1002&akid=239512%2E444211%2Elkc4Pk ]as

clean_body: [1]Powered By People Hi — it’s Gina from the Powered by People team. This past week, I joined our volunteers in knocking on doors to register Texans to vote. And there’s one interaction I want to share with you: [ ][IMG] One woman I met was named Melanie. When she opened the door, she was shocked to hear that she wasn’t registered to vote in Texas. “I moved here from Chicago last year,” she told me. “I thought it was automatic when I got my Texas driver’s license!” I explained that Texas doesn’t have automatic voter registration. You have to opt-in at the DMV — and even if you do, all kinds of procedural errors can stop your registration from going through. It happens often, [ ]as this journalist recently reported. We have a choice this November – will we remain under extreme GOP control, or flip the House blue and protect our fundamental rights? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

name: Josh Stein
subject: My opponent is a conspiracy theorist.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80635578/459951972/-664527026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzFiOGM3MS0zNmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YV0W52GeQIntmM_mvZCmI_XGrm5G_9hibTaDIX-ae24=)
Here’s the _truth_ , friend: The GOP nominee for Governor of North Carolina, Mark Robinson, is a self-described conspiracy theorist.

He has accused school shooting survivors of being “crisis actors.” He referred to the Holocaust as “hogwash.” He agreed with claims that Jewish bankers are working with China, Islamic leaders, and the CIA to “control the world.”

THIS IS A MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY

Peter,

With over 20 years of raising money under his belt, it’s no surprise that my opponent has had no trouble raising more than **$5.5 million in the final quarter of 2023.**

With more than 18 years of chumming it up with Washington Elite under his belt, it’s no wonder that the most powerful Democrats in the country are _**rushing**_ to spend as much money as possible to secure a fourth Senate term for Jon Tester.

Whether it’s the **25 million dollars** Tester raised in 2023 or the **44.9 million dollars** his friends in DC have **earmarked** to spend on TV ADS in Montana this fall, one thing is sure: Democrats know that I am the one who has what it takes to beat Jon Tester.
**
Navy SEALS fight to win. We don’t quit, and we don’t lose. **

And Jon Tester is ripe for defeat.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f039b70f548446dbb45fece2e38c7273&_e=I6er_GoJ0ahJCIfFalJu-ZlK4p_DAAndNpaMZ73bUuNouTSBBjzwGi4dzGw7M4l7IuNIB6O2IFAVewTPzcVqlfjQB_w_lnMQwMDM11KUabxfLU7UX1ZD-olCzlXImyBw-fNTt-9kFRCyzCYw6p4qC0ecm1pPp3TeCp7ZYkEFmLgHDvqlP-BIdjeaBCNgx79udp_nndwWbeTX38BmFeRp8P2mhevtRVfPVVKGwZlEQcxDi6iIoGWhEMzhtaAjKbIoNPjuB4cQvCeywlPF2VgvHbMrMghG6cbCAQhrTaTeSwwlhLypa9sc8c1yQIgGuqvVBU7keHcSFLDZ8Yor_PNFRy5165GBPWS28JTJvVk4UVYc3iFeeCLuGkgNVtlmgxncOlKKyXhNoKvOjWhPXQqkFw%3D%3D)
_**If Democrats didn’t invest another penny into Montana, which I assure you won’t be the case, the amount of money they’ve already invested would be akin to spending roughly more than $166,000 against me PER DAY.**_

We can’t compete with them right now on the money front, but polls show that I CAN win in November. So today, **[I’m setting a goal of finding 166 donors to make a gift of $5 to my campaign.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f039b70f548446dbb45fece2e38c7273&_e=I6er_GoJ0ahJCIfFalJu-ZlK4p_DAAndNpaMZ73bUuNouTSBBjzwGi4dzGw7M4l7IuNIB6O2IFAVewTPzcVqlfjQB_w_lnMQwMDM11KUabxfLU7UX1ZD-olCzlXImyBw-fNTt-9kFRCyzCYw6p4qC0ecm1pPp3TeCp7ZYkEFmLgHDvqlP-BIdjeaBCNgx79udp_nndwWbeTX38BmFeRp8P2mhevtRVfPVVKGwZlEQcxDi6iIoGWhEMzhtaAjKbIoRD2F9CP7XhOwcIBO9QWm6K7Hifd1-zN9mJzNXrcmzSJFF8EhfEXDmU_TzL81_mcnN-RjgdANYCB4Yv8Y_y1d1jEmz1s4PNpwj3Cu3qb71SQBGM2ReGq0cwN9jsBlX78sKGP2jEZ8dxMD64jpt6NkBg%3D%3D)

subject: Sinema is out, making our race even more crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Teran for Congress
body:
A Democratic majority will run through our district.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80635761/459952456/-58528819?refcode=X_030924_sinemafirstthennow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUxODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGExYjhjNzEtMzZkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xR9DxtVLAqhQ_lPNgyBIadASzFfrvcqZwO_XDo9WR4Q=)
---
| | Hi Peter, **FIRST:** We told you that turning out our AZ-03 communities would be KEY to winning our race and keeping the Senate and White House firmly in Democratic control. **THEN:** Just this week, Senator Kyrsten Sinema announced she’s no longer running for re-election, making Ruben Gallego the leading Democrat in the race against Kari Lake.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80635763/459952458/-58528819?refcode=X_030924_sinemafirstthennow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUxODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGExYjhjNzEtMzZkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xR9DxtVLAqhQ_lPNgyBIadASzFfrvcqZwO_XDo9WR4Q=)
---
**NOW:** It’s even MORE important that we reach every corner of our district to turn out voters in November. _How do we do that?_ We make sure AZ-03 voters have a candidate on their ballots they connect with, someone they _know_ will fight for all of us. That candidate is Raquel Terán. We need to work twice as hard as we did in 2022 to make sure we have the resources to reach voters. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The team that will win in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign. |
---
Peter, when I was first thinking about launching this campaign last year I had no idea what to expect.

I knew I had some supporters from my congressional campaigns that I could count on, but beyond that it was a shot in the dark.

One thing I knew for sure was that whether this was a 2-way race, a 3-way race, a 27-way race, whatever — I was going to need the support of a huge grassroots team behind me. Over the last year we’ve built that team, with close to 150,000 individual donors.

And now we know: Sinema’s out. This race is a head-to-head between me and Kari Lake. And we've got to expand out that grassroots team and build a coalition here in Arizona that can defeat her.

I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign.

[_Please, split a $5 or $10 donation between Defeat Republicans and my campaign. Whatever you can afford can help us build the team that’s going to win in Arizona. clean_body: I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign. | Peter, when I was first thinking about launching this campaign last year I had no idea what to expect. I knew I had some supporters from my congressional campaigns that I could count on, but beyond that it was a shot in the dark. One thing I knew for sure was that whether this was a 2-way race, a 3-way race, a 27-way race, whatever — I was going to need the support of a huge grassroots team behind me. Over the last year we’ve built that team, with close to 150,000 individual donors. And now we know: Sinema’s out. This race is a head-to-head between me and Kari Lake. And we've got to expand out that grassroots team and build a coalition here in Arizona that can defeat her. I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = Thanks a lot for this. body:
Do you agree that frozen embryos are children? |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80637008/459955150/759267705?sourceid=1053137&refcode=WTENEO18_20240309_ALSurveyRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ4OTA3Ny0zNmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SzpPBmg7NA1aV9aaNmi6rM6T2kVmYppCgwMifWvHMSY=&emci=393be663-5fdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=24489077-36de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Last month, the Alabama Supreme Court ruled that frozen embryos created through in vitro fertilization (IVF) are legally children and can therefore be protected as such.

**Classifying embryos as children under state law will have major repercussions for reproductive rights.** Unused embryos in IVF are often destroyed, which could open families and clinics up to wrongful death lawsuits under Alabama's policy.**__**

Once again, a Conservative court has disastrously interfered with the relationship between patients and their doctors, and **this ruling could criminalize common medical procedures that have made it possible for millions of people to become parents.**

[****We're running a live poll to find out what this community thinks about the Alabama Supreme Court's decision, and we want to hear from you, Peter. Make your voice heard by taking our short survey now >> ****](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80637012/459955161/759267705?sourceid=1053137&refcode=WTENEO18_20240309_ALSurveyRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ4OTA3Ny0zNmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SzpPBmg7NA1aV9aaNmi6rM6T2kVmYppCgwMifWvHMSY=&emci=393be663-5fdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=24489077-36de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=5177934) ****Do you agree with the Alabama Supreme Court's decision that frozen embryos are children? **** | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80637013/459955162/759267705?sourceid=1053137&refcode=WTENEO18_20240309_ALSurveyRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ4OTA3Ny0zNmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SzpPBmg7NA1aV9aaNmi6rM6T2kVmYppCgwMifWvHMSY=&emci=393be663-5fdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=24489077-36de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=5177934) | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80637014/459955163/759267705?sourceid=1053137&refcode=WTENEO18_20240309_ALSurveyRS_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ4OTA3Ny0zNmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SzpPBmg7NA1aV9aaNmi6rM6T2kVmYppCgwMifWvHMSY=&emci=393be663-5fdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=24489077-36de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=5177934)**

name: Team Pramila
subject: Building an economy for EVERYONE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Democrats are working towards a bright future and rejecting attempts to bring us back in time.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240309-3610-footer&t=1&akid=3610%2E420207%2EfCQzQg)
Peter,
In his State of the Union address, President Biden laid out a roadmap for the country that was built on hope and an understanding that **this country _CAN_ exist for and serve everyone.**
In the last three years, Democrats have delivered lasting results and made advances towards a society that takes every member into consideration — especially given the obstacles that the GOP has thrown our way.
**Pramila and her fellow Democrats are working towards a bright future and rejecting attempts to bring us back in time.[Can you show your support for this bright future by making a $3 to Pramila’s reelection campaign?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240309.OPESbd&refcode=em20240309-3610&t=2&akid=3610%2E420207%2EfCQzQg)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240309.OPESbd&refcode=em20240309-3610&t=21&akid=3610%2E420207%2EfCQzQg)**
Pramila has been proud to vote for bills spearheaded by the White House like the INVEST in America Act – which has brought over $2 billion in new investments to the state of Washington1.
While Democrats have been hard at work enacting policies that lift up every American, the GOP has been busy restricting our freedoms and cutting blank checks to the top 1%.
**If Democrats are going to continue to deliver for the American people, we must expand our representation in Congress.[Will you contribute $3 to help protect Pramila’s seat and ensure that we get one step closer to taking back the House in November?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240309.OPESbd&refcode=em20240309-3610&t=22&akid=3610%2E420207%2EfCQzQg)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240309.OPESbd&refcode=em20240309-3610&t=23&akid=3610%2E420207%2EfCQzQg)**
Together,
Team Pramila

* * *
1: [WhiteHouse.gov](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/48089?source=em20240309-3610&t=24&akid=3610%2E420207%2EfCQzQg)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240309-3610-footer&t=25&refcode2=3610_420207_fCQzQg&akid=3610%2E420207%2EfCQzQg)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Distractions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Hovde’s working hard to change the narrative around his carpetbagger campaign.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2198%2E35263%2E-cheHR)
After failing to mention _Wisconsin_ in his campaign launch video, Eric Hovde is spending millions of dollars to try to change the ‘carpetbagger’ narrative surrounding his campaign. But don’t let his gimmicks distract you from the facts: 💰 Eric Hovde owns a $3 billion California bank
🌴 He owns a $7 million ocean-view mansion in Laguna Beach, California
🍊 Hovde is such a mainstay in Southern California, he’s been named one of Orange County’s most influential people for three years in a row! **Unlike her opponent, Tammy doesn’t need to film herself jumping into a frozen lake to prove she’s a real Wisconsinite.** We know she’s spent her whole life fighting for all of us, our families, and our communities. Wisconsin values are in her bones — and she works hard for our state every single day. But if we want to stop an out-of-state megamillionaire like Hovde from buying this Senate seat, Tammy needs our help to raise the resources it’ll take to keep this seat blue: **[Can Tammy count on you to pitch in and help us defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeat Eric Hovde?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240309_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2198%2E35263%2E-cheHR)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-mar24.B96yhC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240309_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2198%2E35263%2E-cheHR)

Right now, things aren’t looking good - Democrats are outraising Republicans at every turn. As a result, we’re facing a SERIOUS DISADVANTAGE in Senate races across the country. We need all-hands-on-deck to catch up and take back President Trump’s MAGA Senate Majority. With the Democrats’ majority razor-thin, we have a REAL CHANCE to win in November, but only if we catch up ASAP. If we lose, and Chuck Schumer stays in power, President Trump will not be able to pass his MAGA agenda. This is VITAL to saving our country. [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7116b8537d6b4037b556801289283423&_e=Qt5qvr8IzRFU9oafmmGsZ_0bVKzJrGlTRyHsaoir709VdNqKlSJ3T3Ap26ACaajoDm5Dl52EAbkF5XPa3g-T0LEuDLe79cxFtENQeWnriW9wDVnQ_Y_73G9lyd5fiOv4Hj_TGkX3YrlUNaVldxHkuBmgr9PL3lvr9P6UqXumjSE6kLH2NOzPkpHOn5n32YomItYCJ9XzyldqNiOfjYHQGU1FlSO_Pv7MmPWsl-q-Pf34QhvXkbgOEju_7yAn-4x1orJLzSzfTBCqTYcitsCxpHeuL4Egc-oX-Pdp_QVewDufe_BdcCVm7dZyFT5sLrLYGKI0etnDNqIctwMBVPUucfbRtA038esXLAFv5x_iSoB5UVmU56lskwdJxtHyj5cr75XJcG4BuBK1sjyQuvw0BA%3D%3D)

Fellow patriot,

There’s an old adage in politics: “As goes Ohio, so goes the nation.” That statement has never been truer than in 2024.

Yes, we’ve had important elections in the past, but I think you will agree that we are at a point we’ve never seen in American history. So, let me cut to the chase: _I believe the outcome of Ohio’s US Senate race will determine the future of our country._

That’s why I just announced that **I am all-in for conservative outsider Bernie Moreno** for Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat. He has my full support – [**and he needs yours as well if we’re going to win.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7116b8537d6b4037b556801289283423&_e=Qt5qvr8IzRFU9oafmmGsZ_0bVKzJrGlTRyHsaoir709VdNqKlSJ3T3Ap26ACaajoDm5Dl52EAbkF5XPa3g-T0LEuDLe79cxFtENQeWnriW9wDVnQ_Y_73G9lyd5fiOv4Hj_TGkX3YrlUNaVldxHkuBmgr9PL3lvr9P6UqXumjSE6kLH2NOzPkpHOn5n32YomItYCJ9XzyldqNiOfjYHQGU1FlSO_Pv7MmPWsl-q-Pf03mChJUw6q5axt3t5c-yj2DcoPDFw2Ezh9Zwwkduk44k_U_vEejvkj6yCfy8PnMilSPHpSTn7o4zqVO6mrLJ5nyHeYS6M7VOy28RwDBh408ETjkw85kkC8T88uKZGI-EgE50K913kp8cuBptgqoxJzx4gyfFy7N6MkvACccPZUQA%3D%3D)

**This will be THE TOP U.S. SENATE RACE in America in 2024** – one that we simply cannot afford to lose if we’re going to save our great country.

[**Will you step up now with a donation to support Bernie’s campaign in this highly competitive and critical race?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7116b8537d6b4037b556801289283423&_e=Qt5qvr8IzRFU9oafmmGsZ_0bVKzJrGlTRyHsaoir709VdNqKlSJ3T3Ap26ACaajoDm5Dl52EAbkF5XPa3g-T0LEuDLe79cxFtENQeWnriW9wDVnQ_Y_73G9lyd5fiOv4Hj_TGkX3YrlUNaVldxHkuBmgr9PL3lvr9P6UqXumjSE6kLH2NOzPkpHOn5n32YomItYCJ9XzyldqNiOfjYHQGU1FlSO_Pv7MmPWsl-q-Pf0C7CS7oaJliLZxHex5etfbdYA5HnvQd5bQeAikMNKkGeHM3Hwirkl0nXQ7PYEpT8bvxfEXjuuQ3IGWW6Szo7LwJ7oVyXh8cvuItB1RyNC-vgwBBRMpN3Y2pNQC_Xo4Y7w0B2_iYfXw6oGx7DAzB85LZr_oE4WIFbVM7VsLgZHadg%3D%3D)

[ ** Support Bernie Moreno for U.S. Senate **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7116b8537d6b4037b556801289283423&_e=Qt5qvr8IzRFU9oafmmGsZ_0bVKzJrGlTRyHsaoir709VdNqKlSJ3T3Ap26ACaajoDm5Dl52EAbkF5XPa3g-T0LEuDLe79cxFtENQeWnriW9wDVnQ_Y_73G9lyd5fiOv4Hj_TGkX3YrlUNaVldxHkuBmgr9PL3lvr9P6UqXumjSE6kLH2NOzPkpHOn5n32YomItYCJ9XzyldqNiOfjYHQGU1FlSO_Pv7MmPWsl-q-Pf0TRLUN1wrqHOcvqdn92hrDADbiVs5z4vkeuI8QZGKfWl6HGA2kPRnGOTK7SByBRrCdd-3GhDODDARobcV0xWMds2bYgb_wPyIVh6wSHN9u600aJQBH33M70hYMdbTY_T12Bp6_CbmR7T6127DzF-ZZpbRrm_PLi2wuGEP0PW0-JQ%3D%3D)
Bernie is a businessman and political outsider with a record of success in the face of adversity. He is an optimist, and a fierce supporter of our America First principles. He is the type of leader we need to end the Left’s corrupt crusade against President Trump once and for all.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: In Trump’s crosshairs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team,

The _Associated Press_ called it — we’re on to November in a matchup against celebrity Republican Steve Garvey. But that’s not all that happened this week:

**Donald Trump swept nearly every Super Tuesday contest, and Nikki Haley dropped out — clearing the path for Trump’s third GOP presidential nomination.**

Donald Trump has kept his focus on me with _relentless_ attacks — at his MAGA rallies, in interviews, and in his feverish posts on social media.

**Why?** Because no one has done more to stand up to that corrupt president and hold him accountable for his many abuses of office.

[Team, the first attacks of the general election have already started, and we need to raise $1,000,000 to have the resources to respond. Rush an urgent contribution of $10 split between the Voter Protection Project and our campaign to help me fight back.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63795?t=6&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63796?t=7&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63797?t=8&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63798?t=9&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63799?t=10&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/63800?t=11&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y)
Donald Trump’s attacks on me aren’t really about _me_ — personal in nature though they may be.

He will attack _anyone_ willing to stand up to him, to uphold the oath of office we all swore, to tell the truth in the face of his unending assault on the truth.

And it’s up to _all_ of us to fight back.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13325%2E878179%2ECKCe3y)

name: Biden 2024
subject: Most people will simply look away from this important message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Since Thursday night's State of the Union address, we've been asking supporters who want to defeat Trump to make a donation directly to President Biden's reelection campaign. | | |
---

⛅️ To all of President Biden's supporters, 🇺🇸 Please don't scroll past this. We'll get right to the point. Since Thursday night's State of the Union address, we've been asking supporters who want to defeat Trump to make a donation directly to President Biden's reelection campaign.

If everyone reading this message donated $10, we would have the resources we need to reach our fundraising goals before the next FEC fundraising deadline ends, and we wouldn't even have to ask again. Unfortunately, most people reading this message and others don't give. They simply look the other way. That's why the President needs people like you, Peter -- people who care and understand the stakes of this election -- to chip in today.

If reelecting President Biden and keeping Trump out of office seems worth it to you, please take a moment to secure the future of our campaign by donating to the Defend Democracy Fund today.

**The average online donation to our campaign is $40. Some give more. Some give less. All that matters is that you're choosing to take a stand for our democracy and to reelect President Biden today.**
[**_Please use this link, or click an amount below, to make a donation to President Biden's reelection campaign. clean_body: Since Thursday night's State of the Union address, we've been asking supporters who want to defeat Trump to make a donation directly to President Biden's reelection campaign. | | | ⛅️ To all of President Biden's supporters, 🇺🇸 Please don't scroll past this. We'll get right to the point. Since Thursday night's State of the Union address, we've been asking supporters who want to defeat Trump to make a donation directly to President Biden's reelection campaign. If everyone reading this message donated $10, we would have the resources we need to reach our fundraising goals before the next FEC fundraising deadline ends, and we wouldn't even have to ask again. Unfortunately, most people reading this message and others don't give. They simply look the other way. That's why the President needs people like you, Peter -- people who care and understand the stakes of this election -- to chip in today. If reelecting President Biden and keeping Trump out of office seems worth it to you, please take a moment to secure the future of our campaign by donating to the Defend Democracy Fund today. The average online donation to our campaign is $40. Some give more. Some give less. All that matters is that you're choosing to take a stand for our democracy and to reelect President Biden today. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | 🙏 🙏 Please don't click away. Contribute today. The President needs you. Thank you, Team Joe

| | | [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=890d312dccbf449a993cf9d1099ec6fd&_e=UA2ls0qLpo3F_O0FgOiAT_JqMVT_0A0QCStO_GoTGNwTERRCO78Wuz7Nkehqcxe9OOiCCBRbIpCJr36Y-iw3tUk4id04MLf3dNcTXBfv-zIPaI4zcyZPsU47VHF2MTSmrjL9aj8szRiH8GyM61tqhBlvMAg0DdAyrlzEqkS7aNuAMsO4Vm_3aRiWjSXZyGfm7LX5f0M1wHObUBJfrsl40f3YZ0Op-ekEqBRJ3WbRR3TaPcHXwQ221nBRvc_07veq5YhVNejN6jAONLRoQVL_BNXBA9XP0hW4BD3_oQCAzWeHJ28pyV8-5WqkhFHk9Y8Cx6m4zzd7c3QIlcGAvbA3wBkjue_RPT6xfbcZqcolF8LHrgCJ1FZqmRXUB6gXV5uV)

Peter,
---
As we start a new month, I just wanted to take a moment to check in with you.

We met our February goal, and it’s entirely due to the generosity of patriots like you.

I am so incredibly grateful for all of your support.

With your help, we’ll defend and expand our House majority and get to work setting America back up for success after the disastrous Biden Administration.

I can’t wait to see all we accomplish from now until election day. Together, I know we can win.

In service,

---
| | Col. Mike WaltzSpecial Forces Green Beret
U.S. Congressman (R-FL)

body:
Winning this seat is more important than ever. |

The writing is on the wall, team. After Super Tuesday, it’s all but official: former President Donald Trump will once again be the Republican nominee in the presidential election this November. The GOP is lining up behind Trump — a candidate making openly anti-democratic assertions while facing 91 criminal charges — _and our democracy is on the line._ **Now, it’s more important than ever that we win this race in Delaware. We need Sarah McBride fighting for us in Congress alongside a Democratic majority.** **[Will you make a $5 contribution right now to elect Sarah in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80641185/459963037/-2061133836?refcode=em20240309&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTc1ZGFkNy0zY2RlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jxJSHhrapOemrjNur4kfHHFjbty3GN-ngDaD72dCe84=)** As an advocate and a state senator, Sarah has earned a real record of generating meaningful results, including passing paid family and medical leave. clean_body: Winning this seat is more important than ever. | The writing is on the wall, team. After Super Tuesday, it’s all but official: former President Donald Trump will once again be the Republican nominee in the presidential election this November. The GOP is lining up behind Trump — a candidate making openly anti-democratic assertions while facing 91 criminal charges — and our democracy is on the line. Now, it’s more important than ever that we win this race in Delaware. We need Sarah McBride fighting for us in Congress alongside a Democratic majority. = As an advocate and a state senator, Sarah has earned a real record of generating meaningful results, including passing paid family and medical leave. She will be ready to get to work for Delaware on day one as our sole member of Congress. And with MAGA Republicans putting our future at risk, there is real urgency in the fight to elect a proven Democratic leader like Sarah to be our voice in Washington. = Thank you for your support, Michaela Kurinsky-Malos Campaign Manager, Team McBride | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware McBride for Delaware P.O. body:
Janelle knows firsthand the importance of educational opportunity. But these days, access to quality, affordable education feels out of reach for so many families across the country.
From elementary school to college, students across the country are only a few weeks away from heading home for the highly-anticipated winter break – but, this year, final exams don’t seem like the scariest thing on the horizon.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80642464/459963888/476240636?refcode=em_eng_2024.03.08_b1_tb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZhMzFjYjYtM2RkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KGHNEVNJk3h6UCXVg0llDScPsHW8UXtLnCyYICBzoVg=) Janelle knows firsthand the importance of educational opportunity. But these days, access to quality, affordable education feels out of reach for so many families across the country. The cost of higher education is skyrocketing and teachers and students don’t have the resources they need to succeed inside and outside the classroom. **If educational opportunity is essential to creating a better America, Congress needs to act like it. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80642465/459963889/-141502317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZhMzFjYjYtM2RkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KGHNEVNJk3h6UCXVg0llDScPsHW8UXtLnCyYICBzoVg=&emci=c8d0031e-09db-ee11-85f9-002248223197&emdi=4fa31cb6-3dde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=14434323)
_Janelle’s 5th grade class._ Throughout her entire career in public service, Janelle has always fought to build pathways for young people to get ahead through education. **Janelle won’t stop fighting to ensure every Oregonian can get ahead through quality education** – _but she needs you in the fight alongside her._ **[If you agree that we need to invest in our public schools so that every child has access to a high-quality education, add your name here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80642466/459963890/-141502317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZhMzFjYjYtM2RkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KGHNEVNJk3h6UCXVg0llDScPsHW8UXtLnCyYICBzoVg=&emci=c8d0031e-09db-ee11-85f9-002248223197&emdi=4fa31cb6-3dde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=14434323)** | [**Sign on »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80642467/459963891/-141502317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZhMzFjYjYtM2RkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KGHNEVNJk3h6UCXVg0llDScPsHW8UXtLnCyYICBzoVg=&emci=c8d0031e-09db-ee11-85f9-002248223197&emdi=4fa31cb6-3dde-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=14434323)

name: Colin Allred
subject: It's official: I'm the Democratic nominee for Senate in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I'm the official Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate against Ted Cruz.
Now, the real fight begins. I'm ready to outwork, outraise, and out-organize Ted Cruz to win this thing, and with multiple polls already showing me TIED with Ted, I'm confident we can do it. But I also know Cruz is backed by wealthy mega donors who will spend whatever it takes to keep him in office.
That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you chip in $15 – or whatever you can spare – to help reach my $1 million General Election Kickoff goal?
Every dollar you can spare will power our people-powered movement through Election Day so we can defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Will you help kick our campaign off in a huge way by donating $15 or more to me and Serve America right now? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I’m a fourth generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full-ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where my wife, Aly, and I are now raising our family.
I ran for Congress in 2018 because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream. I also saw that our democracy was in peril and wanted to be part of protecting it. No one gave me a chance in that race, but I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent. Since then, I'm proud to have been named the most bipartisan member of the Texas delegation.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: firing Ted Cruz and being the voice all Texans need in the Senate. We're already better off than we were in 2018, with experts calling Cruz the most vulnerable GOP Senator in the country, and two polls in a row showing us tied. I'm not saying it will be easy, but with you on my grassroots team, I know we can get it done.
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a General Election Founding Donor and help reach our ambitious $1 million goal. We need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz, and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, rush $15, or whatever you can spare, to help me and Serve America win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz, and give Texans the leadership we deserve. → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for being a part of my team. Your support has gotten me this far, and it's why I know we can win.
Let's do this,
Colin Allred
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

In light of President Biden's recent State of the Union address, (or was that really just a campaign speech?) We fact-checked his assertion regarding efforts to address the border problem.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=55d04e0cdc&e=567664f14c)

Warm regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti

name: Marc Molinaro
subject: My Dem opponent just said the quiet part out loud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US

subject: Perry's the only "radical" one here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
body:
Dare we say, Scott Perry is the one who's obsessed with the "Radical Left"?

Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=G%2FUhOa7TyUuhFBMgz1%2B1ulfmp2nzyPS4i18cpKcr1n42YCMQsPNwuhlkHUqhb%2BcrFVJ%2BoupqZV267oE%2FHtEK7%2BYTJ2wyRtUUIGGmONBlcmr0nOU4mwlehlqSCdMNwyfraC%2BFevVH4Hypzv7LY4%2FEMHY9YUaSZoZLfoviwkmNC%2FCYvVKmT2TgFDCjnj97lDRnEGK%2FLO%2BLQZUIBGk%2BimOB6XmWLWFZ8MQXasT8xtUHVMAbgrSKKbnBhESRkAil310Yc8VxbRGMLuqUcB%2B6R0K5ElsB4bsa%2FFT073FAyc2BYpMa8IEMTYEGHioqc8emR4SIpcY%2BOgmv2N2g2ZIfGK5j9IUHd4eDXVZH1cEkBXZ3LC4lW%2BciX2c5qDOHro38ScJZXckvFA4TUVoSwAbDq9vND6D0pAOuNult%2FatmRNYCUuOvA33zUlM6LvnIdkq%2BnnBy)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80643818/459966061/-529110805?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_030924_1_1_RadLeft&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjEzOGIwZjktM2VkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FpV8M5MYp3yL6s9Y2qUHeG0s59s-QXlkg_5JcrOQiis=) Team —

Despite a legacy marked by extremism and the Capitol Hill insurrection, Scott Perry sure likes to talk a lot about Joe Biden and the "Radical Left." He recently claimed that the "Radical Left" has an obsession with Donald Trump, but we can't see anyone talking about the "Radical Left" as much as Perry. Dare we say, _he's_ the one who's obsessed?

**We just cracked open a dictionary because we think Perry needs a refresher of what the word "Radical" actually means.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80643823/459966062/-529110805?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_030924_1_1_RadLeft&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjEzOGIwZjktM2VkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FpV8M5MYp3yL6s9Y2qUHeG0s59s-QXlkg_5JcrOQiis=) We can't help but notice the number of times "extreme" comes up along with an example of the word used in a phrase being "radical right."

This is just another classic play of MAGA Republican projection — accuse Democratic champions like Janelle of being "radical" and extreme when the only radical in the room with us is Scott Perry.

Janelle Stelson isn't running for office to start political fights and point fingers. She's running for Congress to fight for democracy, protect your rights, and ensure every Central Pennsylvanian actually feels heard in Congress. \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: AOTL HQ
Date: Thu, Mar 7, 2024
Subject: Will you recommit to fair redistricting?

> Friends,
> There’s no “off season” in redistricting — it’s a perpetual fight, and it’s happening _right now._
> **That’s why last week, All On The Line, alongside our affiliates, announced our most ambitious initiative yet: our 10 Year Plan to build a more representative democracy.**
> Every single day, we’re working to protect fair maps, combat ongoing gerrymandering, and prepare for upcoming redistricting battles in key states — but we need to know you’re right here alongside us.

> Look, we don’t need to tell you just how much of a threat partisan gerrymandering poses to the very fabric of our democracy. We’re up against powerful and dangerous forces that want to undermine redistricting reforms, elect Election Deniers, and try to jam through rigged maps at a moment’s notice.
> **But what they don’t realize is that we have a secret weapon: YOU!**
> If you join the countless others from every corner of the country who are recommitting to fighting for a fair redistricting process, we’ll be able to continue to build momentum for fair maps and safeguard our democracy.
> [**So please, add your name today to become a fair maps champion! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80643559/459965752/779549763?source=20240309_AOTL_F_RecommitRedux_RedLiteXSigners&refcode=20240309_AOTL_F_RecommitRedux_RedLiteXSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzYzgyY2Q0LTNlZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rRcPe3dioOmqkFYw1kQMaNeVHUXjzxSJMvUPZ23OjcE=&emci=7b529ba0-7cdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=d3c82cd4-3ede-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=8431045)

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: My Candid View of Our Union 🇺🇸 [Must Watch]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Let's rebuild our nation and fulfill the promise of America.

|
---
| | | [**Let's rebuild our nation and fulfill the promise of America.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
As an independent candidate for President of the United States, I am reaching out to you with a critical message about the state of our union.
Growing up, I witnessed an America that seemed to have achieved its promise as an exemplary nation – a beacon of freedom, prosperity, and peace. Unfortunately, over the past few decades, we have lost touch with that vision.
Now, we face serious challenges such as chronic illness, violence, loneliness, depression, division, and more. Our great cities have turned into tent encampments, leaving many dispossessed Americans and undocumented immigrants living in despair.
It's evident that our government institutions have faltered and that our leaders have forgotten the difference between true leadership and bullying. The values of integrity and moral authority that were once synonymous with America are now a distant memory.
But here's the good news: we can still restore the America we almost had, the America that was the envy of the world. We just need to be honest with ourselves and recognize the reality we face.
_Our country is hungry for healing._
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=5)
---
Everywhere I go, I see Americans who are determined to come together and rebuild. We may have become the sickest country on earth, but we also possess ingenious healers, innovative recovery solutions, and dynamic regenerative farmers.
Our economic problems are undeniable, but we also have ambitious entrepreneurs who can turn the tide. Hunger and homelessness may persist, but our philanthropic rates and bottomless kindness show that we have the compassion and resilience to make a difference.
Although it may seem that our nation is more divided than ever, I firmly believe that Americans everywhere want to bridge that divide. We are tired of being manipulated by fear, and we reject the politics of divisiveness.
In fact, 80% of Americans are tired of being forced to choose between the lesser of two evils. We no longer want to vote against something or someone; we want to vote for hope, healing, and an inspiring vision for America's future.
So, I invite you to join me in this journey of restoration. Together, we can end the forever foreign wars, clean out the corrupt Washington establishment, and turn towards a future of peace, freedom, good health, and prosperity.
To hear more about my vision and how we can work towards reclaiming the America we once knew, [I encourage you to watch this video:](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=6)
[WATCH NOW](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=7)
Remember, when we unite behind this vision, we become unstoppable. Let's rebuild our nation and fulfill the promise of America.
Thank you for your support, and may God bless America.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
Independent Candidate for President of the United States
[P.S. Your contribution is crucial to our efforts to rebuild America. Please consider making a donation today to support our cause.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=8)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-sotu-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=9)
|

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=PJjXLMlymU0n-OTqjg_TpbAIaCRYmvQY1HDziCNjhltpQB6ASK6MFbMK1Me4mgvz&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=11) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=8i_UFb6nr4zPXnY0WZkWD67i3lfoHfR3YIz42qE4mBAHRv1c-d1rtD-NbXVnJVMz&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=12) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=qVvjbYZFPGk-dgj1f2bqfL0-YRfFzv-GdJQeEtD6DqI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=13) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=Z_o1v5uRNRxRYZz5aguEakB2YYT3YdTbArbpHdZXt1SqN_UvyW6It3Eikxl9299S&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=14) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6EQ6sUlCj-zytkS_cwzfZ4t1sgt_WFGzO2WU_Wl6NSz5R7TkzLPnM4yy7PyWFvTa3IEquugMhTQkNDFbFnqxSg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=15) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=m5zNBfrS_ADBCs93FfGYjsnFn9jHPwuFV0Wfsg_mW1ikaBeQs48Gcry8jiG-lI3C&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sotu_video_3_9_24_r_nd3&n=16)

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Trump: "If we win Michigan, we win the election"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team — Michigan could very well decide the winner of the 2024 presidential election. We know it. You know it. Even Donald Trump knows it. Just take a look at the headline below published in _Bridge Michigan._ 👇 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80644353/459967040/1253923692?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240309_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUwNjkzMzctM2ZkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3uX42pt_yggvtgDcIz9Z_zEnDSwdrVquRKOw20Afi94=) **Michigan could be the state that delivers the 270th electoral vote in November and decides our next president.[Will you consider chipping in $10 or whatever you can today to help us deliver Michigan’s 15 electoral votes to President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala to put them on track to win reelection?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80644360/459967044/1253923692?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240309_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUwNjkzMzctM2ZkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3uX42pt_yggvtgDcIz9Z_zEnDSwdrVquRKOw20Afi94=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80644370/459967057/1253923692?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240309_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUwNjkzMzctM2ZkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3uX42pt_yggvtgDcIz9Z_zEnDSwdrVquRKOw20Afi94=)
---
Michigan was one of the most competitive states in the 2020 presidential election, and polls show it will be _even closer_ this year.
Donald Trump believes that he has a legitimate shot of winning Michigan, which is why he’s going to pour an enormous amount of resources into our state to put him one step closer to winning the White House.
Big money donors will flood our state with millions of dollars. The biggest names in Republican politics will come here to campaign. His team will hire countless campaign staff and blast the airwaves with television, digital, and radio ads to spread his message.
**And if we want to keep Michigan blue and defeat Republican extremism again, we’re going to need to start working _now_ to make sure that we don’t have any regrets once the election is over.**
One of the best ways that you can get involved is by chipping in to our movement so we’ll have the resources we need to spread our message and show voters just how extreme Trump’s agenda is.
And there’s no better time than today to start getting involved in the effort to defeat Trump and his extremist agenda.
**The stakes are extraordinarily high. From bragging about appointing the judges who overturned _Roe v. Wade_ to standing against Michigan’s workers, Trump would take our state down a path of extremism that Michiganders have proven time and again they don’t want to go down.**

Donald Trump believes that he has a legitimate shot of winning Michigan, which is why he’s going to pour an enormous amount of resources into our state to put him one step closer to winning the White House. Big money donors will flood our state with millions of dollars. The biggest names in Republican politics will come here to campaign. His team will hire countless campaign staff and blast the airwaves with television, digital, and radio ads to spread his message. And if we want to keep Michigan blue and defeat Republican extremism again, we’re going to need to start working now to make sure that we don’t have any regrets once the election is over. One of the best ways that you can get involved is by chipping in to our movement so we’ll have the resources we need to spread our message and show voters just how extreme Trump’s agenda is. | | Friend, If you watched the State of the Union address on Thursday, you heard President Biden talk about the importance of voting rights. We’ve been talking for _years_ about how dangerous voter suppression is and how it is incredibly damaging to our democracy. The right to the ballot box is fundamental to our democracy, and politicians across the country are trying their hardest to take that away to ensure that they stay in power. And we’re with President Biden when he said that we need to pass the _Freedom to Vote Act_ now. The _FTVA_ will increase election security, minimize the impact of Big Money in our elections, and expand voter registration, among other ways to put power back in the hands of the American people. With voter suppression efforts on the rise nationwide, the _FTVA_ is what we need to protect our democracy and ensure that every single citizen has the ability to freely vote. [**With all of the attacks on our democracy, the**** _Freedom to Vote Act_****is more necessary than ever. Free and fair elections are a cornerstone of American democracy and we need to protect them at all costs. We know that you understand how important voting is, so please, contribute $10 right now so we can keep up our work to pass the**** _Freedom to Vote Act_****.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80644851/459968223/444630146?refcode=3-10-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0NTcxYWNlLTNmZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B8pE88PadFNG2rlEG1uJdP4aDxT8zfAhtEyiEowfex4=) Our President, Tiffany Muller, said that “the only way to safeguard and protect our democracy is to reject the abhorrent threats posed by election deniers and pass this bill. The _Freedom to Vote Act_ will pull back the curtain on the dark money that is corrupting our politics—and it will ensure that the voice of the people is no longer drowned out by big political donors and special interests. These reforms will ensure that our government is always putting the interests of everyday families first.” **[**The American people deserve better than the shameful voter suppression and election denying that is happening throughout the country. It is 2024 and it’s beyond time to pass the**** _Freedom to Vote Act_****and protect and expand voting rights. If you’re ready to join us and push for free and fair elections, please chip in $10 today. The future of our democracy is dependent on all of us.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80644852/459968224/444630146?refcode=3-10-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0NTcxYWNlLTNmZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B8pE88PadFNG2rlEG1uJdP4aDxT8zfAhtEyiEowfex4=)** **Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

subject: Protect our neighborhoods from toxic drilling.

body:
We’re sick and tired of this.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80645500/459969412/1328794144?refcode=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ms=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMTVlYWEzLTQwZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=94yk4GtEdJpVkCVLTEtJSnYF0sDsAlrTz0M-DkCmIw8=&emci=ff621def-6fdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
Last month, Bakersfield, California, became a stark reminder of the dangers we face from Big Oil’s disregard for our communities and our environment. A pipe ruptured in front of Buena Vista Elementary, spilling up to 10 barrels of crude oil into an intersection where parents gather to pick up their kids from school. But this isn't an isolated incident. In 2023 alone, California's Office of Spill Prevention and Response was on the ground for about 300 incidents, due to severity or threats to water and wildlife. **[We're fed up and ready to act—are you? Chip in anything you can today to help us fight back against Big Oil and build a cleaner, safer future for all.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80645501/459969413/2105508926?refcode=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ms=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMTVlYWEzLTQwZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=94yk4GtEdJpVkCVLTEtJSnYF0sDsAlrTz0M-DkCmIw8=)** **Across the country, 17 million+ people—including 2.1 million Californians—live within a mile of an active drilling well, and the health impacts are startling. Exposure can lead to birth defects, cardiovascular disease, and asthma.** And who's bearing the brunt? Our most vulnerable communities, where low-income families and people of color are living through environmental injustices every day. **Here’s the kicker: instead of taking accountability and changing course, the Oil & Gas Industry is spending millions of dollars to protect the very same operations wreaking havoc on our communities.** **And if you think Big Oil will stop at California, you’re wrong.** **[We are mobilizing to fight back, to educate voters, and to ensure that the voices of the most vulnerable are heard loud and clear. But we cannot do this alone. Your contribution today will directly support our efforts to amplify this critical message and protect millions of communities from the dangers of toxic oil drilling. Can we count on your support?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80645503/459969417/2105508926?refcode=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ms=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMTVlYWEzLTQwZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=94yk4GtEdJpVkCVLTEtJSnYF0sDsAlrTz0M-DkCmIw8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80645506/459969426/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ms=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMTVlYWEzLTQwZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=94yk4GtEdJpVkCVLTEtJSnYF0sDsAlrTz0M-DkCmIw8=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80645509/459969437/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ms=ea.2e15eaa3-40de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMTVlYWEzLTQwZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=94yk4GtEdJpVkCVLTEtJSnYF0sDsAlrTz0M-DkCmIw8=)
