[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80645670/459969817/1231903508?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240309_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMWQwOTVjLTQxZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WsuS3EmVP84JJY0DaTE-UCvBAFN6UPYMdS4iKSYpT-c=)
Peter, can I explain something?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**
Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**
[_**That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $3 between Upset the Setup and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Hi Peter,

I just got some exciting news, and I want to share this important update with our top supporters. **The League of Conservation Voters just gave me a perfect 100% score for 2023 on their congressional scorecard!** Since coming to Congress last year, I’ve fought hard to ensure our communities have clean air and water, and for common sense policies to combat climate change.

We need to flip the House and elect a Democratic majority, and that starts with keeping Rhode Island blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = With your support, we can hold our seatand elect a new majority in November that’s ready to protect our natural resources and tackle the climate crisis. = All the best, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . You can also =**.

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: News! Biden's shift to temporary 'Ceasefire,' Vote Peace in Washington, and Super Tuesday results are in!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: State of the Union: Biden Calls for Temporary 'Ceasefire' |
Pressure for Peace is Working | Mobilizing Peace Votes for Washington
Primary | Super Tuesday Victories! | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15881?t=1011&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]Our Revolution is mobilizing for Peace and it’s working. We are
investing big in our campaign for a permanent ceasefire in Gaza — and we
need your help! Thank you for being a voice for Peace.

★ ★ ★

STATE OF THE UNION

From mobilizing more than 375,000 votes for Peace in Michigan and the
Super Tuesday primaries to hearing President Biden call for a temporary
“Ceasefire” and more aid for Gaza at the State of the Union — it’s been a
big week in progressive politics.

Biden acknowledged in his speech Thursday that the 30,000 people killed in
Gaza are primarily innocent civilians, and said he will be “working
nonstop to establish an immediate ceasefire to last 6 weeks to get all the
hostages released.. and build toward something more enduring.”

This is a start. But, while he’s looking to set up a pier on the coast of
Gaza to deliver more food, medicine, and aid to the Palestinian people,
what he did not announce was an end to U.S. support and weapons fueling
Netanyahu’s War on Gaza.

That’s why we must keep up the drum beat for a true and lasting Peace. We
need a permanent ceasefire ASAP.

★ ★ ★

NEXT STOP: WASHINGTON PRIMARY

The Uncommitted Vote is gaining momentum state by state — from Michigan to
Minnesota to North Carolina, voters are sending a clear message to
President Biden: End unconditional support for Netanyahu and broker a
permanent ceasefire.

Our grassroots supporters and activists have helped turnout more than
375,000 votes across the country in just over a week. And, this Tuesday is
Washington state’s chance to be the next megaphone for Peace!

Our Revolution is mobilizing our 132,000 supporters in Washington to get
out the vote for ‘Uncommitted Delegates’ to urge Biden to change course on
Gaza and save lives.

As Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15793?t=1012&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]CalMatters
this week, this shift is also necessary for Biden to realign with the
young voters, progressives, and voters of color who won him the White
House in 2020.

“Coming off the momentum generated in Michigan, we need to continue
lifting up our voices and sending a clear message to President Biden—we
need a ceasefire now,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15880?t=1013&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]The Daily Beast. “If he doesn’t
change course, he will be putting our Democracy at risk.”

Let’s maintain our momentum - adding more “Uncommitted” votes from
Washington State to the overall tally will send a powerful message:
President Biden must realign with the values of the base or risk losing
peace voters in November.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15881?t=1014&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]This work is critical but it's also expensive. Please chip in to help
us meet our $5,000 goal to make hundreds of thousands of voter contacts by
phone, text, and email ahead of Tuesday!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Barbara Lee didn’t get across the finish line, but our work for her Senate
campaign was not in vain. Every vote for Barbara was a vote for the Peace
Candidate in this race.

Our supporters and volunteers reached out with approximately 2 MILLION
voter contacts, and we were joined along the way by Ro Khanna, Pramilia
Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush and other progressive leaders to lift up
Barbara and our issue priorities for Peace, healthcare for all,
environmental justice, housing, and much more.

We accomplished a lot in face of big money headwinds and the party machine
backing Adam Schiff. It’s unfortunate that Schiff used his plentiful
resources to elevate two-time Trump voter and Republican opponent Steve
Garvey — a strategy that may have backfired now that the two are
neck-and-neck for the general election in November.

“Despite being heavily outspent by my opponents, our values never
wavered,” Barbara said. “In every step of this campaign, we never backed
down from our progressive vision, and worked relentlessly to build a
coalition that represents communities that too often are not afforded a
seat at the table.”

★ ★ ★

CONGRATULATIONS LATEEFAH SIMON!

Our Revolution-endorsed Lateefah Simon came out on top in her race for
Congress, and now heads to the general election to succeed Barbara Lee in
California’s District 12.

As a veteran organizer and advocate for civil rights and social justice,
Lateefah is sure to carry on Barbara’s legacy in the seat.

She will bring a strong voice for universal healthcare, peace, housing,
reproductive justice, and more. As Barbara said, “Lateefah is from the
community and for the community.”

★ ★ ★

CONGRATULATIONS MARISOL RUBIO!

Our Revolution is excited to report that Marisol Rubio has succeeded in
her primary race for CA State Senate in District 9, and will be heading to
the general election in November!

As state senator, Marisol Rubio will dedicate more resources towards
California’s housing crisis, tackle homelessness, fight for healthcare
justice, and treat the climate crisis with the urgency it requires.

Votes are still being counted in California, and we’re happy to report
that many of our candidates are in the lead but we can’t announce them
just yet. Stay tuned for more progressive victories!

★ ★ ★

As the 2024 elections get into full swing, we’d love to hear from you
about candidates our members are excited about! Email our political team
at political@ourrevolution.com to nominate candidates for Our Revolution’s
endorsement.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024
to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for
the crucial battles to come.

Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to
take back the House, and elect strong, progressive leaders to turn this
ship around.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13109?t=1015&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks or commit to a recurring
donation to help us staff up and get to work — there’s no time to waste!

★ ★ ★

AIPAC lobbyists are already preparing to spend more than $100 MILLION to
try to unseat some of our strongest peace champions in Congress, including
Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, and
others.

Progressives are under attack for demanding a Ceasefire and an end to the
killing of thousands of Palestinian civilians and children — and we must
have their back in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13830?t=1016&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]Help fund our phone banks, texting, and voter-to-voter mobilization to
defend and expand progressive power in Congress and beyond. We must make
sure our most powerful anti-war voices are not silenced by big money in
2024.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1017&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ][IMG]

From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an
organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re
already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an
official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly
donation today!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1018&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1019&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?refcode=revreport&amount=&t=1020&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=5441%2E5885482%2E2JtsP6 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Housing production bill headed to my desk!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter,

ICYMI — My housing production bill, the ONLY legislation I introduced this session, has passed through the Oregon legislature and is headed to my desk for my signature!

Oregonians are struggling under the pressure of an increasingly unaffordable housing market. After hearing this concern directly from Oregonians from across our state last year, I knew we had to make major progress on our housing crisis during this year’s legislative session.

My bill — plus a companion bill of additional investments — offer a menu of tools that will provide the support needed to ease our housing crisis and help all our communities thrive. I believe this package will make meaningful progress in fixing our housing supply problem while also protecting our cherished land use system and our environmental values.

But this is not the finish line. We have more work ahead to solve our housing and homelessness crises – and I will keep pushing for more because the need is so great. Oregonians are counting on us to deliver.

I want to thank legislators for meeting the urgency of this moment and providing much-needed funding that will boost housing production throughout the state .

Best wishes,

Tina
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]
Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Y1j1SgO_eE68pZrYeExkuA2?unsubscribedata=%2Fxlde7C2oQUahnkubLAWgXfDLbO9riC4%2Bdk59JrJ%2Bo4I8so9wyLFFRHFBsOYa5tNt9CTFReWv8v4lggN6gt0Wc18ddxVEFfdaLCOFl%2Be3AdIWI5RmR68VKdRIMJ0%2BUOSO6b0vMQXbDOe5v5roTPqexoRY3oTbwLFWCQz6DAW%2FdhNew5QFUzISsxL0MA8RmQ%2BHvX2fToYLZG16jFgP6MVIgXcsLQIM7pKO4GVghultvXsryeXClcc36AbGQy04HVIE4PYUG%2FtW7nImp2xmlw5vDJZAP2VjFImLeWhXIzxF20qDfpWZ2SsasmNqoUDu%2BbMwsNmA6XOcXOPtfYlgb2w43oW2%2B%2FsmJcLN%2Fpn1KrBcTBF49ik%2F4yzaPTxXLWPGCcicURz78prF6beszcWcf692Ot0rYKZ8%2FghuwVXrDrOm5Or887bVkUTKmaxCA32gsBk]

name: James Carville
subject: Not talkin’ out my a$$
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, what can I say to get you to donate $5 to Bob Casey’s re-election campaign today?
If you don’t need any convincing, chip in here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240309-2?refcode=em20240309-2](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240309-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240309-2&refcode2=2259_552475_XWIwzj&akid=2259%2E552475%2EXWIwzj)**
What if I said that there’s absolutely NO WAY we keep the Senate (and the White House) blue without Pennsylvania?
Or that Bob’s opponent is a mega-millionaire who is self-funding his campaign AND has the GOP’s entire war chest at his disposal?
Or that a right-wing outside group is already running ads against him?
Or that if Bob Casey loses, Democrats aren’t going to win anything?
**I’m not talking out my a$$ when I say the entire future of the country will depend on what happens right here in Pennsylvania, and Republicans are going to put everything they’ve got into defeating Bob and flipping this battleground red.**
[**So what do you say? Will you pitch in $5 or more to help Bob bring it home? We’ve got to win this, but we can’t do it without you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240309-2?refcode=em20240309-2&refcode2=2259_552475_XWIwzj&akid=2259%2E552475%2EXWIwzj)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._

body:
Extreme Republicans were already emboldened by the overturn of Roe v. Wade to ban and criminalize abortions in dozens of states.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80647762/459976552/-898182106?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2024-03-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ5N2EzYi00N2RlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBXplHw26Q3agz5EdYmPVBWsqutOmAZk8M_Zf9Bpe9A=)

| Peter,

Last month, the Alabama Supreme Court ruling threw in vitro fertilization (IVF) in jeopardy by granting personhood to frozen embryos.

Make no mistake, this is another attempt by extreme Republicans to strip people of their bodily autonomy. This ruling is not an isolated issue; it is a clear indication of a broader agenda to dismantle reproductive rights piece by piece across the United States.

Extreme Republicans were already emboldened by the overturn of _**Roe v. Wade**_ to ban and criminalize abortions in dozens of states. It’s crucial we continue to push back.

**I remain steadily focused on protecting reproductive rights in Congress and codifying _Roe v. Wade_ nationwide. [_I need your help to send a clear message that the vast majority of us stand for reproductive freedom. Will you add your name to my petition to demand the protection of reproductive rights?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80647764/459976554/-673291956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQ5N2EzYi00N2RlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBXplHw26Q3agz5EdYmPVBWsqutOmAZk8M_Zf9Bpe9A=&emci=b23abefb-6ddd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=95497a3b-47de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=6681226)**

Pentagon Denies Reports US Airdrops Killed 5 Palestinians

The Pentagon denied reports emerging Friday that U.S. airdrops of
humanitarian aid over Gaza malfunctioned, causing several injuries and
deaths. Reports coming out of Gaza said the falling aid packages
struck and killed at least five Palestinians and injured others after
the parachute mechanism failed, according to The Jerusalem Post.

Freedom Caucus Rep Won’t Run For Reelection After Short-Lived Senate
Bid

Republican Rep. Matt Rosendale of Montana withdrew his bid for
reelection following his short-lived Senate campaign, he announced
Friday. Rosendale dropped out of the Republican primary race to oust

name: Tim Kaine
subject: No way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I know this team can stop Trump if we work together.
I know this team can stop Trump if we work together.
| | |
---
Folks, Donald Trump just threw down the gauntlet.

He stood in my city — Richmond, Virginia ... where I got married, where I raised my three kids, where I served on City Council, as Mayor, as Lieutenant Governor, and as Governor — and he said he’s going to win Virginia in November.

No way.
[**_I won’t let it happen — and I know this team can stop him if we work together. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

third-party “Unity Ticket” in the 2024 general election, according to
a press release. No Labels had been weighing such a bid for months to
serve as an alternative to both former President Donald Trump and

Peter, Donald Trump is trying (and failing) to rewrite his abysmal record as president. Wade_ and bragged about it when they did. **We’ll end this email with one truth, Peter:** Donald Trump can’t be trusted to protect everyday Americans, and he’s telling us exactly who he is and what he does. Here's the thing, I honestly never thought that I'd run for office one day. I'm not a polished politician, but I am a polished public servant.

But I took this leap of faith because I've always cared about being a public servant. To me, doing real good work and making a positive impact on others is my life's purpose.

That's what drew me to be a Capitol police officer for the last 15 years. And now, it's calling me to be the next Congressman from Maryland's 3rd district.

The fire inside me to defend our democracy is burning brighter than ever. Because our democracy is fragile. Everything we care about – voting rights, abortion access, economic opportunities – it's all on the line this year.

clean_body: He would be a disaster for border security| | | Peter, The situation here in Texas is getting drastic. Thousands of illegal immigrants are invading our country each and every day. Border patrol is being completely overwhelmed by the historic influx of unlawful crossings. Just last quarter, I was outraised by over $1.4 MILLION. Mark my words, Peter. If Colin Allred is allowed anywhere near the United States Senate, he will vote securing our southern border for I need your help to soundly defeat Allred and his open-border agenda this November. body:
This week, we heard about the Democratic agenda for our country, and we couldn’t be more inspired to keep fighting for change right here in PA-08.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80651864/459988961/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2JlOWU2OC01MWRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFLKnSo7Mx16Cbi6BUMZgxmbwqqA7AtR1AXarXlhGUE=&emci=e4c5fff3-8bdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=93be9e68-51de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

This week, we heard about the Democratic agenda for our country, and we couldn’t be more inspired to keep fighting for change right here in PA-08. **Reflecting on our past victories and fueled by the promise of a brighter future, we’re more determined than ever to push forward.**

**In the last _three years,_ Democrats have helped create a record 15 MILLION new jobs (including 800,000 new manufacturing jobs!) and unemployment is at a 50-year low.** Matt and his colleagues have helped ensure that our inflation is the _lowest in the world_ and that it keeps trending lower, delivering for the American people.

**But we’re not done yet.** We’re determined to pass the PRO Act to help strengthen union rights because we know: the middle class built the country, and **unions built the middle class.**

Democrats are also working to ensure that **access to quality, affordable healthcare is a right, not a privilege.** In the last few years, we’ve helped _expand_ Medicare’s price-negotiating powers AND fought to protect our Social Security benefits from the onslaught of GOP attacks. But there’s still so much work to do, Peter.

Matt is committed to fighting for these crucial priorities and more, but he can’t do it alone. [**Will you add your name to support our agenda and help Matt improve lives in PA-08 and across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80651865/459988962/43859337?ms=em24_240308_sotu_adv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&refcode=em24_240308_sotu_adv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&source=em24_240308_sotu_adv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240308_sotu_adv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=e9BmcqfEj8c/CtDsD0K2cdfD4/wSg0jQSIxZMx6IciRTvqohwcVtqP0SGx0xOcnkFMC3Uw8xk0dd99a3+4v+00P715foXnTQipmanAPud95SUh7q1qtZPxKbbHgVVghkigLsvte3nOqMIX7JQ4EFZLqx8d0y5tIlUMctSwkclaM=&refcode2=93be9e68-51de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2JlOWU2OC01MWRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFLKnSo7Mx16Cbi6BUMZgxmbwqqA7AtR1AXarXlhGUE=&emci=e4c5fff3-8bdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=93be9e68-51de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=23311593) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80651866/459988963/43859337?ms=em24_240308_sotu_adv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&refcode=em24_240308_sotu_adv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&source=em24_240308_sotu_adv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240308_sotu_adv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=e9BmcqfEj8c/CtDsD0K2cdfD4/wSg0jQSIxZMx6IciRTvqohwcVtqP0SGx0xOcnkFMC3Uw8xk0dd99a3+4v+00P715foXnTQipmanAPud95SUh7q1qtZPxKbbHgVVghkigLsvte3nOqMIX7JQ4EFZLqx8d0y5tIlUMctSwkclaM=&refcode2=93be9e68-51de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2JlOWU2OC01MWRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFLKnSo7Mx16Cbi6BUMZgxmbwqqA7AtR1AXarXlhGUE=&emci=e4c5fff3-8bdd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=93be9e68-51de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=23311593)

body:
Help Elect A Public School Teacher To Congress! | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65ecc2f2deec4152688d1d6c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tanyafortx27.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65ecbee8a96cc4630a057968%26ss_email_id%3D65ecc2f2deec4152688d1d6c%26ss_campaign_name%3DProud%2Bto%2Bbe%2Byour%2BTX-27%2BNominee%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-03-09T20%253A14%253A08Z&w=658f0ec36f3fe00284167a1e&c=b_65ecbee8a96cc4630a057968&l=en-US&s=IxPaZVhtfQEyrVgfxgNeZWjeK2E%3D)
---
|
## **Proud to be your TX-27 Nominee!**
---
Hi Peter,This week, _The Associated Press_ called the race for the CD-27 Democratic Primary. **I am proud to be our nominee challenging Rep. Michael Cloud.** In the past 2 months, we put over 5,000 miles on our car, driving from Lockhart to Bastrop to Gonzales to Goliad to Victoria to Robstown to Corpus Christi to North Padre Island, meeting with constituents of the 27th Congressional District.From hundreds, if not thousands of conversations, one thing was abundantly clear: **Our neighbors are ready for a change in Congress.** I decided to run for Congress because I couldn’t remain silent about the extreme attacks on our reproductive rights, public education, and our democracy. It turns out that I am not alone in feeling this way.
**This race is winnable if we have the funding to get out our message across the 14 counties of this district. **Please consider supporting our campaign, whether by chipping in $27, $50, or $100. Every dime you give our campaign will help us stand up to Michael Cloud’s MAGA extremism and fight for the values we hold dear.
---
[_ _ DONATE HERE _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65ecc2f2deec4152688d1d6c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftanya_email&w=658f0ec36f3fe00284167a1e&c=b_65ecbee8a96cc4630a057968&l=en-US&s=5oiIiqVOQS3FfJvoffT92J3frVU%3D)
---
Let’s do this!Tanya

subject: Week 9: Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fe90ad6803&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

On Monday, I had a very sweet and earnest college student named Cori from Grand Canyon University shadow me for most of the day. She got to witness the "behind-the-scenes" of what it’s like to be a legislator from sitting in on legislative meetings to attending a two hour Committee on Finance and Commerce hearing. I met Cori at last week’s Arizona Right to Life’s Leap of Faith [event](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a60300f3e4&e=a7ab36849c) hosted on the Capitol’s Senate lawn. I invited her to shadow me and she took me up on the offer right on the spot! I was slated to have a few bills up in the House Committee on Military Affairs and Public Safety on Monday, but the hearing was cancelled considering many of the Representatives traveled to Israel this week.

Each Tuesday we have a caucus meeting to go through a list of legislation that is about to come to the floor of the Senate. We are now actively reviewing legislation sent to the Senate from the House. Also, I hosted the “Doctor of the Day” from Legislative District 2. It was sweet to learn that Dr. Kogan honorably served our country during the Vietnam War in the U.S. Navy. He practices gastroenterology in the Sun City area.

On Wednesday, the Senate had a very long day – even worse I woke up not feeling well. By the end of the day, my body finally succumbed to the flu. We reported to the floor of the Senate at 10am and didn’t finish up until later in the afternoon. I was able to keep my eyes open long enough to drive home after the Senate Committee on Education after 4pm. Yes, I crashed for the next two days.

**Progress of Legislation**

Quite a few of my bills are receiving a hearing over in the House. This past week a criminal justice reform [bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f6483aaf9b&e=a7ab36849c) I sponsored unanimously passed out of the House Committee on the Judiciary. Next week, I have quite a few bills receiving a hearing in the House Committee on Military Affairs and Public Safety, Ways and Means, Commerce, Education, and Government. Thank you to everyone who has worked with me on these very important issues.

**Holding the Line**

If the Republicans don’t maintain the majority this coming November, you can bet the Democrats will work with Hobbs to turn Arizona into California. If you don’t believe me, these are just a handful of bills sponsored by Democrats the past few legislative sessions:
* [repeal](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=63602c3049&e=a7ab36849c) Arizona’s universal school choice program that was passed and signed into law in 2022
* [repeal](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1623118ea1&e=a7ab36849c) the popular School Tuition Organization scholarship program
* [allow](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2a281ba669&e=a7ab36849c) biological boys to compete in girls’ only sports
* [repeal](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ef096f35a9&e=a7ab36849c) Arizona’s “right to work” status
* [add](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=cbe99364bb&e=a7ab36849c) a state income tax equal to 1% of net worth
* [raise](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b662cda37f&e=a7ab36849c) Arizona’s minimum wage by 4.5%
* [increase](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d2a5f2780a&e=a7ab36849c) the corporate income tax by 12.2%
* [levy](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5c44dd8d60&e=a7ab36849c) an additional 16.5% “privilege tax” on online lodging marketplace
* [criminalize](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f79abc7fd7&e=a7ab36849c) gun owners who fail to keep their firearms under lock and key
* [ratif](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7fd694293f&e=a7ab36849c)y the Equal Rights Amendment
* [narrow](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7872a65a4f&e=a7ab36849c) the use-of-force officers can use, hindering them from doing their jobs.

If you’d like to help the Republicans maintain the majority, please reply to this email to let me know how you’d like to help me win this State Senate seat. It is absolutely critical to keep this seat in order to maintain the majority. As you know by now, I need to raise a lot of money to have the resources to effectively compete to save this seat. If you live in Legislative District 2, and you haven’t signed my online nomination petition, yet, that is the easiest way to help me _before March 31st_. If you would like to put your handwriting to work, we are writing post cards to voters, too.

Thanks again for all your support!

Best,
Shawnna

| | **ICYMI**

_Raising Up the Next Generation_

Do you know a civics-minded high school student? It’s that time of the year when Arizona State University’s The Center for American Civics are accepting applicants for their summer [Civics Leadership Institute](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=905da21892&e=a7ab36849c) (CLI) held in Tempe the week of June 17th. There isn’t a price of admission, but there is a student [application](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=264a69fe13&e=a7ab36849c) to be admitted to this elite program. Participants will engage in political thought to gain a deeper understanding of the U.S. Constitution. If you know of a high school sophomore, junior or senior who might benefit from CLI, please forward this information onto them. The deadline to submit applications is March 25, 2024, at 11:59 pm.

_Wanted: Poll Observers for the Presidential Preference Election (PPE)_

Do you want to observe a polling place these last two weeks of the PPE? The GOP is looking to recruit and train poll observers for its election day infrastructure for the July and November elections. Starting now is the best thing you can do to leave an impact. If you’d like to participate in an upcoming training, here are a few opportunities to do so:

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Freedom Fighters, On Monday, I had a very sweet and earnest college student named Cori from Grand Canyon University shadow me for most of the day. She got to witness the "behind-the-scenes" of what it’s like to be a legislator from sitting in on legislative meetings to attending a two hour Committee on Finance and Commerce hearing. I met Cori at last week’s Arizona Right to Life’s Leap of Faith hosted on the Capitol’s Senate lawn. I invited her to shadow me and she took me up on the offer right on the spot! I was slated to have a few bills up in the House Committee on Military Affairs and Public Safety on Monday, but the hearing was cancelled considering many of the Representatives traveled to Israel this week. Each Tuesday we have a caucus meeting to go through a list of legislation that is about to come to the floor of the Senate. We are now actively reviewing legislation sent to the Senate from the House. Also, I hosted the “Doctor of the Day” from Legislative District 2. It was sweet to learn that Dr. Kogan honorably served our country during the Vietnam War in the U.S. Navy. He practices gastroenterology in the Sun City area. On Wednesday, the Senate had a very long day – even worse I woke up not feeling well. By the end of the day, my body finally succumbed to the flu. We reported to the floor of the Senate at 10am and didn’t finish up until later in the afternoon. I was able to keep my eyes open long enough to drive home after the Senate Committee on Education after 4pm. Yes, I crashed for the next two days. Progress of Legislation Quite a few of my bills are receiving a hearing over in the House. This past week a criminal justice reform I sponsored unanimously passed out of the House Committee on the Judiciary. Next week, I have quite a few bills receiving a hearing in the House Committee on Military Affairs and Public Safety, Ways and Means, Commerce, Education, and Government. Thank you to everyone who has worked with me on these very important issues. Holding the Line If the Republicans don’t maintain the majority this coming November, you can bet the Democrats will work with Hobbs to turn Arizona into California. If you don’t believe me, these are just a handful of bills sponsored by Democrats the past few legislative sessions: Arizona’s universal school choice program that was passed and signed into law in 2022 the popular School Tuition Organization scholarship program biological boys to compete in girls’ only sports Arizona’s “right to work” status a state income tax equal to 1% of net worth Arizona’s minimum wage by 4.5% the corporate income tax by 12.2% an additional 16.5% “privilege tax” on online lodging marketplace gun owners who fail to keep their firearms under lock and key the Equal Rights Amendment the use-of-force officers can use, hindering them from doing their jobs. If you’d like to help the Republicans maintain the majority, please reply to this email to let me know how you’d like to help me win this State Senate seat. It is absolutely critical to keep this seat in order to maintain the majority. As you know by now, I need to raise a lot of money to have the resources to effectively compete to save this seat. If you live in Legislative District 2, and you haven’t signed my online nomination petition, yet, that is the easiest way to help me before March 31st. If you would like to put your handwriting to work, we are writing post cards to voters, too. Thanks again for all your support! Best, Shawnna | P.S. Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
Peter, did you catch our Co-Executive Director Brianna Brown on theGrio Weekly with Natasha Alford??

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24]Brianna highlighted all of the incredible work TOP PAC is doing to build people power and political power in our Black and Latino communities.

Here at TOP PAC, we're fighting to break down barriers that prevent fair access to what we deserve. In 2022, our #BlackTOP GOTV campaign became the largest single investment in Black voters across the state EVER, reaching over 1.4 million voters through our #BlackTOP outreach efforts.

Brianna and Natasha discussed how it’s uniquely difficult to get out the vote in Texas. From disinformation campaigns designed to keep Black and Latino voters disenfranchised to voter suppression laws passed as recently as 2021, it’s never been more difficult to mobilize and engage voters of color — but here at TOP PAC, we’re fighting with two fists to get it done and realize the democracy of our dreams.

Getting the word out about the important work of TOP PAC on platforms like theGrio is critical to running a comprehensive voter mobilization strategy in 2024. Will you chip in to support our work now and help us continue our crucial efforts to build a Texas that works for everyone — no matter their age, race, gender, or ZIP code? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24]

Peter, now that the primary election is over, the general election starts NOW — and the stakes are higher than ever before.

In 2024, electing progressive leaders who truly represent our communities could be the difference between preserving our democracy or losing everything. It’s that serious.

Eight months until Election Day may seem like plenty of time, but when the stakes are this high, every second counts. Please chip in now to support TOP PAC’s crucial work and help us build the Texas we deserve: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-mar24]

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: This isn't over ... yet
body:

| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6c8d8b8e86b74bcfb123d5ef67d5b810&_e=-3MyddnTpyBwWwDD0maeAjQK3KCu3_JrnwDfHhBXoW7ZDh5hIdZSzkgYK9zK-3-OCz6MxcBbwVlrgCI-f_r4WjPzmm-2SKPgnGoXQKiPmeCf4y27xGgvStY7BEUEL3Bv1BlN2OdSyuyfRYgHnMpC7GOvGRVzGK-W_5m_f06eMJKoh97vg6xUx5OYqliHrUkWS4jjICq3jJorqnIc_noCspUq6qZHmDuofDrkkNrp3F-szlBAbqeu2aG4EVPmDiA9e0erHRRh18P5n85GhDmdTruU5yAnBsVb84Yl4txPjW-LgF6sdxxNQdX4vmz3BOBelXtF-vYURcDTZ7ZXqMKI6CXm8sLMIYc_FdBctcjEKFRQUnJKsP_5RmWOPqqHtY6QtkGjN5IOHcX9tZPItMGZROyOsnKoMy5DVhDfyqQEIXw%3D)

| Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. **And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6c8d8b8e86b74bcfb123d5ef67d5b810&_e=-3MyddnTpyBwWwDD0maeAjQK3KCu3_JrnwDfHhBXoW7ZDh5hIdZSzkgYK9zK-3-OCz6MxcBbwVlrgCI-f_r4WjPzmm-2SKPgnGoXQKiPmeCf4y27xGgvStY7BEUEL3Bv1BlN2OdSyuyfRYgHnMpC7GOvGRVzGK-W_5m_f06eMJKoh97vg6xUx5OYqliHrUkWS4jjICq3jJorqnIc_noCspUq6qZHmDuofDrkkNrp3F-szlBAbqeu2aG4EVPmDiA9XRgXXccoZK-UiVOrzZVhtv7FEH1seddHd_Vwk1fytsWSRg4W80QYnzx5L0ZYMJRhtQgn_9fnPtsj2yMA-l3PFnFxUp7_P0vLvlZt7HJucoFYU_zY_gjUdAAiy_Qe9L429kFsnFOYj-zXDYcnkxK2vgmyHmYnmNP8CLSs2Xy071o%3D) **We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6c8d8b8e86b74bcfb123d5ef67d5b810&_e=-3MyddnTpyBwWwDD0maeAjQK3KCu3_JrnwDfHhBXoW7ZDh5hIdZSzkgYK9zK-3-OCz6MxcBbwVlrgCI-f_r4WjPzmm-2SKPgnGoXQKiPmeCf4y27xGgvStY7BEUEL3Bv1BlN2OdSyuyfRYgHnMpC7GOvGRVzGK-W_5m_f06eMJKoh97vg6xUx5OYqliHrUkWS4jjICq3jJorqnIc_noCspUq6qZHmDuofDrkkNrp3F-szlBAbqeu2aG4EVPmDiA9ZtznMEMQWXvxmMCi8S-0ceW6l9QXkAHoCKO5TnkqeTgfMPe5wS6Vb4Z1_5dlT6-8PzVx4O5asgltu-QBn-9ZbQykxw_3oC9ps-YG8GHpflRlCgsPDAONhcvznmmVMbzzzkmTHylGTjWy5OE5_kSSk4T3eQDGaIWRw6XVV7wjYCc%3D)

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. [**Will you take one minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=6c8d8b8e86b74bcfb123d5ef67d5b810&_e=-3MyddnTpyBwWwDD0maeAjQK3KCu3_JrnwDfHhBXoW7ZDh5hIdZSzkgYK9zK-3-OCz6MxcBbwVlrgCI-f_r4WjPzmm-2SKPgnGoXQKiPmeCf4y27xGgvStY7BEUEL3Bv1BlN2OdSyuyfRYgHnMpC7GOvGRVzGK-W_5m_f06eMJKoh97vg6xUx5OYqliHrUkWS4jjICq3jJorqnIc_noCspUq6qZHmDuofDrkkNrp3F-szlBAbqeu2aG4EVPmDiA9bKFboFAnZD6iVmRC1-g2kQhqSgFZRMOykNX7n-nTMwQvxYLqLDMns3Ez-FE5PUJE_xAeTu1vK5pMWhlrURyMP7msNb_OZAaIJxxjQKbX8IEApM2H29k5eqDqX9QnljRpqfE-BND4nO4nhPcQFEwcI304CED7GW9S5yVbnrj1Yok%3D)

I'd like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year.

Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Debbie
subject: my campaign is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Rick Scott and the GOP's dirty campaign tactics
| | |
Friend, I need you to understand this. **_GOP extremists_**** _ will do absolutely anything to win Florida._**
---
That's because they aren’t in this to protect families, strengthen our democracy, or build a better future for our state. They’re in it for money and power. They don't care if their policies hurt families or if their fear-mongering and lies deepen divisions among our communities.
My campaign is different. I'm running for Senate because I believe that public service is about truly fighting for and listening to the families you swear to serve. I know that our message of unity and hope can win on Election Day. But I need your help to compete with Rick Scott and the GOP's dirty campaign tactics. **[So I'm asking 35,000 grassroots Democrats from all across the country to endorse my campaign before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Will you please sign on now to signal that we're flipping Florida blue in 2024? Your support would truly mean so much to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80652462/459990539/-238890940?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk931-su-nd&refcode=jtk931-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBkMzhiMzAtNTVkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5KnkkKZcOffTQ3NJLh-oqTekUfFN7l8wQhAYW4BAeBQ=&emci=fe88ab6b-9bdc-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=d0d38b30-55de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Endorse My Campaign >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80652463/459990540/-238890940?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk931-su-nd&refcode=jtk931-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBkMzhiMzAtNTVkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5KnkkKZcOffTQ3NJLh-oqTekUfFN7l8wQhAYW4BAeBQ=&emci=fe88ab6b-9bdc-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=d0d38b30-55de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=3969733)
---
I owe so much to this state and this country. My mother brought my family from Ecuador to America when I was only 14. Those early years weren't easy. My mom worked double shifts to afford rent in a single one room apartment, and I struggled to fit in at school where kids made fun of my accent.
But America promised us what we could never find in Ecuador: safety, financial stability, an incredible education, and the assurance that our rights would always be protected. The American Dream is worth fighting for.
So my family and I worked hard to achieve that dream. And the promise of America came true for us. I found a better life, opportunities to give back to my community, a way to serve my country, a beautiful family, and my own American Dream.
But now everything that I fought for — freedoms, financial security, and safety from political violence — is being threatened by far-right extremism. That's why I'm running for Senate. **I'm going to defeat Rick Scott this fall and win a better future for Florida — but I need your help in this critical moment to do it.**
**[Will you please add your name now to help me flip Florida blue and defeat Rick Scott? Our Senate majority is on the line here, and we need all hands on deck.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80652464/459990541/-238890940?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk931-su-nd&refcode=jtk931-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDBkMzhiMzAtNTVkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5KnkkKZcOffTQ3NJLh-oqTekUfFN7l8wQhAYW4BAeBQ=&emci=fe88ab6b-9bdc-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=d0d38b30-55de-ee11-85fb-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
I hope you know you can believe me when I say that, at the end of this month, our campaign is facing our most critical test of 2024 so far: the March FEC fundraising deadline. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80652739/459991280/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240309_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUxZWEwMGMtNTZkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pAx5CYWpn0AdJDeeEGEXEvkUyqbhGnDtZsLmQYjWXGM=)
---
Peter, People don’t trust politicians – often with good reason. I believe that the way you campaign says a lot about how you’ll act in office. You’ll often get “hair on fire” emails from candidates about their “make or break” mid-month or end-of-month deadline. There’s no such thing. So, I hope you know you can believe me when I say that, at the end of this month, our campaign is facing our most critical test of 2024 so far: **the March FEC fundraising deadline.** This isn’t some fake deadline that campaigns make up to trick supporters into donating. This deadline is **real** , and what we raise will be seen by everyone. Allow me to explain further, **[but if you’re already committed to helping us hit our goal, then chip in here to help us have a strong FEC report →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80652740/459991281/-1011897668?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240309_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUxZWEwMGMtNTZkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pAx5CYWpn0AdJDeeEGEXEvkUyqbhGnDtZsLmQYjWXGM=)** The Federal Election Commission mandates all federal campaigns publicly report how much they raised in the quarter and from how many donors. This deadline is even more critical for our campaign because this is the first quarter of the actual election year. Last year, because of you, we made history. **We broke the all-time Arizona fundraising record and were the only challenger campaign in America to outraise the incumbent every quarter.** But that means that the Trump-controlled Republican National Committee, which is dead set on holding this battleground district, will be looking at our report under a microscope to find any signs of slowed momentum. And it’s not just Republicans. All the reporters, pundits, and donors who took notice of our historic momentum last year will certainly be watching if we can sustain and grow this people-powered campaign. Hitting our end-of-quarter goal and increasing our momentum is a tall order, especially when we’re up against David Schweikert’s big-money corporate donors. But I’m not worried. We’ve been here before, and I know this grassroots team has what it takes to help us grow this campaign and win this election. Now that you know the stakes, here’s where I ask again for your support. **Peter, I'm going to be honest with you: we need to[raise $62,000](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80652741/459991282/-1011897668?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240309_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUxZWEwMGMtNTZkZS1lZTExLTg1ZmItMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pAx5CYWpn0AdJDeeEGEXEvkUyqbhGnDtZsLmQYjWXGM=) before the end of March to ensure we’re on track to hit our goal.** **[Can I count on you to donate $25, $50, or more to help this grassroots campaign today? clean_body: I hope you know you can believe me when I say that, at the end of this month, our campaign is facing our most critical test of 2024 so far: the March FEC fundraising deadline. | = Peter, People don’t trust politicians – often with good reason. I believe that the way you campaign says a lot about how you’ll act in office. You’ll often get “hair on fire” emails from candidates about their “make or break” mid-month or end-of-month deadline. There’s no such thing. So, I hope you know you can believe me when I say that, at the end of this month, our campaign is facing our most critical test of 2024 so far: the March FEC fundraising deadline. This isn’t some fake deadline that campaigns make up to trick supporters into donating. This deadline is real , and what we raise will be seen by everyone. Allow me to explain further, = The Federal Election Commission mandates all federal campaigns publicly report how much they raised in the quarter and from how many donors. This deadline is even more critical for our campaign because this is the first quarter of the actual election year. Last year, because of you, we made history. We broke the all-time Arizona fundraising record and were the only challenger campaign in America to outraise the incumbent every quarter. But that means that the Trump-controlled Republican National Committee, which is dead set on holding this battleground district, will be looking at our report under a microscope to find any signs of slowed momentum. And it’s not just Republicans. All the reporters, pundits, and donors who took notice of our historic momentum last year will certainly be watching if we can sustain and grow this people-powered campaign. Hitting our end-of-quarter goal and increasing our momentum is a tall order, especially when we’re up against David Schweikert’s big-money corporate donors. But I’m not worried. We’ve been here before, and I know this grassroots team has what it takes to help us grow this campaign and win this election. Now that you know the stakes, here’s where I ask again for your support. Peter, I'm going to be honest with you: we need to= before the end of March to ensure we’re on track to hit our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In your service, Andrei Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. name: Karen Crnkovich
subject: 150 Days...and counting
body:
Today marks a milestone in my campaign, we have exactly 150 days until Republican voters in Kansas District 3 cast their votes for the candidate they want to go head-to-head with Sharice Davids.

Every day momentum builds—grassroots momentum. **The most important people** , voters here in Kansas 03 are responding overwhelmingly positively to my candidacy, my message, and my game plan to win in November. They are reaching out or coming up to me at meetings and telling me **I have earned their vote and their help.**

I'm doing this for every person who has ever felt like the deck is stacked against them, every small business owner who has sleepless nights about making payroll and managing burdensome regulations, and every parent who worries about their children and what the future looks like.

I'm doing this for us all. I'm doing this for YOU. And I am ALL IN.

**BUT I need YOUR help:**

We all know that _it takes more than money to win a race_. Over and over we have witnessed candidates with 2x, 5x, or even 10x the cash on hand fall flat because they don't resonate with the voters. We need candidates with equal parts sweet and steel. Ones who will connect with voters and stand up and fight. I am that candidate.

However, I must stay competitive, and that takes money.

**Today I am asking, will you please consider contributing $150 in honor of the number of days I have left in my primary?**

You can do this or contribute any amount that is meaningful by going to [www.KCforKansas.com](http://www.kcforkansas.com/)
Every dollar I receive is greatly appreciated and makes a difference.

I am ready to fight, will you join me?
Karen

Karen Crnkovich for Congress, KS03 ____
[www.kcforkansas.com](http://www.kcforkansas.com/) ____
913-414-4446
#teamkc

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80653181/459992498/456630972?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.03.09_B1_ThreeNumbers-RS_30op_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjVkMWRmOS01N2RlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h846WgZtCBTPWQ0suhBrygbtO5XB5aleW6W5A-zgap0=) It’s David Trone with three critical numbers for you that will define our campaign.

**66**

There are 81 days until voters head to the polls on Primary Election Day, and absentee ballots will be on their way to voters across Maryland even sooner.

The GOP will be ramping up their usual disinformation online and on the airwaves. We can only outsmart their dirty tricks if we expand our field operation across the state and make major investments in our ad campaigns.

**2**

That’s the number of seats the GOP needs to flip to seize control of the Senate so he has enough votes to enact their extreme MAGA agenda, including a nationwide abortion ban.

Since I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, that's the grassroots contribution we’re asking you to make today. If each of you can pitch in a few small-dollar donations to our campaign, we’ll have the resources we need to keep Maryland and the Senate blue.

If you want to receive fewer emails, If you want to unsubscribe, | = It’s David Trone with three critical numbers for you that will define our campaign. 66 There are 81 days until voters head to the polls on Primary Election Day, and absentee ballots will be on their way to voters across Maryland even sooner. The GOP will be ramping up their usual disinformation online and on the airwaves. We can only outsmart their dirty tricks if we expand our field operation across the state and make major investments in our ad campaigns. 2 That’s the number of seats the GOP needs to flip to seize control of the Senate so he has enough votes to enact their extreme MAGA agenda, including a nationwide abortion ban. $5 Since I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, that's the grassroots contribution we’re asking you to make today. If each of you can pitch in a few small-dollar donations to our campaign, we’ll have the resources we need to keep Maryland and the Senate blue. = | = = – David Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate this year, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support. | = = David Trone for Maryland P.O. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. Losing to Trump in 2024 would mean erasing all the progress we’ve made under the Biden-Harris administration. From economic growth to healthcare reforms to advancing equity for Black Americans — we simply cannot afford to backtrack. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696645%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XlkmjfhZLLhNLMlnD1WW%2fQ&sysid=1 Literal Children Bombard Lawmakers With Phone Calls After Plea From TikTok

Advocacy groups spent $85.2 million supporting Nikki Haley’s presidential bid, resulting in the former South Carolina governor winning just 89 of the 2,429 delegates available in the Republican presidential primary before she dropped out Wednesday.

Drones fired by Iran-backed militias at U.S. bases in Iraq and Syria could have killed more U.S. soldiers in recent months if not for several strokes of luck, the military commander in charge of U.S. Mideast forces told Congress on Thursday.

Derek —
Celebrity Republican and California U.S. Senate nominee Steve Garvey’s dark money supporters just incorporated a _brand-new super PAC_ with the Federal Election Commission.
Its name? The **Strike Out Schiff PAC.**
**[Can you chip in $3 or more today to help me fight back against the far right’s opening salvo of general election attacks?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=5947%2E5257348%2EamQmhy)**

This is just the latest example of the far-right’s efforts to say and do anything they can to attack me politically and make me a national boogeyman for the Republican Party.
**It started with another super PAC incorporated by none other than disgraced ex-Congressman George Santos’ campaign treasurer** — a dark money group called **STOP ADAM PAC.**
And while all of the votes are still being counted, Steve Garvey is actually _ahead_ in the primary vote tally to complete Senator Feinstein’s term.
That means Republicans are feeling **even more emboldened** to come after me personally and try to tank our chances of bringing our movement to the United States Senate.
**[Any amount you can spare today will help us fight back against Steve Garvey’s dark money super PAC allies and keep California blue — Derek, chip in if you can.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240309_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=5947%2E5257348%2EamQmhy)**
I can’t thank you enough for your support.

name: American Update
subject: Freedom Caucus Rep Won’t Run For Reelection After Short-Lived Senate Bid
body:
And Gov’t Report Could Lead To An Infestation Of Federal Regulation Into Youth Sports, Experts Say

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c696763%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5PpCp3z%2fHurBKwVZzgLpPQ&sysid=1 Freedom Caucus Rep Won’t Run For Reelection After Short-Lived Senate Bid

Republican Rep. Matt Rosendale of Montana withdrew his bid for reelection following his short-lived Senate campaign, he announced Friday. Rosendale dropped out of the Republican primary race to oust Democratic Sen. Jon Tester on Feb. 15 just days after announcing his long-awaited campaign.

body:
Dishonor versus dignity
#
Dishonor versus dignity.
Two words that mean a lot to us over here, Derek.
And in a lot of ways, two words that define the election this year.
On one hand, we have a man who knows the sacrifices Military Families make. A man who has sent a child to war in service to a grateful nation. A man who has laid two of his children to rest. Who embodies the quiet dignity that so many similar families share. Joe Biden.
On the other, we have a man who has only ever served himself. A man who called our war dead “suckers” and “losers”, who refused to be seen with wounded warriors, and who brought dishonor to his high office when he led an insurrection against our democracy itself. Donald Trump.
The stakes couldn’t be more clear. So we’re asking you, please:
**[Contribute to VoteVets today and help us defeat Donald Trump one more time. Peter,

Gabe Vasquez just celebrated receiving the endorsement of “Giffords,” an anti-gun leftist group. Radical Left, anti-gun lobbies like these want to infringe on our God-given right to bear arms, threatening our freedoms and our way of life.

**The reality is, Gabe Vasquez supports radical gun bans that would leave law-abiding New Mexicans defenseless. To make matters worse, in a recent forum,_he admitted that he doesn’t even know enough about firearms to have an opinion!_**

[ ** PROTECT OUR SECOND AMENDMENT » **](http://links.yvetteherrell.com/u/click?_t=60a077210c21435397f83f8f2527f964&_m=0e40999e57644fc78426011e8b78ff79&_e=1CWBt_E4FxUHUPoIKeChdKVHbZijL8SCKCkQo1O2GBmlykQzjOxsLvl7tmDm3GhS3AcOavPaA3W9N9v49f-q1SARTbr7P3L666EU_fvGhOYZvm0BeD-HEIRbkIUGgYveUmFIubPlc4zQPZAG_JCUU-qgaKbDqeEzF7ahPxVaeAp-XBN7E99DDgadwzSWBWEq9xkns0FiwTZHPkZ86KdgzyMpsL-FHhOzjVOSaCyQ2F7Hel5OJB077pQGBb5QYsFhJm7PWXr_Vulm6krhB5qZE9Zdb4C2uc7uq_CuD1WcRa51eEKIczjTh4_GomDM_E0cxPVwp7-XxyNgHdBTGqMYYlHyp1nY535NMS5rSsuz2CcFJ0Rd9Q11eEWfWXfT063smnaCG0E_kClX_HDRBLUelw%3D%3D)
Vasquez often labels himself a “hunter” and therefore claims to have a deep knowledge of our Second Amendment. _**Earth to Gabe Vasquez... hunting isn’t the reason behind the Second Amendment.**_

It’s clear that Gabe Vasquez and other Radical Left Democrats are completely out of touch with the values and beliefs of our great state. As your next Congresswoman, I will ensure that not just New Mexicans, but ALL Americans have the right to defend themselves, their families, and their property as our Founding Fathers intended.

[ ** PROTECT OUR SECOND AMENDMENT »
FIRE GABE VASQUEZ » **](http://links.yvetteherrell.com/u/click?_t=60a077210c21435397f83f8f2527f964&_m=0e40999e57644fc78426011e8b78ff79&_e=1CWBt_E4FxUHUPoIKeChdKVHbZijL8SCKCkQo1O2GBmlykQzjOxsLvl7tmDm3GhS3AcOavPaA3W9N9v49f-q1SARTbr7P3L666EU_fvGhOYZvm0BeD-HEIRbkIUGgYveUmFIubPlc4zQPZAG_JCUU-qgaKbDqeEzF7ahPxVaeAp-XBN7E99DDgadwzSWBWEq9xkns0FiwTZHPkZ86KdgzyMpsL-FHhOzjVOSaCyQ2F5ugA1sk18OUbZRjDKtWCcH9PY0BOsseszBjn1HhQj_ID7-BvWX4OuhlHzkypk3_OKrtuwiQoL6zAwfmPTr2sLD0CVHb3TKDIetfX2rCFxNOnsEFT8bFYAl8o-C18VkBcuHMh3y1iw9A3JKgz3CBJ0PreMCdm4OYNzj-6WAnteTWw%3D%3D)
[**Chip in so we can protect our Second Amendment rights from gun-grabbing liberals like Gabe Vasquez once and for all.**](http://links.yvetteherrell.com/u/click?_t=60a077210c21435397f83f8f2527f964&_m=0e40999e57644fc78426011e8b78ff79&_e=1CWBt_E4FxUHUPoIKeChdKVHbZijL8SCKCkQo1O2GBmlykQzjOxsLvl7tmDm3GhS3AcOavPaA3W9N9v49f-q1SARTbr7P3L666EU_fvGhOYZvm0BeD-HEIRbkIUGgYveUmFIubPlc4zQPZAG_JCUU-qgaKbDqeEzF7ahPxVaeAp-XBN7E99DDgadwzSWBWEq9xkns0FiwTZHPkZ86KdgzyMpsL-FHhOzjVOSaCyQ2F5ZVquvrg0MgLZdN8iwwMEP7jXOcDQVHAjXpYVlbuC1gxdjk4z9iTafGRU92c1Gm5RI5guPqYXbbca1AtIoeW2MKEeoeBn8f3n5VdxcP1aEVBBNMUAyB3K4Ja3VgJJP72xLP-07Txl9TrjzGHgQx_4nqcAyBZGd4z5J9wn1WNUftw%3D%3D)

clean_body: As your next Congresswoman, I will ensure that not just New Mexicans, but ALL Americans have the right to defend themselves, their families, and their property as our Founding Fathers intended. | | Peter, Gabe Vasquez just celebrated receiving the endorsement of “Giffords,” an anti-gun leftist group. Radical Left, anti-gun lobbies like these want to infringe on our God-given right to bear arms, threatening our freedoms and our way of life. The reality is, Gabe Vasquez supports radical gun bans that would leave law-abiding New Mexicans defenseless. To make matters worse, in a recent forum,he admitted that he doesn’t even know enough about firearms to have an opinion! Vasquez often labels himself a “hunter” and therefore claims to have a deep knowledge of our Second Amendment. Earth to Gabe Vasquez... hunting isn’t the reason behind the Second Amendment. It’s clear that Gabe Vasquez and other Radical Left Democrats are completely out of touch with the values and beliefs of our great state. As your next Congresswoman, I will ensure that not just New Mexicans, but ALL Americans have the right to defend themselves, their families, and their property as our Founding Fathers intended. For America, Yvette Herrell | Born and raised in New Mexico, Yvette Herrell served for 4 terms in the New Mexico House of Representatives. Yvette puts people before politics, championing our small businesses and representing our rural values in Washington. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- 12 Main St Box 404 La Luz NM 88337 | PAID FOR BY YVETTE4CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Jim Jordan
subject: An America First fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate

**Jim Jordan**

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

It couldn’t be more clear that this will be another ultra-competitive race, with the power to determine control of the House Majority. **There’s too much at stake to leave anything up to chance here.** **[That’s why we have to ask: Will you rush $5, $25, or whatever you can to help Andrea prepare to defend this must-win election here in OR-06? name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: ☀️ To all of Ruben Gallego’s supporters, please do not click away from this important message! ☀️
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We have some critical news so we'll get straight to the point:
#

☀️ To all of Ruben Gallego’s supporters,

Please don’t click away. We received some critical news this week so we'll get straight to the point: Senator Sinema said she will not run for re-election.

That means it's Ruben vs. Kari Lake, and we're asking for your financial support to make sure we have the resources to win.
---

If everyone reading this donated even $10, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we probably wouldn't have to ask again for weeks.

But not everyone gives. So we’re relying on people who understand how important this race is, and how important keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate is, to chip-in today.
---

Ruben doesn’t do a ton of big-dollar fundraisers. This campaign is sustained by the donations of only 5% of Ruben’s supporters. Without those donations, big or small, we couldn’t run a winning campaign.

That’s why we need your help. We are passionate about our fundraising model, because at its core, this campaign is powered by you.
---

Our average donation is $27. Many donors give less. Some give more. All that matters is that you’re choosing to power this campaign today.

[**If Ruben winning this race and keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate seems worth $3 to you, we’re humbly asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this campaign by making a donation. Thank you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240309-2-160&t=1&akid=2047%2E734936%2Esb-Pfr)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-mar24.UNpLuK&refcode=em240309-2-160&t=20&akid=2047%2E734936%2Esb-Pfr)**

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-mar24.nfHLlp&refcode=em240309-2-160&t=22&akid=2047%2E734936%2Esb-Pfr)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-mar24.FrGn6k&refcode=em240309-2-160&t=23&akid=2047%2E734936%2Esb-Pfr)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-mar24.3rqibv&refcode=em240309-2-160&t=24&akid=2047%2E734936%2Esb-Pfr)**
---

| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-mar24.tgHhQm&refcode=em240309-2-160&t=25&akid=2047%2E734936%2Esb-Pfr)**

🙏 We are asking, humbly: please make your donation today. It’d mean a lot.

Ruben Gallego for Senate

name: Biden HQ
subject: Disbelief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Do you remember how you felt after Donald Trump was elected in 2016? | | |
---
Peter -- Do you remember how you felt after Donald Trump was elected in 2016? The feeling as the votes came in that night and it was clear he was going to win. The feeling of disbelief walking around the next day that Donald Trump was going to be president. Do you remember the daily chaos of the next four years? And do you remember the sense of relief you felt when Joe Biden won in 2020? That we were finally done with Trump and could return some sense of steadiness and normalcy to America? We can't go back, Peter. Rarely does a single election provide so much to gain, yet so much to lose at the same time. And the truth is, the outcome is in the hands of people like you. Joe Biden will win this race if we have the resources to overcome the Trump media circus and outside spending against us. But we cannot do it without you -- this is how we fund a winning campaign. So please: [**Can President Biden count on you to contribute $25 to his reelection campaign today? Especially today. clean_body: Do you remember how you felt after Donald Trump was elected in 2016? | | | Peter -- Do you remember how you felt after Donald Trump was elected in 2016? The feeling as the votes came in that night and it was clear he was going to win. The feeling of disbelief walking around the next day that Donald Trump was going to be president. Do you remember the daily chaos of the next four years? And do you remember the sense of relief you felt when Joe Biden won in 2020? That we were finally done with Trump and could return some sense of steadiness and normalcy to America? We can't go back, Peter. Rarely does a single election provide so much to gain, yet so much to lose at the same time. And the truth is, the outcome is in the hands of people like you. Joe Biden will win this race if we have the resources to overcome the Trump media circus and outside spending against us. But we cannot do it without you -- this is how we fund a winning campaign. Friend, it's Kirsten. I'm about to ask you to **[make a $5 donation ahead of my midnight deadline tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/80654312/459996197/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4883-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTc3NzlhZC01ZmRlLWVlMTEtODVmYi0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ut6m0tbFoJol3eLuKLga7ITw4uoHIynaslJAHF73Pgg=)** This is an incredibly important deadline, and I'm counting on your help to hit my goal. **But first, I want to thank you — so much — for supporting my campaign.**
I'm fighting every single day to earn your support and deliver on the promises I've made to you. From certifying the Equal Rights Amendment so that we can restore reproductive rights nationwide to fighting gun violence and keeping our communities safe, I'm working tirelessly to win change for your family.
As my grandmother taught me when I was a young girl, politics isn't about parties or polling numbers._ It's about the people._ It's my job to serve your family and do everything that I can to make life better for _you_. And it's an honor that I'm grateful for every day. So thank you for trusting me with your support and giving me this incredible opportunity to serve.
I wish that I could end this email here. But unfortunately, elections are an unavoidable part of politics. And to continue to serve your family in the Senate and win progress on all the issues you care about — reproductive rights, affordable health care, protecting our seniors and so much more — **I need your help.**
Democrats are heading into a historically difficult election cycle. And here in New York, right-wing extremists had their best election in decades in 2022. I'm confident that we can reverse that trend this year. **But because I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, I'm counting on grassroots donations to compete with far-right megadonors. **
**[Please, if I've earned your support and trust fighting for you in the Senate, will you make a donation to help me continue this work and defend my seat? clean_body: will you make a donation to help me continue this work and defend my seat? | | | Friend, it's Kirsten. I'm about to ask you to = This is an incredibly important deadline, and I'm counting on your help to hit my goal. But first, I want to thank you — so much — for supporting my campaign. I'm fighting every single day to earn your support and deliver on the promises I've made to you. From certifying the Equal Rights Amendment so that we can restore reproductive rights nationwide to fighting gun violence and keeping our communities safe, I'm working tirelessly to win change for your family. As my grandmother taught me when I was a young girl, politics isn't about parties or polling numbers. It's about the people. It's my job to serve your family and do everything that I can to make life better for you. And it's an honor that I'm grateful for every day. So thank you for trusting me with your support and giving me this incredible opportunity to serve. I wish that I could end this email here. But unfortunately, elections are an unavoidable part of politics. And to continue to serve your family in the Senate and win progress on all the issues you care about — reproductive rights, affordable health care, protecting our seniors and so much more — I need your help. Democrats are heading into a historically difficult election cycle. And here in New York, right-wing extremists had their best election in decades in 2022. I'm confident that we can reverse that trend this year. But because I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, I'm counting on grassroots donations to compete with far-right megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for trusting me to fight for your family. It is the highest honor. With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Hey Peter, it's Jacky Rosen.
My faith has _always_ been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.
It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**
_**[I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. That's why I'm humbly asking: Please, will you chip in $3 or more today, split between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help me win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and continue this critical work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/80654798/459997836/-1746793467?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240309_2_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3NGQ1ZDAyLTYzZGUtZWUxMS04NWZiLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WTpvPhhok1XBBIYuHrJL-wKD7fnNWfphYvg0iciNzRU=)**_
