clean_body: = Hey Peter, it's Jacky Rosen. My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it. It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. But right now, I need your help. National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for your support. If they can do this to a duly elected President, they'll infringe on the rights of anyone, so we have to fight back today to save our country tomorrow. Our rights, our future, everything depends on the actions we take right now. Trump was right. This corruption runs deep, so we need every patriot in the fight today. Down with the radicals, Matt Gaetz I work for the people -- NOT the politicians. I'm Matt Gaetz, and I am fighting to drain the CORRUPT D.C. swamp & defend the America First Movement. Always. I cannot be bought because I am 100% funded by the people. I stood up for you when it mattered. I'm humbly asking you to do the same by chipping in $25 or any amount RIGHT AWAY. Peter,

On Wednesday, the House voted to pass the first six spending bills needed to fund our government. While this is a good first step, the passage of this minibus was **only possible thanks to Kim and her democratic colleagues** , as 83 extremist Republicans bucked their party and voted against doing their job.

Funding our government should be simple, Peter, but things are never as straightforward when Republicans are in charge. **They continue to put the lives of millions of hard-working Americans up in the air – all just because they cannot organize their party.**

If this continues before the final March 22 deadline, government employees will have to work without pay, while critical services like education, health, and human services will be at risk of shutting down.

**This is the chaos that Republican obstruction brings, and it's unacceptable, Peter.**

Now is not the time for party politics. Now is the time for Republicans to meet Democrats at the table and ensure our government is 100% funded before the final March 22 deadline.

**[Kim knows we can't afford to play games with the livelihoods of our citizens, nor should we. If you agree, join Kim in demanding House Republicans finally do their job before it's too late. But his far-right base is fired up at the thought that he could win this year. And while Georgia Democrats won’t stand for it, the truth is, he has a dedicated group of extremists eating out of the palm of his hands. They’re going to throw every dollar they can his way to make sure he flips Georgia back to RED. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Your donation will help us to get out the vote before Tuesday’s crucial election. name: Hill Harper
subject: For my son
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
And every Michigan family.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK)
I was scrolling through my photos last night, and I just had to share this one, Peter:
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/723?t=2&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK)
**[DONATE »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/723?t=3&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK)**
It’s one of my all-time favorites from the campaign trail: my son Pierce, perched up on my shoulders (one of his favorite places to be), during the historic United Auto Workers strike last year.
As a single father, my whole world revolves around Pierce. Adopting him is the single greatest decision I ever made -- his laughter is my joy, his dreams are my aspirations, and his future is my driving motivation. Every morning I drop him off at school, I’m reminded of the responsibility I bear as his father to shape a world that nurtures, protects, and empowers him to be his best self.
**Peter, I truly believe in a better Michigan -- and I’m running for U.S. Senate to deliver it not just for my own son, but _your_ kids, too. **
I want them to grow up in a world where healthcare is a fundamental human right, where workers are treated with dignity, and where the toxic influence of money in politics is overpowered by the will of the people. Their collective future hinges on the decisions we make today, and I can promise you: As Michigan’s next Senator, I’ll make every decision, every vote, with our kids’ futures in mind. I’ll fight like hell and work with Democrats, Republicans, Independents -- whoever it takes -- to deliver progress on the issues you care about.
**_But I can’t do it alone._**
[**We have less than five months until the primary, and it’s going to take ALL of us working together to win this election. So, I have to ask: Will you please chip in $5 _today_ to fuel our people-powered campaign?**](https://act.hillharper.com/go/725?t=5&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/726?t=6&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK) [DONATE $25 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/727?t=7&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK) [DONATE $50 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/728?t=8&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK) [DONATE $100 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/729?t=9&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK) [DONATE $250 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/730?t=10&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/723?t=11&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK)
---
Thanks for taking the time to read this — it means the world to have your support! Let’s get after it.
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/723?t=12&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=13&refcode2=1060_62735_iEBTbK&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1060%2E62735%2EiEBTbK)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

subject: Just 5 sentences
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:

I’ll get straight to the point, Peter: Pennsylvania will be one of the most competitive and expensive battlegrounds in the country this November.
A billionaire-backed super PAC supporting my opponent just launched $1 million worth of ads, and that’s just the beginning. With the fate of the Senate and the White House hinging on Pennsylvania, I need folks like you by my side to fight back.

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Friday, February 9th, 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Something major happened on Friday. Did you get the email/text I sent to your inbox? |
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtvdhiw5OMMPcfRot_8TVBAeOV9Fb2NSu13yK57WZkamR-ME1ido7u6bFs_Ufbn2fP7TfCYDfFcT_MB6kbRO6gR6BG09DYGNylaIWaQwbroTAcopLgJMljiuWwC1Mwrt9fX8NQj39CS2JwU0iBECCfuvl)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Tim Sheehy, a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

If you’re hearing from me for the first time today, here is a quick rundown of who I am, why I’m running, and why **[it’s critical that you join President Trump in endorsing my campaign for the U.S. Senate today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtve3LUnQfWGYFQ77D2oBx50RNfSktkov6yPNf1_PEIkqCGigZKW_TEmRU3Eku88_YIDFhBAxIQPbUebstf-kRjp24Z_6fKh9dGuaayk6shqoCDItF2N4dipi1w_LzaYE_5iIBhg8JU6lY1SoxkM7T5Po)**

**Unlike Joe Biden** , I understand what it is to serve our country, not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I have been wounded in service of our nation. I’ve lost mentors and friends who willingly made the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtvdBa6-q0UzL5kV5u5Tuu7ZMU235zgjtVz2oU6PefxZQcPNfJ7w_Pw2ItHwtN1sTLDXGDiKY4hWIMrTLGpBWdi9C32hwtGpW_WDp3S8kXkmFbhciOUcKq0qlEo9lyQGbn3pprK4NR46HqGx9fSyYkwQu)
**Like President Trump** , I know our nation's best days are ahead of us. Like President Trump, I am sickened by the damage Democrats have inflicted upon our great Republic every day of Joe Biden’s presidency. Donald Trump knows that Montanans - and Americans across the country - want more _**conservative political outsiders**_ representing their interests in the U.S. Senate. That’s why, on Friday, February 9th, he formally endorsed my campaign for the U.S. Senate.

**[Will you follow President Trump’s lead and personally endorse my Senate campaign today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtvfzN8nN43OYwN-51kurOL4menRuqmQuDIAgkm_CACZhHw69LWDWj_adrVcvWPR3Ue1LJtgUQAgAhjZk4JY0gpGV6Bywmxg4cGHpo3mhbqD8TDJUFwY3ecZgQc__4HQtpyYQhbQu_sKyoAtlAtVCJe7l)**

[**ENDORSE NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR U.S. SENATE ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtvdCb1XCBgYNW6FVet1UngGozsDl39Y0cm6cT2rfncfvr3hn_bfZhbRO4UEEMMO8zhHWlIGRtQDLBaykIc0u9pIt6Wk7lUMBB0FPPmonXea-wVLkEEvP-enHUimBo5I6b_VZmeHIaRxSttO4irTA0jVA)
**[Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtvcu7SxpmWctTeGV81WJZcdmmrKR1WTDovej6mPBu2BLjZfBBMWeuQmHngzi2whu_5STJdlsVP4DmW5YPKDdX2cdv4nwr-GkRFbZ1xwONWXm89dpdEwW8qpi1ZgKDnSSl0kx8JUDlh2uJWlARMylHy-P)** – and spend $100M plus in the process. As of last week, they’ve made public their plans to spend more than 56 million dollars attacking me on Montana airwaves later this year.

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-person job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit to defeat the enemy.

_**The Senate functions in much the same way.**_

_**President Trump knows this, which is why he’s endorsed my campaign.**_

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtveDxbzPgdCqMO89QFA0wG1_zmwpGrXDsRbWnsws3Ir7xdaUkMS9P6lQnruJzJOKhZMmlOHYrmE4T_7xToNO_U0xbyRXvC8hh5VyJU1Azdnhz16p2hhAO1_dXd78wOB8IG8bVM_H4GhlheOrFXXILF1h)
_**Kristi Noem, Tommy Tuberville, Kellyanne Conway, Marjorie Taylor Greene .... and many others also know I’m the only conservative in the race who can beat Jon Tester and flip this seat. They’ve all endorsed my campaign in recent months.**_

[**ENDORSE NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR U.S. SENATE ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtvfhBnH8VvveOisMaoCCUdhwoKtq7iyP9KEP4ytqi_ZLiqF_48ijYhjKkbGoYc5zJd5DWQTpF2otDkUikG3cxinXg2ppGZlxSRXx7SRC17Jiepv4ihmuqtfHFk7O1s-JkWchdiARA1kzL8jxV9351pW5)
Republicans around the country know that to win back the Senate, we must flip Montana in the fall. But this won’t be an easy task; _**it will take thousands of hours working around the clock to get our message in front of every voter in Montana.**_

But I can tell you this: Every ounce of sweat and tears we put into this campaign will be worth winning on November 5th.

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of evil. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator**.

[**ENDORSE NAVY SEAL TIM SHEEHY FOR U.S. SENATE ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e946226a6082436e8b04a0271356b8b8&_e=RM1w4q9eeAPG3Enf-jfhDttEHkFyH-K8KaHtric4BoV-WqICxTzKPW2TNYE5T_uX28YhRtu56Ip5AANNt5E7SJNfkEVfuRPAeymaoRfZp-_cJO4u8TbqFOVdwLKOdkXHGQxoM2fFbps2eoXDzkqESIT-EN4b3WUGjtNbSKHb8XlCsJJRkSYrOSZ47EvUI1oQI7YiaF4MfFKHuCcWvoPj2ALCZH6IFL85Ii7B34FC0HDkkQLcPlvWUR9fyyyD3XrZSsi1tu5WxX38Md5bgjouQVnaDy4gS3OG-2mZw6wYtvcWOLDbS21rjx0gIUI577-L8nzfKSDRNDjkiP3HGk3SpsCr4BWQFKwdkykWwgV8sp5Z9Y9HaD_j_7udQL7qQ7Mwk32o2XMaEzb9gin1e3ruX5g2kMdv0rUVq1la82BIynUPHCHBX58bXaNaSemZEnqQ)

clean_body: Something major happened on Friday. Did you get the email/text I sent to your inbox? | Fellow Conservative, My name is Tim Sheehy, a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. If you’re hearing from me for the first time today, here is a quick rundown of who I am, why I’m running, and why Unlike Joe Biden , I understand what it is to serve our country, not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I have been wounded in service of our nation. I’ve lost mentors and friends who willingly made the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Like President Trump , I know our nation's best days are ahead of us. Like President Trump, I am sickened by the damage Democrats have inflicted upon our great Republic every day of Joe Biden’s presidency. Donald Trump knows that Montanans - and Americans across the country - want more conservative political outsiders representing their interests in the U.S. Senate. That’s why, on Friday, February 9th, he formally endorsed my campaign for the U.S. Senate. – and spend $100M plus in the process. As of last week, they’ve made public their plans to spend more than 56 million dollars attacking me on Montana airwaves later this year. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-person job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit to defeat the enemy. The Senate functions in much the same way. President Trump knows this, which is why he’s endorsed my campaign. Kristi Noem, Tommy Tuberville, Kellyanne Conway, Marjorie Taylor Greene .... and many others also know I’m the only conservative in the race who can beat Jon Tester and flip this seat. They’ve all endorsed my campaign in recent months. Republicans around the country know that to win back the Senate, we must flip Montana in the fall. But this won’t be an easy task; it will take thousands of hours working around the clock to get our message in front of every voter in Montana. But I can tell you this: Every ounce of sweat and tears we put into this campaign will be worth winning on November 5th. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of evil. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator. We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Republican for U.S. Senate, Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA | Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Peter, as one of our most active supporters, we've selected YOU to partake in our exclusive 2024 Approval Poll for Attorney General James. We're working hard to build out our strategy for progress for this year, and your insights are vital to this effort.
**But in case you need a brief refresher on AG James' work so far, here are some highlights:**
\+ Letitia James stood tall against some of the nation's**wealthiest and most powerful men** and did not let them scare her away from her fight to hold them accountable.
\+ Letitia James **successfully sued Big Pharma** for their astronomically high prescription drug prices and their role in the opioid epidemic – ultimately winning BILLIONS for New Yorkers.
\+ When Roe v. Wade was overturned, AG James sprung into action to make New York **a safe haven for _all_ those seeking an abortion.**
\+ And Letitia James went **toe to toe with the gun lobby** for their role in the gun violence epidemic, which claims the lives of tens of thousands of New Yorkers every year.
**_And we could keep going_. **
Peter, when Letitia James made history and became New York's first Black attorney general, she vowed to be a voice for the voiceless and fight for the powerless. And we think she's accomplished just that – but before the election year picks up steam, we urgently need to know what you think.

This is our last chance.

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=49b9b00a0b9149a688c125c7a521467d&_e=2J4lRZKA4ulJtrVIJvmaZLoguPFSkV4USvqJCFv_Ia2MWxAWOYg8Du2IaffDT9iDyMNMBtci9yOBoB8aQrpd5M8rJlwzgaGqedqn23D5XOc8ot4VHrR-cSTc5QRfEUrXEmao90yHpxzxuBrHbJ9kjrbfwQOzjcTitPv3w9X3jdK5hf0KLSHkLga1SPbyi9Dnn9DV0vXz1qYRyzs-HWEj_cMZfAFj499ACwGaZsDNQd_IgrOmMKx-GqH09lhGKbq3HPGqOMP8x6nIMa2Vvd7cYmUUNMplFpu0Lh71w6jVm2m5Q6bGqnrV-CUQJYt71l9MzIRe4BG4OSRolW31WgWtWRvTtNLmRd2n4lwd87IBxv8xNVzQCWAAWUXK-U6ID5H-m-rUxjfeKGEeRL05CDVLZviK4Xmb65ITpLjXIVdQl8aQjB3LwNrcYTdBqYRShW1_)
---
Friend,

When I came to America from the socialist, violence-ridden Iraq, I never would have envisioned that the same policies that destroyed my home country would begin to be prominent in the United States.

That's what we're getting with Ilhan Omar and the "squad." They take orders from Washington insiders and advance the globalist agenda. It is almost as if they are intentionally trying to rip apart our country. Communism has failed all around the world. Why would it work here?

**Protecting the values our founding fathers built upon our land should be our top priority.**

I am running for Congress because I understand what is at stake. I want to give back to the country that allowed me to live the American dream.

****Will you help me defeat Ilhan Omar?****

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: That’s damn good politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
No billionaire in our country should pay a lower tax rate than a teacher, a sanitation worker, or a nurse.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1954%2E4032634%2E1ts_ld)
---
Did you catch the State of the Union on Thursday? President Biden spoke about a lot of important issues during his address — but I want to talk about one in particular. It’s an issue that threads many, many issues together. Look, if you care about our climate, if you care about making heath care affordable, if you care about the future of our children, if you care about housing, if you care about expanding opportunity, then you have to care about our tax code. President Biden said it best: No billionaire in our country should pay a lower tax rate than a teacher, a sanitation worker, or a nurse. But our current tax system allows it — and Donald Trump made sure of that. While in office, Trump passed a tax law that gave billionaires and wealthy corporations $2 trillion in tax breaks. That’s _trillion_ — with a T. It’s one of his only substantial “accomplishments” as president. Our tax code allows the 1,000 billionaires in America to pay an average federal tax rate that's far less than the vast majority of Americans pay. So President Biden has proposed a minimum tax of 25% for billionaires to right this wrong. But wait, there’s more — we can’t forget about wealthy corporations, too. In 2020, 55 of the biggest companies in America made $40 billion in profits and paid zero in federal income taxes. Z-e-r-o. Congress started to tackle this by passing my bill to make billionaire corporations pay a minimum 15% of their profits in taxes. This produced enough money to cover all of the climate proposals in the Inflation Reduction Act. It was a strong start, and President Biden is taking it a step further, proposing we raise it to 21%. He also included his objective to end tax breaks for Big Pharma, Big Oil, private jets, and massive executive pay. These changes can help create affordable child care and paid family leave, fund our public schools and housing, invest in affordable housing and health care...the list goes on. Look, when we consider the two-trillion-dollar question of _“Who does our government work for?”_ — the answer is in our tax code. Do we want our government to work for rich and powerful people and companies — to help make them more rich and more powerful? Or do we want our government to work for the middle class? I understand that conversations about the tax code can get wonky. I know that on its surface the tax code isn’t the most invigorating issue. But like President Biden said, it boils down to a simple question of fairness. How can we get everyone to pay their fair share, and give everyone a fair shot? Good tax policy is good for every issue we want to tackle. And that’s damn good politics. **I’ll keep doing everything in my power to make sure millionaires, billionaires, and giant corporations are paying their fair share in taxes — by championing President Biden, and fighting for my plans to pass a wealth tax on fortunes greater than $50 million and end lobbying as we know it so big money won’t have so much power in Washington.** [**I’m able to stay in these fights because I’m shoulder to shoulder with people like you. Can you help grow our grassroots campaign and support my re-election with a donation of $28 or any amount?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1912?amount=28&t=8&akid=1954%2E4032634%2E1ts_ld)

name: Katie Porter
subject: My daughter’s Election Night speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
She made me so proud.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=38782%2E3422442%2EgiATMN)
Derek, while Election Night didn’t bring the results we hoped, a real highlight was my daughter Betsy’s speech.
With Taylor Swift references sprinkled throughout, Betsy shared a little bit about the unique experience of having a parent in office. [You can watch her speech here:](https://act.katieporter.com/go/20110?t=2&akid=38782%2E3422442%2EgiATMN)
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/20110?t=3&akid=38782%2E3422442%2EgiATMN)
My sons Luke and Paul have both given Election Night speeches in the past, and each time, my kids have made me SO proud. They’re the reason I ran for Congress in the first place, and the reason I kept fighting.
I promised them a puppy if we lost, and these kids know a thing or two about oversight—so you can bet they’re already working on making sure I follow through.
Thank you again for all your support.
Onward,
Katie Porter

name: Nella Domenici
subject: On the wrong track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nella for Senate
body:
There's no arguing that Joe Biden and Martin Heinrich have let us down. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=06477442c3c14b82ae3a443e56868dc0&_t=OXVUtqE-rFlGzAFeN-bJ_fVfI7ON9xVbKCaqLJBwLyPB8Gl9maEVZyFA5FzN7Pbu6YjTIQY2TKr9y-PAQ4h9SdXVdtkL4hCOpFl3h4blrjo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=06477442c3c14b82ae3a443e56868dc0&_t=OXVUtqE-rFlGzAFeN-bJ_fVfI7ON9xVbKCaqLJBwLyPB8Gl9maEVZyFA5FzN7Pbu6YjTIQY2TKr9y-PAQ4h9SdXVdtkL4hCOpFl3h4blrjo%3D)

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=06477442c3c14b82ae3a443e56868dc0&_e=dM1hEAipgbhqADCo4FmhhkUij6773lCB2CTAwZKkZUTrRVrjfyZLuSXi2yKs4-24WkajGUI4Z-Hv7BEEAiphdi6XfgZhtNLFQYQdkOw6BVxoxtiF-YdiLFTUmAn68KcgZH7TvATtdIqssjXOicNGTLn-9W0dDXkenHZ4U7zapHToDgePfhGpOUuMsz0W9t_wdnsUlJi1awpOEMCLehbdM8NcZqZpG__GWp8BJKXT5g9R_e4-G2SPyTM7YpvIIfz1IGVtRWz0CQjlR-RasipacyJ6FchKoPl9ACYynaJg2GW2TkOTnCIxYGMPz5D6GuHmr5f_1IwXEcrHGUWSWzaSzt6K63djPi_dT6tddHVj-aDvJdI50LYbYP7WokSGoU7a0tQu9Kmwnp_rPBSMQTDb8A%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

America is clearly on the wrong track – over two-thirds of Americans agree, _and you’re likely one of them._

Less than 40% approve of the job Joe Biden is doing, and there’s no arguing that he and Martin Heinrich have let us down.

But it’s more than that – together, they’ve pushed policies that are actively harming Americans; from our families, to our jobs, to our safety, to our freedoms.

We’re on the wrong track, and we can and MUST do better. **That’s why I’m running to be the next Republican U.S. Senator from New Mexico,[and why I’m asking for your support.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=06477442c3c14b82ae3a443e56868dc0&_e=dM1hEAipgbhqADCo4FmhhkUij6773lCB2CTAwZKkZUTrRVrjfyZLuSXi2yKs4-24WkajGUI4Z-Hv7BEEAiphdi6XfgZhtNLFQYQdkOw6BVxoxtiF-YdiLFTUmAn68KcgZH7TvATtdIqssjXOicNGTLn-9W0dDXkenHZ4U7zapHToDgePfhGpOUuMsz0W9t_wdnsUlJi1awpOEMCLehbdM8NcZqZpG__GWp8BJKXT5g9R_e4-G2SPyTM7YpvIIfz1MAtNcqirOLPja19kO2sxUQUBtnbwXTXULf_ry6wrQJUnbISNH5a5dVBnVsxauXCnXBVdYjQ8u6Wv_ufwq0lN1o84dTOsNdT9DCoDxGw012RB-qVc5Z9hTZRmGRcSTXh15YcAdOuNpzKOBqfP69dELQ%3D%3D)**

[ ** JOIN NELLA » **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=06477442c3c14b82ae3a443e56868dc0&_e=dM1hEAipgbhqADCo4FmhhkUij6773lCB2CTAwZKkZUTrRVrjfyZLuSXi2yKs4-24WkajGUI4Z-Hv7BEEAiphdi6XfgZhtNLFQYQdkOw6BVxoxtiF-YdiLFTUmAn68KcgZH7TvATtdIqssjXOicNGTLn-9W0dDXkenHZ4U7zapHToDgePfhGpOUuMsz0W9t_wdnsUlJi1awpOEMCLehbdM8NcZqZpG__GWp8BJKXT5g9R_e4-G2SPyTM7YpvIIfz1pU5IjrYtXrigySCZDlmeOOmNhuy_I6cVxjblPYEichJ-bNSYG76J5eUGDkZkxrMVGCqExQuQVsHqsdjOeCtUXNiDmki6cgjSNBQ7-K9TKxsZY8dZXCtKWmI7vynXxsJacHFx6L50dASSzESTaEVPqw%3D%3D)
These are SOME of New Mexico’s issues that are national issues that I will fight for when I reach the Senate:

* **Securing the border** , stopping the flow of fentanyl and human trafficking
* **Lowering costs** for hardworking Americans and unleashing American domestic energy
* **Making neighborhoods safe** for our families and supporting the police
* **Improving education** through choice and competition
* Destigmatizing and finally **addressing mental illness**

But to get these things done, we need a Republican-controlled Senate so we have a majority that actually cares about these things.

**Flipping New Mexico will put the majority back in Republican hands, and that’s why your support in this race is so critical.**

We’ve taken the Democrats by surprise and have put this race on the map in 2024. As the official Republican nominee, [**I now need your help to continue gaining momentum and build a winning campaign.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=06477442c3c14b82ae3a443e56868dc0&_e=dM1hEAipgbhqADCo4FmhhkUij6773lCB2CTAwZKkZUTrRVrjfyZLuSXi2yKs4-24WkajGUI4Z-Hv7BEEAiphdi6XfgZhtNLFQYQdkOw6BVxoxtiF-YdiLFTUmAn68KcgZH7TvATtdIqssjXOicNGTLn-9W0dDXkenHZ4U7zapHToDgePfhGpOUuMsz0W9t_wdnsUlJi1awpOEMCLehbdM8NcZqZpG__GWp8BJKXT5g9R_e4-G2SPyTM7YpvIIfz1szAs8pWpCtxsi-x90s069mXPY-CG9ZyJR-5QaihM8MVFPoK0zW9mGeFQ1Pks5DsYMU1OLJDMux7JX_Ue9X7aauYCo93NDvgvxrygmojQe71g49JO4-Tp74a8aNgScvhTNjuLFY32XiQrhEQwW4-cNg%3D%3D)

Thank you,

**Nella Domenici**
Candidate for U.S. Senate, New Mexico

| **ABOUT NELLA**
**New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. She was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of her childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas and Monroe with her seven siblings, and her parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. Nella began her education at Our Lady of Fatima, where she learned the values she holds today. Nella is a proud third-generation New Mexican, devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. Nella’s family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and she and her husband Pat enjoy their family home in New Mexico that they have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like most New Mexicans, Nella Domenici understands the importance of hard work. She waited tables to help pay for her undergraduate degree from Georgetown University, and worked her way through night school at Georgetown Law while holding down a full time job. She then graduated from Harvard Business School as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while 9 months pregnant.

Nella began her career at the bottom and worked her way up through the complex finance world, eventually serving as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In her career, Nella advised, invested in, grew, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. The industries she has worked in are vast and include areas such as health care, AI, food service, lodging, commercial real estate, mortgage lending, and consumer products. These companies have ranged from small family-owned businesses, to rapidly growing venture backed enterprises, to a Fortune 200 company. Several of these have been headquartered in New Mexico. Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans.

Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. **

name: Joe Kent
subject: When it comes to Marie Perez, make sure you read the fine print!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Patriot,
With over twenty years of service defending our country, I know exactly how to stop this invasion of illegals that is becoming a blight on our nation right now.
_And people are starting to see that I am that voice that will bring solutions._
I am thrilled to tell you that I was recently endorsed by the Pacific County GOP, with all seven counties unified in support of my candidacy!
And we've never needed this more than right now. Under President Joe Biden's lax border policies, with my opponent Marie Perez as a willing accomplice, our borders have become nothing more than a welcome mat for illegal immigrants, exacerbating the fentanyl crisis and compromising our national security.
Marie has made it painfully clear that she's only here to play political games for her own end. She used to say things like _" no one stays awake at night over the southern border"_ while opposing a Republican bill aimed at securing the border last year.
Now, all of a sudden, during a pivotal election year, she is changing her spots! _At least, pretending to._ She is now suddenly endorsing the H.R. 7372 bill - a toothless gesture laden with loopholes, especially for those claiming asylum - a process so widely exploited under Biden's administration that it essentially grants automatic entry into the United States.
You see - these illegals are coached (via social media!) on precisely what to say when they enter our borders.
**This is a strategy codified in the text of Perez 's bill!**
It goes like this:
_" The Secretary of Homeland Security may not expel an alien to a country if the alien's life or freedom would be threatened in such country because of the alien's race, religion, nationality, membership in a particular social group, or political opinion; or there are substantial grounds for believing that the alien would be in danger of being subjected to torture if expelled to such country." _
**I 'm sure I don't need to spell out what any person who wanted to enter the U.S. illegally would do if they read that. **
Once they make this claim, our government cannot expel them, and they are given access to asylum lawyers, allowing them up to eight years in the U.S. to pursue their asylum claim, turning asylum into a de facto visa.
**_That 's why I want the people of Washington to beware. We've got to understand that where Marie Perez is concerned, we MUST read the fine print AND read between the lines!_**
Once you see her motives for what they really are, you get that she's the WORST thing that could happen to America.
I am making it my mission to defeat Marie and start putting bills in place that actually provide REAL solutions to our open borders!
**Will you join me in my mission? With my years of experience, I already have a clear vision. But I need the funds and the support to carry these plans out. If you could contribute $10, $20, or $30 today, that would be a great start for us. And if you can afford more, please send $100, $200, $300, or even more! We would be grateful for any amount you can spare at ****[https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Ee763htL5ebLJ763ymYdx763Xzyg/BOHNct7UYmKe4pobl0Twxg).**
This isn't for me. It is for Washington, it is for America, and it is for our children and grandchildren. Please do not delay! Every day that goes by is a day I can gain traction on Marie if I have the means.
I humbly thank you for your willingness to sacrifice for our nation.
God bless,
Joe Kent
Republican Candidate for Congress (WA-03)
Former Special Forces Operator
America First Conservative
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
---
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/BOHNct7UYmKe4pobl0Twxg)

In the last several weeks, we’ve seen just how extreme MAGA David Schweikert’s positions on reproductive freedom and choice are:
